name: FURIOUS (FFR)
subject: re: Trump’s Electoral College scheme
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
We need you to be as mad as we are
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20373%2E4449941%2EBzGPTu)
---
**Look, we need you to be as _MAD_ as we are:** | **_IN 2016:_** Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!

**_IN 2020:_** Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**_NOW, IN 2024:_** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!**
---
[**But we’ve only raised $2,810 of the $9,900 goal to relaunch our ads to abolish the Electoral College – so we’re taking the HUGELY rare step of activating our 2X-MATCH. Double your impact and donate now to fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/33084?t=7&akid=20373%2E4449941%2EBzGPTu)

name: Abortion Alert (via HER Time)
subject: ABORTION IS HEALTH CARE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72812434/436488194/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231104_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJlNDdhOGQtN2E3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5UHZfDTgOPJe5knO7KN_EWbyv6S_8J7EX8DgMsO1r_M=)
---
Urgent update, Peter: State officials in Wyoming have asked a court to rule that the state’s TOTAL abortion ban is constitutional, claiming ABORTION IS NOT HEALTH CARE. Yes, you read that right. Wyoming’s constitution explicitly protects the right to make one’s own health care decisions. But apparently, exercising control over your own body is not health care. [_**This is an all hands on deck moment for the reproductive rights movement. We can’t let the Wyoming court set this precedent and allow the total abortion ban to stand. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: A Call to Speak Up for Biblical Truth
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American We're living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty - which is God's idea, not man's idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**
---
[Support Freedom Night in America ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._w7tQ)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
**_God's Word is the ultimate truth._** But radicals who bow at the altar of "wokeism" disagree. Gov. Gavin Newsome may soon sign legislation that would allow the government to take children away from parents who oppose their "gender transition." Congregants at the Cathedral of Hope Protestant Church in Dallas, TX were led in a prayer pledging allegiance to drag queens and the LGBTQ+ movement. This is blasphemy. **But there is hope!** Thousands of American churches are aligned with TPUSA Faith's mission to restore Biblical values, but they currently lack both engagement and opportunities to make a positive political and cultural change in our nation. **[Your gift of $35 or more will support TPUSA Faith in securing speakers for Freedom Night in America who stand for Biblical truth and will empower Pastors and churches to put their faith into action.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-7G0fATCb_9W0Cw)**
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-cyhVvYzgU-VynTpsRrA)
---
Christians founded this country, Fellow American. Fifty-five of the 56 signers of the Declaration of Independence were Bible-believing, church-attending Christians. They applied biblical principles and wisdom in the founding of our great nation, and for nearly 250 years, our country has experienced the blessings of liberty in abundance. But today, those biblical principles are under constant attack by decadent, humanistic, and amoral movements -- and if we don't defend the foundational truths that have made our nation great, we're going to reap the consequences. As the inheritors of the Founding Fathers' vision, it's our turn to own our faith and stand up for Biblical truth. Resistance to tyranny is Biblical, and we must speak up! **[With your generous support today, TPUSA Faith will continue reaching, engaging, and equipping Christians to share their faith and to be bold in the public arena on behalf of Biblical principles.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)** Thank you for your support! God bless you, Charlie KirkTurning Point USA Faith
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[Support Turning Point USA Faith](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-DU44OVrMeRj1nRT48jA)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzA5LTUzN2IwZGY4MDE0MzQ2ZDBhODhiZTFjYzRhYzA5YTQwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/G4bvxcvf4DpA1qnjm3Wjsg) to unsubscribe.
---

body:
Submit your survey now
I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024.

It’s Speaker Mike Johnson.

I could not be more honored to lead House Republicans in our fight to defend and expand our Republican Majority in 2024.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk252jqabgleffqm9rcgsf1j0ti4m9dbr0nivfag_rp22sh2s8i66p74shjm1ob4chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zed3e31rok4gptflmo2vr95q50gv5ao9slna10r0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shjm1ob4chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6cmf8v9f9l6l27ifpj3e5hvsm3a4i3s226sa8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shjm1ob4chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs367vjv1nt9bvbnl8941hrb170aacdu05d6mucg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbafa0cmc08td6nbm78rq680bg6omkpon1lakauo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd4a344ltsonvanhkl1d2kqu9kfe1082po8h8u1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4ga2ntuvm0i3rvn051qulur9hdq5c3ja8vgjmfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)

name: American Defense News
subject: Will you share your thoughts on inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmk3lo19l554dept23gijn05mej7mua3e5mof45o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In recent years, consumer prices have risen 7% annually—the highest inflation rate increase in 40 years.

## As inflation rises in our country, what are your biggest concerns?
[Job loss / Unemployment](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zleve9acvvrs592gfam564ttm82opsvaifmigleo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) [An increase in the number of Americans who depend on the government](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtfn93g97tlih22gh5a8pl9da7702dp3eo5er6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) [An increase in the national debt](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlvd4viao0q4gpa0b2gm8dv8qod4j976cpamf840_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) [More inflation](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zthothf7klq5o06ivgarfst8ognb5n5pgprb0ta8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) [No concerns about inflation](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmonq8on3tnran7nupnmo5qo6974rmdb3guha72o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) [Not Sure / No Opinion](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z03o7ivmkd1r5p64k766pvigc38h48qveq9p69h8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)
Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6g45qhq6fbnpe2vpua2q4fbc1ti4n4pu0vkt18g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztubulem1c2sqt3qpku3lupsgeorul95l5ab31e8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh9rc47dhsd7603d5g1rb7tuettjd5jotu7eekfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)**

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|

| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)

Fellow American – I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://trk.readactnews._6Nw)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://trk.readactnews.)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://trk.readactnews._ZUY2GgAhnNmIl2iEw)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| ** _MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Their futures are at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd112634er8ob30g9ll1mo05u8cc0opak9mglprg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp01q8rkim6cdkent9na2gnhh5fl7v3443nehsfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z191quvnirgq1s8l58c9ckunbuptd6eprqr8s3mg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

As parents and patriots, we must make a change. | Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: “This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.” There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--every day --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlj6asl62lj7kh599v7m6dhda2kdgi0ei60hgh4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o36cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2h4b6o89v8arhtg6feato6e0rct9jpc7vboji5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o36cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2amsdt4669blq7njmi3hkgqi5qgomoglgngeuv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o36cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuuijahc0popoc1l3cc3vqc2vm85vic0ppovbd00_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o36cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6spga43qslkjsgbkic1618h0gvdaor56pm0i630_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ispr6n82shtqjebfv9sj1v4cdhu2d1qqbsrqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2a4tmt4potueafgk153mbqnao76ec5dbbbgqv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge4o35clh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: important election update!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

In just **_THREE DAYS_** , the November 7th off-year elections will be coming to a climax!

That’s why we’ve deployed our student activists across the country to knock on doors and **GET OUT THE PRO-LIFE VOTE** in key battleground states – _including Ohio and Virginia_ – in the lead up to Election Day.

Our student activists understand good and well that the Abortion Lobby has been trying to conquer the hearts and minds of Virginians and Ohioans for a while now.

They know if the Abortion Lobby succeeds, pro-abortion radicals like President Joe Biden will be sure to brag that they have the momentum heading into 2024.

They know that is something the pro-life movement cannot allow to happen.

That’s why we’re pushing forward at **_FULL STEAM_** , knocking on thousands of doors, making thousands more calls, and – _in these last two days of voting before November 7th_ – doing everything we can to turn out the vote.

**[So, will you please consider leaving a note of encouragement for our student activists to let them know you support them and the tireless work they’re doing to save lives](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjttttd-duchtdja-y/)?**

**[And after you leave a note of encouragement, would you consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjttttd-duchtdja-j/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, your help will make sure the _Students for Life Action team_ has:

**>>>** Visited 13+ campuses on the “Abortion Ballot” tour in Ohio;
**>>>** Planned 20 call nights with 70 volunteers mobilized to make the calls. _Students for Life Action_ has already made more calls in opposition to Ohio’s _Issue 1_ than anyone else;
**>>>** Trained nearly 300 pro-life activists, who have distributed tens of thousands of voter registration and absentee ballot request forms to pro-life voters on college campuses and trained dozens more pro-life activists using the tools they were taught by _Students for Life Action_ staff; and
**>>>** Activated our 25 Social Media Captains who have in turn reached over 50,000 people with the TRUTH about _Issue 1_.
All of this is why our student activists are counting on your immediate support!

**[So, please click here to leave a note of encouragement for our student activists letting them know you support them and the important work they’re doing](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjttttd-duchtdja-i/).**

**[After you leave a note, please consider making a generous contribution of $200, $100, $50, or $25 to help me buy these brave students a few pizzas](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjttttd-duchtdja-d/).**

Thank you for all you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

## [**Send a Message of Support!**](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjttttd-duchtdja-h/)

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Have you felt the pinch of inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgableqb1baopupdf6gt5s2n1038j13c84nmh3go_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In recent years, consumer prices have risen 7% annually—the highest inflation rate increase in 40 years.

## As inflation rises in our country, what are your biggest concerns?
[Job loss / Unemployment](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk9pjqv4reuuarldg9sv0lftkcjmj72jl51antn8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs) [An increase in the number of Americans who depend on the government](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3jdlontvhm28ao4htcrb89319f5isrb8lca8ui0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs) [An increase in the national debt](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0in816r7rvub63a35rcuq6mjb1mnufg36l4cspo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs) [More inflation](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z67o6qosinq27adtudea4t928v957i07dmirrbu8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs) [No concerns about inflation](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ltci11t6etolu9vdbuqa4hoarp5kuiqdd40p9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs) [Not Sure / No Opinion](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc0v094nu0aalkie6ou65jurv0mv9q79t1cus4so_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs)
Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6v6c9fq8l0v1ndui9thebe6c4muae0j3ve81ie8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zua5nmdt3uj9ss2b61gcvtt3m8u6q7djv4kkbce0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgapukj1url8qvutsrkcai8kkuipp7d0qfrudnm8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6cdh2bs)**

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672290%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t99oXV6w07asURF4Vd7W1w&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nMjoR1g%2f%2bjNnGFJ7Ap3MDQ&sysid=1) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource “The Major Characters of the End Times” as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672292%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mmRyj0%2fNcYhf%2fFfWUtVNZw&sysid=1)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Update
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpt7ngkoo77683ie8loelhbb3o0a075vue8h1ib8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z40d30k20enb4vfiih6pvki1nhe5n0m1fnklvgv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. [https://secure.ptv.org/america-is-a-christian-nation-generous-kit-2](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmep813ehbkqm0hvjf4p93vi2bengoln2o3tcr68_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**

Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagrnna09o5e3rn2c5rcabf716ujtjos7jfto8mg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdd5ns6f97tdcnrbq7d3b9o4r3si734isl1m7vqo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp77ibaa0so78kjoa0e8vc2u71pcv35lv8milvgo_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmija8qdcagnrhr1cubmi8vf8t7ns3ma3vsf087o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaq22ceuu95pmsfbovbdj2q8fj13v7sshd447i1g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znaglaf6ju2eua11625mspgqqlbjskdqfi1o7gs8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlg9vhf57ghqa31h03fp4uaieuhn3cc6gk2dneug_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv2fvt1giq8cnv6vqpi67bdamtt527vu3v0kpll8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z495bb0rv6i5co1rolnmhggaa4imbhn6gjisqed8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

God bless,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaratjrc3bqj4tiibu4fnvboqcseoe138j8i49m8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor1clh2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z33a6dfm3igsqt6q7mp7kugi60tc18sdq15ptogg_)

clean_body: When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change. | Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: “This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.” There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--every day --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ps9m2rlibk0dqmnrhb92rmdsjfiu8mhrvrpljg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh80rkcchl94ija3emle37neh6bq8aep5dtvmt90_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0o0skk5oi9vk1taigfdk09ug9gnjoh43luqhfu0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1phr4fknn6o3vmn56btnmm6lamcitbk8eln1p9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6pmsa29kvf3rbr77g5e2tb88nt8uj2vq42b4q98_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpjis6u4oks6sn5aoultm6c46pqbdkk7ne41di60_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3ugo2onitl79trra1tsnqqet3t8qmba0dv2p2a8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shgeaor6c5h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35087%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sko2QBlHAoVp2mAazjTLcQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35088%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eCHphJNlAH14u%2bAgnw33Pw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35089%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SbcoURKiC1W%2brdnIKN97%2fQ&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Action News
subject: Inflation is on the rise
body:
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zps0tm93avq0ovgshrq52nht3ul5ep6f1u3i7048_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In recent years, consumer prices have risen 7% annually—the highest inflation rate increase in 40 years.

## As inflation rises in our country, what are your biggest concerns?
[Job loss / Unemployment](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfurpqnl7eqgb0mvkfqsbva3idrrholvnkrdh6s8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs) [An increase in the number of Americans who depend on the government](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vk1bie3bbeilu0rapbqalgamuo42o8ltb5nlq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs) [An increase in the national debt](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znkgasfvmu6l90ukdq3dgvsh5qha17q572ia8o0g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs) [More inflation](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckuli7vf0hr0jm362u5g6n9emljrt2ebtnsk5j8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs) [No concerns about inflation](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhetn7jj088fs7rac9sdtvkv22o306l8u6gjjld8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs) [Not Sure / No Opinion](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo8kul422r8n61nk6l2bencrfpqeducv5fgqmnno_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs)
Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zahi1tlak4brh0rr5sj38u5ihnouvpprb1nclps0_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z28kiqear3a1r36ipiqegqhqjh7bd86s4um05r4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm0djtbsdh40ffaat5piqqkq2bn17vbbgj0h7hn8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shge9oj1clh2bs)**
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBCJGpiNn

Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are
they in conflict?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBCJGpiNn

Hi
Friend,
One of
the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of
socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want
life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness,
happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of
socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is
equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other
or are they in conflict?

In this
25-page commentary, "Created Equal", legendary economist and
Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions
in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he
wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of
Independence and how the meaning has changed through American
history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates
differences between equality of opportunity and equality of
outcome.
With many

clean_body: Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict? Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes. They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict? In this 25-page commentary, "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome. With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality. Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c472738e0f34e26b780b1362a65f0147c7983e2359e5390c72ea0b519483e346d0ae7538ac2c2c4e7414907a6aa22d46674ae73a0dd9c559533f6794977b1700

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Your America
subject: Have you felt the pinch of inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35096%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LHA71v2ZDi1TcXXBcPW4RQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In recent years, consumer prices have risen 7% annually--the highest inflation rate increase in 40 years.

## As inflation rises in our country, what are your biggest concerns?
[Job loss / Unemployment](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35097%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DAJSd3QK72Oi7lOEEuAvyQ&sysid=1) [An increase in the number of Americans who depend on the government](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35098%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P58u7abUIGhswIOCmHsnfQ&sysid=1) [An increase in the national debt](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35099%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o8BvM6284bv%2fUm550usqAg&sysid=1) [More inflation](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vR4FG0CzphSucD0zLJncUg&sysid=1) [No concerns about inflation](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X1JeL%2bo7NiWEA%2f%2bmlMSgkg&sysid=1) [Not Sure / No Opinion](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e7GMn6%2fRclItySx9C9Rabg&sysid=1)
Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rP%2bYtVhfeAlhk5nTXDa%2f1w&sysid=1)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rP%2bYtVhfeAlhk5nTXDa%2f1w&sysid=1)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35005%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rP%2bYtVhfeAlhk5nTXDa%2f1w&sysid=1)**
---

Your America News
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DKAXN0QyRL3DobjlyTa%2bmA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35094%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GNLl3uUJE71BmbarMn40AQ&sysid=1)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35006%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tcw3nbC2CFJKJYH4mRWMDQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35008%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cfg%2bTv%2f1V5f6C9QCLRuogQ&sysid=1)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oDcmfC4o1khxYtaAbdsLxw&sysid=1)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nH89kK6%2bgfuAXgc%2bxDtoqw&sysid=1)

God bless,

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35003%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=06ixQr4SFBaJacHxTQ3ODA&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35015%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DOn50xwqlX%2bZeeI7ZH5JZw&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9553%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=wBTJDafQGZ%2bI7KGP90PFCA&sysid=1)
clean_body: When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change. | Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: “This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.” There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--every day --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law - I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |
