name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans – this is Mike Johnson.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrlhv31hm6bj6ma5e40e1ssss90ev6mroisdn70o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z810qun0pm3mgeq8h0kcrclm0188t6pe5952kh7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj1sfuvpt7kmio97hn606s41aepn2thsjit6gi6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrc7b67e2ma28484kmimpr37t73osbcrvjap3k8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6rairjnlrsg2g42tvrtkjfihe01p36cahfr4mg_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm2881kc3p15e2dba2b8qtlsfc7lmkmc2gsrsuk8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmrvkjn10k0qeka1fbbu9l515q06d4pbg4hb6tm8_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpgcfe8712492lhk2q9uo6kqjo8ljda95pl5laho_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbbsk3loeftdlp18umfcunvgd0njkdp7keib01o_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnlhets0v9b8adna2q850q70hbf4rdpqqu1v4ng_rp22sh2s8i66p74shie6ob6cth2bs "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab493d2825884408ad63bf7f1f882581&_e=po09G8BEb6vM0Eh-PTbQl9d6m7Pb2cPjOtKGjALpg_kHF2wTxUAZZSGlddePKaeaS1CquoAnkMwKw7FCXWgyrMuP81QzEkPkNBVnIcPc72KrBASEcHjhyL36NKOUgW4jLD9RYQKRUeEy6aHsBQoX-KZIa0LyAtj6nNc7TkptnQU-vNtS4wTa95u400LpRsLwf2Vvfrho1zHWYKC7bUmwVbzfXkrPjMRjH5n1jmV3tiw4h78wssSbp5sFvqtqAFr9SCETRqRrFeNMYfecY4-cFKxEeKovLIIJyj9zFm1nJjTANn6mjfD7aEpQKJgXXGTm). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab493d2825884408ad63bf7f1f882581&_e=po09G8BEb6vM0Eh-PTbQl9d6m7Pb2cPjOtKGjALpg_kHF2wTxUAZZSGlddePKaeaS1CquoAnkMwKw7FCXWgyrMuP81QzEkPkNBVnIcPc72KrBASEcHjhyL36NKOUgW4jLD9RYQKRUeEy6aHsBQoX-IaMN26E4toWSy-Y09QnKc-Q1olEEpHGJCL-vHCnsmaqJMBx4WXgZSZWmD8q3pzxEDUtzQCVIDr6npIZJATLMCu6nIzAw9TTuUaX5dK-Op2hFNH2T76JDojTLFXXiMvFq04hTILoJtJPGP5PVpF_7ijp_V9qUD0JgqeEETY_GJIJ) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab493d2825884408ad63bf7f1f882581&_e=po09G8BEb6vM0Eh-PTbQl9d6m7Pb2cPjOtKGjALpg_kHF2wTxUAZZSGlddePKaeaS1CquoAnkMwKw7FCXWgyrMuP81QzEkPkNBVnIcPc72KrBASEcHjhyL36NKOUgW4jLD9RYQKRUeEy6aHsBQoX-M6H8j0Bv8jLnHLQmY6uL7e7HUqDv1pOTcE-MqHfAh5O94fi3B84EUzmZ_6zKDop28-s675ibaeVExKB9jQhsdCNODnzYwc7DISj4mt1229IfofIi0LAC2DT1ofUsdRSyzl1ta3ECDkjBSzs0_L4rMVpOGQU1fs5c1WoA0d_nUWm) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69ae2dcd0eba42f3a8202b9ad249a565&_e=4kRZa5Z4GDTL32VfevB8j4HxvtZkoIS5WNva3cya-GchFEZvRL6AiE2Y0mMvVhjDW2uvrGajksQoNX1O0eQbS4i95DfnuF-913MNIz6OeqCrKwyo6gIHJK53UDYzC-gDm6B5_vSpUFMcVPKZf1FtQYB1ibGKuuiJBzpRvYCXK4Bi0pNY1DcrW6bV4GVBb-M7X3H9M9o9mdnlNQjpYpgv88Nz09e0E8HrydfXkYU5ghAPqrGAn_BuYvxUW7UtiuY5Z2Cr6cz1MQmPsdEOpNur8TtEOjup2KRM23YYuRqaYL6PNw1HOFWpM6bZm8Um7cVhXDXb4Mom5ji8EH7uBYO1F4-yYLdXPFKEl7cLvDD2N3g4mVza9chpX6-5wM0P3LTuoLErmYrAr2qMspqPPxjED3I8HzaWsXYZ_T2IHHpuT3cFY3d3GJLJZbxEgMwvmRlG)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69ae2dcd0eba42f3a8202b9ad249a565&_e=4kRZa5Z4GDTL32VfevB8j4HxvtZkoIS5WNva3cya-GchFEZvRL6AiE2Y0mMvVhjDW2uvrGajksQoNX1O0eQbS4i95DfnuF-913MNIz6OeqCrKwyo6gIHJK53UDYzC-gDm6B5_vSpUFMcVPKZf1FtQYB1ibGKuuiJBzpRvYCXK4Bi0pNY1DcrW6bV4GVBb-M7X3H9M9o9mdnlNQjpYpgv88Nz09e0E8HrydfXkYU5ghAPqrGAn_BuYvxUW7UtiuY5Z2Cr6cz1MQmPsdEOpNur8dDCUnQUs7QURdsj7kzrZRPSzm83yj5cmCAE-EYahjHho9idktpYAsPYUlLboFEMpoDyjdQZGqVosD6J2DM7oHMDFWM33r5YF731rpDgL5C5w1BTXysFmCDjY4aSZMqS2P128ECXoah7FckFOWouH57iuvkwDVKhuM4sqhkBmxNW)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69ae2dcd0eba42f3a8202b9ad249a565&_e=4kRZa5Z4GDTL32VfevB8j4HxvtZkoIS5WNva3cya-GchFEZvRL6AiE2Y0mMvVhjDW2uvrGajksQoNX1O0eQbS4i95DfnuF-913MNIz6OeqCrKwyo6gIHJK53UDYzC-gDm6B5_vSpUFMcVPKZf1FtQYB1ibGKuuiJBzpRvYCXK4Bi0pNY1DcrW6bV4GVBb-M7X3H9M9o9mdnlNQjpYpgv88Nz09e0E8HrydfXkYU5ghAPqrGAn_BuYvxUW7UtiuY5Z2Cr6cz1MQmPsdEOpNur8dm8IL6pZIBG_V0jTm3DHumGXKGC0POgD5prZ_pyQiEBw2JijwcwAu54xPmkCb343OYgrEOxkZfHi1GcFkaaYzXTiC2qYCV8iyEhBoUx3E7A5_ZFL29fLQPcnHWHKtAjpN0OQU7vhbHicpCPWGZ0dUurMcRAvI87tqBbmHj9IhEz)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69ae2dcd0eba42f3a8202b9ad249a565&_e=4kRZa5Z4GDTL32VfevB8j4HxvtZkoIS5WNva3cya-GchFEZvRL6AiE2Y0mMvVhjDW2uvrGajksQoNX1O0eQbS4i95DfnuF-913MNIz6OeqCrKwyo6gIHJK53UDYzC-gDm6B5_vSpUFMcVPKZf1FtQYB1ibGKuuiJBzpRvYCXK4Bi0pNY1DcrW6bV4GVBb-M7X3H9M9o9mdnlNQjpYpgv88Nz09e0E8HrydfXkYU5ghAPqrGAn_BuYvxUW7UtiuY5Z2Cr6cz1MQmPsdEOpNur8f8J6tE5kwyDs6V9ZrZ85n2HNMh6rQeWLOYa3l8x8NMHQmP6fa4NOSOz5UwIvhnNDD2z3HlMgr49x97Z9Ntie5SccCuiKes27fk1oERcRNmWT7-Uof7IChyqk8WNGpU-DLy7xNNPxVFkTQQUZ9yY0I1p6ulwJA0rog6RMTnYVo7h).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7534a5b83b304085b9a019dbb8d96150&_e=VSNr3_44wZ8S4Df_RJ-Zz6zFK1hkZaqL89Cxxo8HUBl_HlS15mPpTS_ZdHZX3Q117WEPGGxqb5JxICFOJva2ghPj-4MunzUkGDB2GMtbv5YR2jNJVIFQ_dj9IEQv01E6GVR3pWE17RypOOCStx7aLn6vSwTHFzXWF6NrcjT-JYbkfF-PwhqTInT-XqFxpKxjVwxwM0eO5yeT9KySTDBwHEMmwBAX6F0jeELkc7jZFJ-BjFk7hbe8Q3JWI6-XEOOZ_Cgrr_hjswdXY1nonrxgfsJyD1ToKduHcIRZFJSHYoC867NU5eAD3i0tJLfo-svwyPwxs5A3jjuEq7jv_E7NH-bZIg5SxsswtAiu1r1nZG2Nei7SBFS7TCLGQeTUV68G6pc9TkUL95dplviu7u-04A%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _" This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren."_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We 've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7534a5b83b304085b9a019dbb8d96150&_e=VSNr3_44wZ8S4Df_RJ-Zz6zFK1hkZaqL89Cxxo8HUBl_HlS15mPpTS_ZdHZX3Q117WEPGGxqb5JxICFOJva2ghPj-4MunzUkGDB2GMtbv5YR2jNJVIFQ_dj9IEQv01E6GVR3pWE17RypOOCStx7aLn6vSwTHFzXWF6NrcjT-JYbkfF-PwhqTInT-XqFxpKxjVwxwM0eO5yeT9KySTDBwHEMmwBAX6F0jeELkc7jZFJ9ASODnI222VdFAcAuSuuWF3pwCxCr2IZA2BuFK9Ou6r6f-5K_mDG5YV_9Fo-t7bBbOLsAF4gxPKSIxm50I6hVuo9ydInRjFqpRehBFCFjdq1wm1NgH-cbo8lyhHlVUS7L0I2_XU3jo6eY610IbDTpqIKbXXXZLt-ARwBUhgdZs-Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change. | Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: " This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren." There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--every day --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I 'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**

Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ebdd200d8e14408add0692d2a62ba33&_e=P91WtZNmQuKj-AG0Mu95sVcZw-phxZIWAYVyEq3Sigxxx_nvBKjPkG42x1AXVyD269aDhFkDZ-gWsAV6DWmL1Cep36XEHxmd6l6QQJw75zQYUNMo8XxkpUsYMGfSJJ2lWvagoxLA3Z31bb1s4yTlymWvu5o9hp0cE17vmJvMcF63zp-BV2CSMVY62_bcAdD2LGAHgY-Sm7n3hmudFnaqDmfX51xsLSUJ5r35SW2R2ATB-ExCDvEcQheprzFho3PI1ih0ZkhmYkbWkOe1RET07uXoeQyLuoNkJ1KiHaFXqYdQs2HCEFRJkzY06xh0JrBu). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ebdd200d8e14408add0692d2a62ba33&_e=P91WtZNmQuKj-AG0Mu95sVcZw-phxZIWAYVyEq3Sigxxx_nvBKjPkG42x1AXVyD269aDhFkDZ-gWsAV6DWmL1Cep36XEHxmd6l6QQJw75zQYUNMo8XxkpUsYMGfSJJ2lWvagoxLA3Z31bb1s4yTlyvfLdwGAAG3UllerOkKIdqn8__WiAVUDiiiCmaViKzsXnE--lwSTUm1oGvXSZXQKNeD6aYIEFlGBRQipkutu0KQ8rICvx-BFjYAtI3t42L-RdDV4fA_NcTy78mhVNUzfIJkunlq_gdUhO_A5Tg-kjyC1Pwsa4c_GZIVglti_KSmK) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ebdd200d8e14408add0692d2a62ba33&_e=P91WtZNmQuKj-AG0Mu95sVcZw-phxZIWAYVyEq3Sigxxx_nvBKjPkG42x1AXVyD269aDhFkDZ-gWsAV6DWmL1Cep36XEHxmd6l6QQJw75zQYUNMo8XxkpUsYMGfSJJ2lWvagoxLA3Z31bb1s4yTlyjtVn1v8Kj87-sCOUDvzCeSnVv-SAO2S_w6ngB1C7--DB_9nuiuJX0diLyT-AaxbrSIac7oePKq11wXQoSfs9z3CTjuUbZtLP9U4CfI2RZW3CslAfKgwFhvcYFw8_y8WzQykraVx7bE47DaZX333s9EMlx6v4Xm4W23evXFTLFSE) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e44a02a59b043aeb11f890d6372c11f&_e=tJD5JMnlAFXZupQ96x52QazdvFAHwJP6WN7PWVBA301dzUxdeodlyeX0R2v5Swcj0gNxiVT__3wuVD96CO_JCAKTAk4-UaGEYIh1Rl2zrAvxyiJme_g_IT_wDjDMADSPR3dl-_HcpZ9uoQumTEcyhJGGH7lTdBMPimx7NKTNkcNZrfz9rP-0QaLX9TKnMkPZlDcz2SKR63-phnpMPDSW6EGj_kbqedhkQkUffFAAiwrsn15py7OdozbeW26v9DkY7XGs09WL_lh8kKY30UMwT8usQWYwS3glfUDu9h7V8d2G3nLPPjOUskmNI6e4_vCugJO_Nu1x3NehrsuReIG-e0z1b1RbX8EW_--O97yy08A7U0GkwYbuufU5xB9sQJ8eKdgCJgJu_RYrdnIMi-wBqCD8Ihl0eUfwXMXucTeEF3hwslNxVo22zfRa50eqX0Mz)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e44a02a59b043aeb11f890d6372c11f&_e=tJD5JMnlAFXZupQ96x52QazdvFAHwJP6WN7PWVBA301dzUxdeodlyeX0R2v5Swcj0gNxiVT__3wuVD96CO_JCAKTAk4-UaGEYIh1Rl2zrAvxyiJme_g_IT_wDjDMADSPR3dl-_HcpZ9uoQumTEcyhJGGH7lTdBMPimx7NKTNkcNZrfz9rP-0QaLX9TKnMkPZlDcz2SKR63-phnpMPDSW6EGj_kbqedhkQkUffFAAiwrsn15py7OdozbeW26v9DkY7XGs09WL_lh8kKY30UMwT5upoOna40Z06LDBVv-XnsnUVZpMh9VYy1ppHhNEAIB90ycztw-3b1NTRI9rwfRvEEI0K5oVuxaeb5uVE1HjA94kbmBXx-ezbmNYABT3qcdmh57Z6Za-KXsPVuRO3TJxpwNLOIpEuet9ZRz_w9VOnoCcYYjPt_9pMJJmdqlbCkhO)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e44a02a59b043aeb11f890d6372c11f&_e=tJD5JMnlAFXZupQ96x52QazdvFAHwJP6WN7PWVBA301dzUxdeodlyeX0R2v5Swcj0gNxiVT__3wuVD96CO_JCAKTAk4-UaGEYIh1Rl2zrAvxyiJme_g_IT_wDjDMADSPR3dl-_HcpZ9uoQumTEcyhJGGH7lTdBMPimx7NKTNkcNZrfz9rP-0QaLX9TKnMkPZlDcz2SKR63-phnpMPDSW6EGj_kbqedhkQkUffFAAiwrsn15py7OdozbeW26v9DkY7XGs09WL_lh8kKY30UMwTwkL1myXpxK2c_tVhyEDRR3JCIjEN2lU9Vy5yfG7j6slDXZ_nQAgIDdlKf_IGxQevSHo8rmBchx2ca1tfO3Sor_SC0X3DJv0rVns-qlNBj9WfxxkESc0jjyY4swa_wzBPVd2yHZzFmFw2bST5le1GY1uTO-rMUYEg1ubAISHMfaJ)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e44a02a59b043aeb11f890d6372c11f&_e=tJD5JMnlAFXZupQ96x52QazdvFAHwJP6WN7PWVBA301dzUxdeodlyeX0R2v5Swcj0gNxiVT__3wuVD96CO_JCAKTAk4-UaGEYIh1Rl2zrAvxyiJme_g_IT_wDjDMADSPR3dl-_HcpZ9uoQumTEcyhJGGH7lTdBMPimx7NKTNkcNZrfz9rP-0QaLX9TKnMkPZlDcz2SKR63-phnpMPDSW6EGj_kbqedhkQkUffFAAiwrsn15py7OdozbeW26v9DkY7XGs09WL_lh8kKY30UMwTw5nfODYH74Fzrw1Sl9WxTWagbes-T2-78KKppP_4-i--K8mMaPdw4WuHhSF364OZX-NSlYf-BPDMnQdjY7neareudCvpWTLX_xcTXf6_knuy8rj7JsPepZXjfGFydHJGJRb3R23QtyMyScBa9K5ep9fG6cOgq8o2cDyO_W4fw-W).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=8e44a02a59b043aeb11f890d6372c11f&_t=wsZ9G4DR1p50UmzwgZJ87CSynBN7LI9mnUmfhWGSZ_0XvLnsox9HDyJ99-TqDDDrSFfuPFnMkCsKv91UPm5H_NVbBFVmL2Z5gFVNnWtKgXNaQdc6qG_kqyAc6bB8ooz9C1eaPoefWwGVe6FFBJnuSaXN3A8cXDjEhxRxvMj7I5A%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a31c1a12db64616a431fbfa6473aeee&_e=Tj9wgZhjbYKNAuTMoeb7hgmucRlpmtwL2u5SVljc9DqcRnw9Z7ffUqa911F9Mn0H3OBDp6-PkFEwcY7GGK_xXTw23Do7Yjd0p7yIC3pnfoliI4COqCucFHQtcEBgzXR-MQRfdXFMbdQFKxivUZ4PWrUNyc1bKo0B9q8zHd8JZH0lTIEwSgDUxVSvGUKsRD_EgbZNlwLqCEYXSqLnhJey1RkcdDqyavhDF2uNL286nuRaiTm0x8bfhiSGVG3er0douQvXbXWV63NwcJXX6TtYy6_izkJ4WbF4v7IezmxwyupgVL2vqMDMpoHi0uWqbHWX) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a31c1a12db64616a431fbfa6473aeee&_e=Tj9wgZhjbYKNAuTMoeb7hgmucRlpmtwL2u5SVljc9DqcRnw9Z7ffUqa911F9Mn0H3OBDp6-PkFEwcY7GGK_xXTw23Do7Yjd0p7yIC3pnfoliI4COqCucFHQtcEBgzXR-MQRfdXFMbdQFKxivUZ4PWgiEqy7xjuNEnGm192XIZ0-kjudGw2UcZ60P6OjPnmnoz_cHZEQsISLjooruS_VP7Zyx1J-mTqBEWks1t-cw4VVjcn3Tf2AFR66VkgpNYC5zbuPlT0JZsGgwqMf65LvJMAEICWCJsquprj6w1kB_iUq-4F2YG8pHez64XucZVtyQ) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a31c1a12db64616a431fbfa6473aeee&_e=Tj9wgZhjbYKNAuTMoeb7hgmucRlpmtwL2u5SVljc9DqcRnw9Z7ffUqa911F9Mn0H3OBDp6-PkFEwcY7GGK_xXTw23Do7Yjd0p7yIC3pnfoliI4COqCucFHQtcEBgzXR-MQRfdXFMbdQFKxivUZ4PWq4hYexKFDK-5nO8UwAZ1ssRfish0OO9zLYDq-4RVwYI2YGhWJ7bq5S7nClPuXqrTBwJ_LkuS3vVHvhbM1h9hnCl-RYjGvbaDbrvuFyzo9f23x_dwQeHftWN4wFBQr6j9k_8rrd-DuO8Yd0DmAoVL5w4VF7lCXU_FShOUZDQSdoC). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a31c1a12db64616a431fbfa6473aeee&_e=Tj9wgZhjbYKNAuTMoeb7hgmucRlpmtwL2u5SVljc9DqcRnw9Z7ffUqa911F9Mn0H3OBDp6-PkFEwcY7GGK_xXTw23Do7Yjd0p7yIC3pnfoliI4COqCucFHQtcEBgzXR-MQRfdXFMbdQFKxivUZ4PWjL6567KJyiySfuPtc4p_81ff9H3I_SUYz16HYz4tRI9TFRqUJFUPOVEAE2aSUR2GQ9kMiKrqCuybCRF7Cwr5U5RuLhC1Su7XS2Yr-rGl9AvuCsCkgVPGb629Mdr6yXhEBNEw03GeALRdMiWv7yuqTpo5Bcq_8kCiQLk08KEeUfr)

A Minnesota congressman with little national name recognition is
shaking up the Democratic primary after President Joe Biden has had
the field largely to himself since April. Dean Phillips, the
third-term congressman who represents Minneapolis’ western suburbs,
launched a primary challenge to the incumbent on Oct. 26, and has
cited the need for alternatives to Biden in [...]

VIJAY JAYARAJ: Africa Doesn’t Need Western Elites’ Meaningless Climate
Policies

African priorities differ from those of Europe and North America.
Among the Dark Continent’s most daunting challenges are poverty,
malnutrition, lack of healthcare and proper education, unemployment,
inferior transportation infrastructure and underdeveloped technologies
for energy, information and communications.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=032e400b1ea740fca930492259294fb0&_e=luZFA092yrBO9vWuZYo_0T3GE35aaTsbzEOP9Glk-V3HPGaujz8K1KPZjsFtBHPu9kKRydasGk1frpIiPIJRwx7xrVVTewY_OaMZwpPvCYfgV8xirvL-IKrTatN2hUBhzuP96lPQKcNn9IC-SPGeM8-X5NoC1rhcZUh_whC_Cx7JOPge84CN62a0tbN09Jo1gwqQj3JP-jkD4rVXBLn47EmXC0sBWfwxfzN77S5bcA6dTmp5_oNeNqw8ZGmcmoHxgpUTdmkMAsJ9NjOt5_L--Dmihwb7ZtwWcTC62R5ZJjdye-bodKrAQhQbDimkv2EIiI5blvMoAB3pqyrKcL2IcWRX_AG13XYM5PacIve57U_o1bTuB6DDIRC29jeVSyOPkZ7cyKNrNGyTIWxSXf4GEXDuoa-tv3Xj3vnk12f7koA%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0haBrWuGA2azUWyVH3APu_7iOrpCWOpmWJz8Xh6mZWFiSbDneCx-OwkHbNRukEcU0sp9Ej8oQDD7MqeIqrovLaFiIgmEZsVjHxa63qNtTK1yfmphAJjlRuOK108-rF-OngLZbv3uluoQAJGmw4sTOoxaqZKtXVQJtuhdokNelEIYrQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _" This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren."_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We 've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hYb2hCQ8KZZUizsXG8IY7b4Me2UnFIdXkO8Yiqogsn4ZB265MQi5elhysMCh8N-2XjOuGdD_WiAkqMjCi8TaM28LFh7VffA-G_GdRkUtpm1PUfJXraNJaQKEziLAYamlfn-RozwsNyBPSILpe7cuLMQdak7aJLl7lcSDUhi4uj3-w%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hYeLogMNQ9gJ1m7ll9Gya8GH_R9T0ku4VN0xwPAvsve7qxB8gfqxAIL83jsK4PY5F0NY3p7C6wfF0cw_LXFZAYR4sIo-YcfsrbAErUnHU4FFlcmq2dvaT-ahgtGM5sGf4nBGv1AuNVHrbPp1xoW1J9M7UX3r_JHSAICJazNs9gNfQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I 'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I 'm asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hZgk3ld4_D1Zu16IBn7kdbEKKDabSP11LJ5n1JB6g8FOwhiiipWF2n1LlzN08Q-2cun_66haeDjfVnv_htD7xGFYNhrwpZ3RTPvpzbVPA7run22N1XlbJf_UqyFJnwVrF_uNmkq9iBW3pYx_3iET6DgkymUm2tmluUW7YGUUkKRTA%3D%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_**[** DONATE > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hY3zSToyitsXIcLB4ScWLHWtUfSa-nDCEuuKO_LWBd_Tbc7pcqQhn9VAG9EMeqlcrbRajw5FmWxyCi73IFrMdqvFEqd69Hsoqjbmw8TO342lA7_BhaLYhAqQd-j5Do5U449ugbtgiB2IWEKvI6CQ6ZLATedefyug4xg6kCIHew1Yg%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0had2t5YuGRapcerBpLzGYabr99PurkgDuBy1EvATSkDalCv3d8LiKH58xtOgG6Z3lGbegFAJxbHSjXc-qVVP-bnNSjIyhiCCz581uLKmKSVfPpeIYZR8Y13kD_b6jC8smXNl7e0wu_5qP_2rFQG6xnXKiAw97EcwKJt3vLeldiWyQ%3D%3D)

God bless,

[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hanqYfNRtmyBAoxYjb_nT-0INsgoBAGRV88MyvB0Oop-emYowRjhzcrprECDhMpjiuTsTY8rHXSXhUKxDbsHGm8S5itoVMtDxVvGZBpzZ1HTw3-_dW1xnARXbePhdAK-RpgxgoGLAIiiEAd5C_loGA-1yVQqvC0QkOBLrRH-0blQQ%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b7c3f2e2fae5442f8cc3880701f337c9&_e=Tvb6ynGx8vtHMJoHsRDMs7HrIWVmAhuiv2hm0Yad-Jhq6DE-_hB3ufCuLl06jklWXmNMieqBaYMYETEBASTS6azi9DW_tw-FeMpattAJ-1jSvruLUliaI81H5F7lelilpGZu49zi5FXAD2_pR8BHF5gIH0-S4_d2gaXh3fAJ_khyvSX5xT8q5OAcMfAuLoGJllehEjHdGeN-dY7kWLYF7xzi1zwrfrfF0oU48bCC0hbNdCE_Sl6FJQxM01r7YkOo3I0sgXyRbUiwUFuDW-28CRzrsCkElwlcWxe2RmY31UcEXaYGxU6SPS9t5jELQFHFLvVRo4X_NbMPq5N3_jg1az-aVCWrCwV6rP2ZeOUoTVTJHMG84_LH-OW9UqvdROFqYzgTtKvuflz9da8DAT6-hQ%3D%3D)

subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd4c2525f244e35966018dee63e0627&_e=2SGl4Z-ulsfhNNETsVvNPagdDGztUb217AUTNP1kw2b7CcCjO5PDXXn9SknkUqsV_ydhb1si82VUZLDk_A7kz00b5OwklDNXbXLuUDpa7nKz6T7SLcwvo2ZwT5zlGtHHmncD4XlWxC4WiCjmRfyobI-QGbHlt1hFMl0O0MPAboDakYVLKLG1wyJCLZuWNMlc5NF-KJkVC0o2UndlfNfkx_Ll7ccSq81CbHpWDDHAU97Far9BpX21ZACS9tvxcSxjUeIKe0VPAQc-GjwRJ9yU3jj5OXrk-oLOSa77hHQ2xn9Vknfv_p-LaGANcgIuNlBvt8210o181lkMbM0RRwd3CtZddyLsNASvCocFvRrB6vh-1coRv4FOSsJRcFrOg78yG9NyeV3tcVJi8keGNauboZ-6hOS4yQC3BowEyy1hN97jvnVMdQvdAU9eNZTqkyhB)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd4c2525f244e35966018dee63e0627&_e=2SGl4Z-ulsfhNNETsVvNPagdDGztUb217AUTNP1kw2b7CcCjO5PDXXn9SknkUqsV_ydhb1si82VUZLDk_A7kz00b5OwklDNXbXLuUDpa7nKz6T7SLcwvo2ZwT5zlGtHHmncD4XlWxC4WiCjmRfyobI-QGbHlt1hFMl0O0MPAboDakYVLKLG1wyJCLZuWNMlc5NF-KJkVC0o2UndlfNfkx_Ll7ccSq81CbHpWDDHAU97Far9BpX21ZACS9tvxcSxjUeIKe0VPAQc-GjwRJ9yU3soWdZzR-P4roG6yXDXxdlaWeOqZx1oDrDlMlLDnR9HkPFFQSSR9P0abSU_aGW5R5eEV29d_DByLtdOpW5rNK5ZQbaEdT5ivQ8s3jWa5noenNR69X5hK8-tjpTgGz9vO0QQ-5qpODRPptpsUzv35io9jgGiH-qbN7nqGotywA0RM)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abd4c2525f244e35966018dee63e0627&_e=2SGl4Z-ulsfhNNETsVvNPagdDGztUb217AUTNP1kw2b7CcCjO5PDXXn9SknkUqsV_ydhb1si82VUZLDk_A7kz00b5OwklDNXbXLuUDpa7nKz6T7SLcwvo2ZwT5zlGtHHmncD4XlWxC4WiCjmRfyobI-QGbHlt1hFMl0O0MPAboDakYVLKLG1wyJCLZuWNMlc5NF-KJkVC0o2UndlfNfkx_Ll7ccSq81CbHpWDDHAU97Far9BpX21ZACS9tvxcSxjUeIKe0VPAQc-GjwRJ9yU3nnjxJILvle5LE1v3jhX-Z4djFocRcLNaKX0_XgtR3tif8ghN5OjISsJpAkvOhwDnthvxYxy6cWx7yIdO9qtbh3UKGxVE2pJhPQ8PvD4SyoNPcoTFhi5_e9IffSxYr0F9vyrCcH1vhSkftShcLQe9AOHFZbRyKX8WAV7hWg5vzEi).

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0d1fe24014e40eb92b77be552b905b6&_e=0jZK4GrN9Ppa6oV9Uz186itR23xRDGU84VtlDhg-AdxoyNbWry3DwGJCHLc7OGoNyHs5Gy0WFpgv_sn8AEfNJbCi6_1Wh2OhNPlEz0PUCdWXI4AKt0tr8_hY5Y7BJkYKxuzKin3KZw3Or0M1JJVIAwaSiHpe10wr2-cxxkOwfYKGuWWpdwkjiI1BYcIX2O_zTJY-jV4YpU4aYs7tHBXZWrMCrVsDtCtYS05DcNzi3T6ckWiJOKR7j-cTpb18U9ESA-j_gXZSje34hjnSULHqK8xlqBOe-B8BDnkLwHtAcUw6ORpYYnHQq8B6nz9OmPhIlsR-jfA940bknWrsdi-Oovnc3FVUqBu8SczR-KfmeeJM1COGSm3BGlTI6KyGCKaHxG62b-hMajHrg-znh1VRDEXZr01J-bC4KqDdwfJAKSthMiQ9Kes0K9-cIXSgPh0-)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0d1fe24014e40eb92b77be552b905b6&_e=0jZK4GrN9Ppa6oV9Uz186itR23xRDGU84VtlDhg-AdxoyNbWry3DwGJCHLc7OGoNyHs5Gy0WFpgv_sn8AEfNJbCi6_1Wh2OhNPlEz0PUCdWXI4AKt0tr8_hY5Y7BJkYKxuzKin3KZw3Or0M1JJVIAwaSiHpe10wr2-cxxkOwfYKGuWWpdwkjiI1BYcIX2O_zTJY-jV4YpU4aYs7tHBXZWrMCrVsDtCtYS05DcNzi3T6ckWiJOKR7j-cTpb18U9ESA-j_gXZSje34hjnSULHqK8xlqBOe-B8BDnkLwHtAcUy_gYIsoiMGRk_DnlenIa2PhVyuedxKq0V-5hO9DRjUdiuApo2TjvGSDSm6ATdzP1bhNso9lG6TQDa16yMOjJEsOvVaejT1tgKx9iWc_bd_OVGpVIIDnbLtLsgXndcL1OQsnllXlbvlT4pVb5uGm-MO) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0d1fe24014e40eb92b77be552b905b6&_e=0jZK4GrN9Ppa6oV9Uz186itR23xRDGU84VtlDhg-AdxoyNbWry3DwGJCHLc7OGoNyHs5Gy0WFpgv_sn8AEfNJbCi6_1Wh2OhNPlEz0PUCdWXI4AKt0tr8_hY5Y7BJkYKxuzKin3KZw3Or0M1JJVIAwaSiHpe10wr2-cxxkOwfYKGuWWpdwkjiI1BYcIX2O_zTJY-jV4YpU4aYs7tHBXZWrMCrVsDtCtYS05DcNzi3T6ckWiJOKR7j-cTpb18U9ESA-j_gXZSje34hjnSULHqK8xlqBOe-B8BDnkLwHtAcUxC2WcvO6a-RciGk1kffbse2Dr0ZOGJx-i2kM_gOBv3sj8o948ZQu8hq1gYVBglMt81MF_rtc4_7i_-ggQmOh8XsSldr3b42h2-ms29yD2_U8U8rU4yAqgIpGgagrwLqnyXL1SZN8CCCWTiT7nh4NZu)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

Hey friend,
Mark your calendar. We've got a big day ahead.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f388e5dc589efedaddf711ae2c09db5f25a1b683209deb32e2acae38cf83455af880970032f9a8360bfce094bbdc7fd1610b6764197f376d3f

Ron DeSantis is hosting a campaign rally in Des Moines, Iowa tomorrow night at 7:00 PM ET... and if you haven't gotten to experience a Ron DeSantis campaign night yet, this is your chance. YOU'RE INVITED TO TUNE IN.

COMING SOON:

Our supporter's Live Stream Link to Join the Big Night

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f388e5dc589efedaddf711ae2c09db5f25a1b683209deb32e2acae38cf83455af880970032f9a8360bfce094bbdc7fd1610b6764197f376d3f
MORE DETAILS

You've heard the news... Ron DeSantis has visited almost every single county in Iowa. This state is one of the top places you can see, feel, and get fired up about how much momentum this team has. And you can experience it all with us tomorrow night.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f388e5dc589efedaddf711ae2c09db5f25a1b683209deb32e2acae38cf83455af880970032f9a8360bfce094bbdc7fd1610b6764197f376d3f

Right before Ron DeSantis heads to Miami to take the stage at the next GOP debate on Wednesday, we will be hosting one of our most exciting events yet tomorrow night. With your help, we are going to put on an incredible night.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f341ff82075d683872ec389d2a5dec8df53ad3314fd05ed499ac8cb56331fdf5baeb61b3351f8fe147d16d510dc875cb7a47a173f1f2b4aaa3
RUSH IN $25 BEFORE TOMORROW

We want you at this event, friend. Chip in what you can now and we'll send over your link to LIVE STREAM the rally tomorrow night! Get ready for something big.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f3ca7f66e261dcba76f650c56e95893459535fff3a7f7bfaff5b0d0db4ed6dfede23a83df6818ed2fbb1f0fcc504e3d9f52811285f9af308e9

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f3a0f0db908616b5f62c7e8f372832de3ed2496cb59f6e0a01c080e1206dbf0e56e79cdef328c03d0ce64acb17e69a4e46d48e416647478816
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f3940dc48f36b05585a7342269a8a7a71cfeaaf7915daeee72c912a1aea83067371c0cf18dcb7e645669a8ffa96af7eec875ca5d5223117684
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f388e5dc589efedaddf711ae2c09db5f25a1b683209deb32e2acae38cf83455af880970032f9a8360bfce094bbdc7fd1610b6764197f376d3f

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cd96c4c8c77491f388e5dc589efedaddf711ae2c09db5f25a1b683209deb32e2acae38cf83455af880970032f9a8360bfce094bbdc7fd1610b6764197f376d3f

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RKRmMBPermC7kM1FeifahA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnKliOP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEwNSZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZUUGnUdl-KbC81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RKRmMBPermC7kM1FeifahA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnKliOP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXNvdXJjZXMuaG9vdmVyLm9yZy92aWN0b3J5LWFuZC10aGUtc2F2aW9yLWdlbmVyYWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249c2F2aW9yX2dlbmVyYWxzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEwNSZvbGM9NDM4OTNXA3NwY0IKZUUGnUdl-KbC81IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: James Carville
subject: You need to see this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10?source=em231105-zm-tb-split-90do&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A)

You NEED to see this:

**The "Ron Johnson Playbook"**
_— NBC News_
Wisconsin’s Senate race looks quiet on the surface — but that’s exactly what the GOP wants you to think.

In reality, **TWO megamillionaires** are making the rounds meeting with Senate Republicans’ campaign arm, hiring top GOP strategists, and pledging to spend up to $20 million of their own personal wealth to defeat Tammy.

I like to call this the “Ron Johnson playbook,” announcing late in the cycle to put off personal financial disclosure for as long as possible — all while being propelled by a personal fortune.

All of this was part of Republican Ron Johnson’s winning strategy when he challenged Democratic incumbent Russ Feingold in 2010. And we all know how that ended...

**We can’t let history repeat itself this cycle, FirstName, which is why I’m asking you to get involved NOW by supporting Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign.**

[_Will you split a donation between Zak Malamed and Tammy Baldwin to defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and defeat George Santos? Right-wing megamillionaire opponents could jump into this race at any moment, so we need to be prepared to fight back._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10?source=em231105-zm-tb-split-90do&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em20231105-tb-split-el&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A) [Split $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20231105-tb-split-el&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231105-tb-split-el&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-baldwin-split?amount=10&amount=30&refcode=em20231105-tb-split-el&refcode2=564_8507_-EPu8A&akid=564%2E8507%2E-EPu8A)

Thanks for stepping up today.

— James Carville

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09f528268e3b41149746a23635cf0200&_e=DpzuqU3NHIkQbPh_yfOwOFzNJ_iqJSOCIhaeMZx7z89M6uwNaTYZ39usbvOnjeoookhmWQZcfGMqcNoM4xnQRe7qowk84ET3_BYe1oqCgekhT7rjTL9zv6zmv8cDjvcDIQfkgUEAMwCayn0NM-91kBOlwW9C1YUwNm2ZXQDHhmJebb-FmZVktgIZd-Vdozf-JbWRqX_q6BxdSY1ORx4vznrZ7O2M_xY96Yhuecc0y0khovjc825h_n7TyCfYEu0DS2bqgD-ZSxJ1UX3Zl9I_jLP-fuTFrVwwi5ZmYMtKnOFG0pXblMmqFWFxqW7PJLRKJsWr9PbtzytXkSRrPCxQvcXU8SgUzmNcWrRIct5HPV1HhjWbVmH8TxXad3gr-Zp6Sgys0yWKuUkvdwiiK_RLmYJNLr7pIeuD2tAhbNNJMXezwY8nyStwaYPX7lqZN3Sq)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09f528268e3b41149746a23635cf0200&_e=DpzuqU3NHIkQbPh_yfOwOFzNJ_iqJSOCIhaeMZx7z89M6uwNaTYZ39usbvOnjeoookhmWQZcfGMqcNoM4xnQRe7qowk84ET3_BYe1oqCgekhT7rjTL9zv6zmv8cDjvcDIQfkgUEAMwCayn0NM-91kBOlwW9C1YUwNm2ZXQDHhmJebb-FmZVktgIZd-Vdozf-JbWRqX_q6BxdSY1ORx4vznrZ7O2M_xY96Yhuecc0y0khovjc825h_n7TyCfYEu0DS2bqgD-ZSxJ1UX3Zl9I_jHTvYaBFexl5JGpwonQBqW5o9uVkNgYtmZyYkrnbVe5KHbwKnz8Ew7-Bc2P5Y_OOe7Lv-tADS_9zNEcnd9CO8S_jrj_JS2YpP3eboJ43Do20ttsWr6GZwjOjjhuTyERCuqqLGGWSX4qnluqlyptln9VgnPkJPk78KyTaV9m4TVm3) I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09f528268e3b41149746a23635cf0200&_e=DpzuqU3NHIkQbPh_yfOwOFzNJ_iqJSOCIhaeMZx7z89M6uwNaTYZ39usbvOnjeoookhmWQZcfGMqcNoM4xnQRe7qowk84ET3_BYe1oqCgekhT7rjTL9zv6zmv8cDjvcDIQfkgUEAMwCayn0NM-91kBOlwW9C1YUwNm2ZXQDHhmJebb-FmZVktgIZd-Vdozf-JbWRqX_q6BxdSY1ORx4vznrZ7O2M_xY96Yhuecc0y0khovjc825h_n7TyCfYEu0DS2bqgD-ZSxJ1UX3Zl9I_jNYitjO2AsbSvKfQ4PY7c5OkZtcde3F697ZzkzT7M1gUgg-05aGW1_tAm_kQRYUeoOwkUkky0FZ4LDlnEFTz7N497Y0nqJyGQSiq4rbyCHxQuQLz_HTLODIZZlsZog_pUMuwhrZw8VzLTxRoI_S8AL6-J41Ok9sWOecEVlPCZvzd)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=09f528268e3b41149746a23635cf0200&_t=icXjARxvIMAP9SL_v2CeQV_2UrNUUFDfOfBpW2_CouFIY3D0U8TagOZrRHdrlnLNyU45tXvO93GbfJsk1-XPBtk5bf6GUr9B_H6wlZ5jjFW0MpA0kChycq_2xdU-B707QxUZC3J_PJ0kqjs7UxnfV3gVRaAIOANHZF7cM5dEoQg%3D)

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: I just set an ambitious goal Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | |
Friend.

I'm honored to be the 56th Speaker of the House of Representatives, and I can't wait to get to work! Together, we will fight back against Joe Biden's reckless agenda and enact common sense conservative policies!

To ensure that we start off strong, I have set an ambitious goal. _**I need to add a record number of new donors to our team as quickly as possible to secure a Republican victory in 2024.**_

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I know God is not done with America yet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsFvu-piNa

Mike Johnson for Congress

It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of
God.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osFvu-piNa

Friend -
I know God is not done with America yet.

It's no
secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our
nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created
equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the
government.

The
founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national
identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and
morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so
many American households through the generations, in our house,
we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and
serve people.

I know
our country is in desperate need of prayer.

Today I
am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our
nations, you'll join us.

We cannot
allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was
founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up
for our Republic.

STAND
WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON

God
bless,

Mike
Johnson
Speaker
of the House

MIKE JOHNSON

Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a
constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career
to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values
that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?

PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

clean_body: Mike Johnson for Congress It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. Friend - I know God is not done with America yet. It's no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. I know our country is in desperate need of prayer. Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us. We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic. STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House MIKE JOHNSON Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, November 5th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdJ3RiZrFUtRExJnxpDQb-ezKnUW77e8uYwJce8LeSLxwmxtrWQnSC1nyJMgfWfB7ij2j1qERcw-KtCZparyCREdQhyPbkcQ_NynkCn3yUCD9kHY_Sf2fZArshWrAW75dcJ4rEgUrDhtVGK5Xj3SJ4TaOoFTx2FER667ZKQpxFDAm64M48IAbmHfOhBrIGbPnhXUkwSA1awpBYvVS7qdIooEjQtImHVAHqmH8vD_NZAaUKq9cY8PNZxS2VJNJbSUsRI8Tu9WEkvYSIewobfHwi14tHX-lYbzB1FRgJWUXEbv5LAfIzC0SqkiJv4dP1Ck6AGiBtiXEwQJPtPKirxDh2_yuom4WCSoVwth4pB3ZJC8eA/411/61-FIS11RGWFrAPDXoqWmA/h0/ASHOYwdUeHEcbbK7QWz3lHNgmTM8_gpJRrH06Y1StHY)
---
1️⃣ **_Presidental Spotlight:_ President Biden and President Obama are using their platform to call attention to Tuesday’s elections in Virginia**

Last week, President Biden laid out the importance of these races in an email to grassroots supporters, writing **“in Virginia, the stakes have never been higher.”** President Obama is encouraging Virginians to cast their ballots: **“Now is the time to make our voices heard.”**

[Follow President Biden and President Obama’s lead and chip in to rush resources state Dems need to win in Virginia and beyond this Tuesday →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpWF9cu_jvmU2XoLCpRVJVcgannR5-erMpj21WSSgTabwYV0XL2evpFBd5mAR9UEuObT8gGhxrVMrq75WhhKpu_pXKplKUMabcnzXy8SKRjo7i9cEzNh2oFEvJArHDCRXQiRl6oyGZJch7aWGx-VADFdkZSGSOYThEWQMgnkb7rMKfFy73c0K4ps_OizIdGkNPI8iMHW7KEcjn8adJyhJ3EiJu1W-6Y1PlwyDFkh99Cqdh5_XX2WnDQjakxM-67BGA4QAwOt4NkFZHJIiCaD33-NzAjKUIPohg9dzUDT97MK7r2zyt5mTnymeiEOe9JzX_U7hzEG1_8hfol1E3wT1LJHHrBjFWRS4y7qSjIKFz46ew5xtJBOMOTiJmG7f0JkMS-qxCbRQ3DXBCVbzZxS2ScVoEQdMyPBitZ6uHoyDvfYmFiZLYY-RtB09VbZKIF1fXS84B7bzR8qrKkGYjd9fk9g/411/61-FIS11RGWFrAPDXoqWmA/h1/B_PO0JnyQdDHEvT81sjEnAHj_nyQnsbl818d5j8HUw4)
**[DONATE »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpWF9cu_jvmU2XoLCpRVJVcgannR5-erMpj21WSSgTabwYV0XL2evpFBd5mAR9UEuObT8gGhxrVMrq75WhhKpu_pXKplKUMabcnzXy8SKRjo7i9cEzNh2oFEvJArHDCRXQiRl6oyGZJch7aWGx-VADFdkZSGSOYThEWQMgnkb7rMLCZ_jK4AUcOFoPY5ebcfL85DBYVVAvV9k45W62KY7ZyqoeKZamka_zhHrRe1grSf7Zo1PSzVeIoVzH5Um1sN14G8QQpvYAe6RMYLoAUAV7FqijdXah4Er6hyi14-OHsqdrOYrYMR97SkHdz7xg-CcXQNMzg4vnmmDCThZfqKtuC8iRXciKa8b9XQfoGk9GvykUVOjsJxilibaO-RFuw83HmOtTNDQR3w4YsjUwCskRudnckDzpy9Pyr9uvrmyt-3x6z5X1IU7jUuZnWfZlbFTbunYWB_tnKJA4BvbhSU2M_g/411/61-FIS11RGWFrAPDXoqWmA/h2/Diwyfxsi1o2PS8c2DaqZIt-N1ByX-6ERXW17gTjy7B4)**
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Thousands of voters cast their ballots ahead of Tuesday’s all-important elections**

This election is a chance for Democrats to BLOCK a Republican trifecta by **defending our Senate majority** and **flipping control of the House.**

[**The result of these races will have major implications for abortion access, voting rights, and Democrats’ outlook for 2024 →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EOSj-f2GB18S5Jyd3qa9145ekFN2vGp0QjFbg6eO6yIzGXIDq9d3R_l1BNKI71jb8ywwV5IlMCZrQBFeFMDFjChyKXFTaAobNbxhmr8ypOE22awzxgCYS56CyH_BANAeIZTSpA1D1SGNTKMlpV_VvfkwfCWIx13NtlF5V1iYwzLs8cKqIlpvwZ5qMJhxbBiuZLjjLdZBYDGD1stX6qPZRycUt12AlOrMeQjXELtkCMgZ6BlSOc4MSdhqK2EmLQXYDZviUHrQ-L8zhXN0nwNCGZycDEW7b-XKRJPtqAgRlcy0MlIa0B-_F_9xe4SMFHTW36gD-tSyGj8TlRgOBdrbeIGmvKo1gJFoL5Fe0g5UCvga2hvYtry5KRDXcT9OcOPn59nxpGC3_SFzrCRhlNGkQffojb4Yk1roJz3Sd4UQ9Hr7CRsKlVwR2JHPydc1Hzc4Lz3fcLQdgTY80a_v2qv9LV53HY9M2QDtnvlFTwSy-WmQqliOUfDs7vA-1qIz9_zLHXtu0zMYvWGb_F3nIpv9LWZ/411/61-FIS11RGWFrAPDXoqWmA/h3/_2S9bu1c4qCOabe71oyrlPHC8RjOPdLO0Wy14K6GxLw)
3️⃣ **_Take Action:_ In these final days, find volunteer opportunities to make an impact**

With only two days until polls close, every single bit of **support could be the difference between the expansion of GOP extremism or protecting our progress.**

[**Click here to find a virtual or in-person opportunity that works for you →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEywA6coC8ezqo4UZCrUYfGRDVy2ihgpexBrZ-OPCW8ev0nHQuIVJ6nJauSOgC5rNvh5l5wUHHpGH4FIr0S35fecDEFqb84gA6uvC2JV0ew_a42uyO3deYUiZKSX6Cwz9i20PmGUFc5ZYAerV01H-Yxgy_yINoSOgGeGJiLZBLj30Zm9Y_y0mZxBTZDsaxdo5mBq10Ghkb9Cwn1JGRqjeXLrzO__6BsafoR0Pk_Va1LftgnlMoPLQxgbeKXqw49QdA5CiRPyhM2FxttzFpJ-yLB9mXvx9kHQhBtUCqo37lZRAXZQXUO_e_vKaVdmtJI7FosZ85q_Eb2hEuYWXBl0_Frazvjx0nnj5qidUx_UlDPOzTQ3Qx2OOqfcHLkFuem_Jz0StlFC4YsmTbc_41TZ5RnF-Vk8krPLoGpVMyhAsVZEb9H5MnqD8n7z2W_vnF8tz60yC5aa_Ubyc6fKSl-bgOXN-U-WOROpmoG6pVyt8lQf/411/61-FIS11RGWFrAPDXoqWmA/h4/IpeqScxKgl1OknZCWAXXX3N3sx4M9qEihOTVXlK6lpE)
**🗳️ _Spotlight Candidates:_ Take a look at our incredible candidates on the ballot this Tuesday**

With key races in Virginia, New Hampshire, New Jersey, and more, we have so many strong Democratic leaders on the ballot.
