clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, November 5th, 2023 | | | | | | 1️⃣ Presidental Spotlight: President Biden and President Obama are using their platform to call attention to Tuesday’s elections in Virginia Last week, President Biden laid out the importance of these races in an email to grassroots supporters, writing “in Virginia, the stakes have never been higher.” President Obama is encouraging Virginians to cast their ballots: “Now is the time to make our voices heard.” 2️⃣ Virginia: Thousands of voters cast their ballots ahead of Tuesday’s all-important elections This election is a chance for Democrats to BLOCK a Republican trifecta by defending our Senate majority and flipping control of the House. 3️⃣ Take Action: In these final days, find volunteer opportunities to make an impact With only two days until polls close, every single bit of support could be the difference between the expansion of GOP extremism or protecting our progress. 🗳️ Spotlight Candidates: Take a look at our incredible candidates on the ballot this Tuesday With key races in Virginia, New Hampshire, New Jersey, and more, we have so many strong Democratic leaders on the ballot. ** | | ---|---|--- ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: November 5, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s a little crazy to think about.
#

Hola mi gente,
I realized this morning that Election Day in 2024 is one year from today — November 5, 2024.
It’s a little crazy to think about to be honest with you.
Back when I had to sleep on the floor of the apartment my mom got for us after my dad left, thinking I’d be here was something that never entered my mind.
But when you hit fast forward a few decades, I was making my decision to run for Senate. When I decided I was going to do it, it was to take back Arizona’s seat from Kyrsten Sinema. Replace her with somebody who would show up for the middle class, for working families. For kids like me.
Hit fast forward again, a few months this time, and Kari Lake jumped into the race. And all I could think about was being on the floor of the Capitol on January 6th. Ready to defend my colleagues, to defend our democracy. Ready to fight.
We’ve got to beat both of them, Peter. We’ve got to kick Sinema out. But we’ve got to save our country from Kari Lake, too.
It’s too important. And one year out, we’re at a critical bellwether. An important benchmark on our progress to victory in 2024.
[**So today, one year to the day until Election Day, I’m asking you to make your first donation to my campaign. Make it for $3, make it for whatever you can afford. Anything helps here, and when lots of people chip in it adds up fast. That’s how we win.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231105-1&t=1&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-nov23.aZOhHW&refcode=em231105-1&t=20&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Qbnb2l&refcode=em231105-1&t=21&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-nov23.vL6Lqu&refcode=em231105-1&t=22&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Vx4UJF&refcode=em231105-1&t=23&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-nov23.qoudqp&refcode=em231105-1&t=24&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**

| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&refcode=em231105-1&t=25&akid=1408%2E734936%2EPrzBmN)**

This year’s going to go by in the blink of an eye. So let’s make the most of it.
Thanks a lot,
Ruben

body:
by voting on Tuesday
| Team,

The countdown to Election Day is on, and the clock is ticking fast.

With our reproductive rights on the line on Tuesday, there’s no doubt that this is going to be a historic election. It’s guaranteed to be not just a pivotal day for our great state, but also a moment that will reshape our entire future.

**[Can we count on your grassroots support to help us get out the vote and make history?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72820848/436516224/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231105_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTE3ZDg5Yy1lOTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZMd4CmYscBVlq2w4GeUXnfHD1Xr_PsESzSTNPem1_w=)**

Republicans are going to extraordinary lengths to strip away our right to make our own healthcare decisions. Dark money is bankrolling their anti-abortion misinformation across the state. It’s time we push back by ensuring that every eligible voter is ready to make their voice heard.

Bodily autonomy shouldn't be left up to corrupt politicians. The power should be in our own hands, and our own hands only.

**[With your help, we can change the fate of abortion in Ohio for generations to come! Can you help us mobilize voters and make sure that every Ohioan is ready to cast their vote by donating $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72820849/436516225/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231105_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTE3ZDg5Yy1lOTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bZMd4CmYscBVlq2w4GeUXnfHD1Xr_PsESzSTNPem1_w=)**

Thank you,

Ohio Democrats | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. clean_body: I just approved this ad to run in the FIRST TWO STATES! [WATCH]| | | | | Patriot, I first decided to run for President because I couldn’t stand to see weak and incompetent “leaders” destroy our country through endless wars any longer. That’s why it truly breaks my heart to see Crooked Joe – the weakest and most incompetent president in history – ruin our country as he pushes America to the brink of World War III. To remind Americans that our nation can be STRONG again, I just approved a new ad called “STRENGTH” that is now up and running in the first two states of the Republican primary – Iowa and New Hampshire. If you can’t contribute because of the very weak man in the White House who’s abandoning our citizens at the expense of globalist special interests, please just watch the ad and be reminded that TRUE STRENGTH will return to the White House very soon, and we will Make America Great Again! | | Thank you, Donald J. Peter, I can’t believe we’re here.
**We are officially ONE YEAR OUT from the 2024 U.S. Senate election.**
That’s 365 days until we **fire Tim Kaine** and **TAKE BACK our Senate majority**!
I’m so excited for all we’re going to achieve together, but before we win next year, we’re going to have to put in the work.
**[Will you pitch in now so we can celebrate our victory on Election Day in just one year?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=6a94a988866e464dbc3faf492338544f&_e=46xGLSvy7CeLErwZi8qm6cKfkl1WEjwAij86JJhoW2cUlVuC_w93BpQsu6x6yYUGfhHlogIb8fQfWhqu08SizUKXtRY6b5LNjMtjc78R2LCKdG6_qdUwHkBYdqrA7ygWhnkPVN3e3rRvGaboWTgtfOGUcPIaEdU9mnkKzr6zP3kavaFmoFCqbB9pVrw9gzO9faJNuc47KH_P7dBthGC3WCEwMzOKy-qAuhhdXc1b03sOSIRAi7eLYbGSF6W6xThXFdCSZisAATC_25b1kfMTpffTYxlBpxgu9xoCNxD32nFl5DdARU6uJSh7YvGxBqUgVlP_GcfFcxzzQ2gBl7bbLSPrfn-rq04cdWlq_VniBos%3D)**

On November 5th 2024, we want to be able to wake up and say we did everything we could to win this election.

I’m doing everything I can to ensure we can WIN not just for our Commonwealth, but for the whole country.

There’s going to be a lot to do in these next 12 months, and I’m going to be relying heavily on my grassroots team.

From getting ads on TV to recruiting volunteers and giving out yard signs, campaigns take a lot of time and money.

clean_body: Can you believe it?| | | Peter, I can’t believe we’re here. We are officially ONE YEAR OUT from the 2024 U.S. Senate election. That’s 365 days until we fire Tim Kaine and TAKE BACK our Senate majority! I’m so excited for all we’re going to achieve together, but before we win next year, we’re going to have to put in the work. On November 5th 2024, we want to be able to wake up and say we did everything we could to win this election. I’m doing everything I can to ensure we can WIN not just for our Commonwealth, but for the whole country. There’s going to be a lot to do in these next 12 months, and I’m going to be relying heavily on my grassroots team. From getting ads on TV to recruiting volunteers and giving out yard signs, campaigns take a lot of time and money. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. clean_body: There’s no room for complacency. | = 🚨 ELECTION DAY COUNTDOWN ALERT 🚨 Peter, this is important. Mark your calendar for Tuesday, November 5, 2024, exactly one year from today. That will be the day we retain our Democratic Senate majority, take back the House from MAGA Republicans, and re-elect President Joe Biden. = In 2020, Unite the Country helped expose the lies and disinformation spread about President Biden with award-winning digital and television ads. Now, we need to do it again, but we won’t stand a fighting chance against Donald Trump and his allies’ massive war chest without your support. The 2024 rematch between the MAGA movement and President Biden won’t be just another election. It’s a historic fight for the soul of our nation. Abortion rights, democracy, the freedom to vote, social security, healthcare benefits, and everything our country stands for are on the line. Over 80 million voters unified behind President Biden to defeat Trump in 2020. We can do it again if Democrats start early and overpower the GOP’s dangerous movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, my first message to grassroots conservatives
body:
It is the honor of a lifetime to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House.

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1uqzAQhZ9m2AUxYxuuF17cNnJXlapWyd7Y42DVBAokEW9fhabdzs93Ph3XjznF1UDzBERdCjMQgfgPRJdFHN3h8DqtO1rfdi_qSKf7kp6BaFlH_rt8QEruXcr3abMvgpHkMPqCDdZao66VEkVnNPuoSIl_ElvHESWR0tGjJ1cLyVwkQxUJxEqhqlDJ0ssQ6xhQhyrKllqQ1RZUxol56dL5k6fgUl5LP_RFNt2yjPMmZoHsENryfPGZL_PPlx96IPtQBrJXIPvRciPez9f-BsJuJYj91zDO9S1jMZkw3lLOaa4bkNXpl_IdAAD__6rNYEg) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kD1vgzAQhn_NsQXZZ2zw4KFtRKdKXZIdfwWrBlxsFPHvq6S063t3zz16hynF4HcF7SsgjsFmQAT2AohbYdfhcvlY9xPun6d3fsXbY4hvgFj25P43D0jtpiHER9qeK6saHKg3lVNUSEml4JxVo-o6IbRoByco8b7jhHdUIpeSM6c1k1VQSJBRSjjlhPKmNo31wlsqLfGNRg0NeT6q_epcGcP85VY7hLjXZpmqqMZSUn6K9YD9YnU9bya6Lf9emWUC7A9lwD5vOps1pBKWOQP223wk2gHrn42w8_eSsrhHWq3KpnuIMWTRQkNuf8ifAAAA__90JGWg)

| Friend, it is the honor of a lifetime to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House. I’m humbled that my Republican colleagues in the House united behind me as the next Republican Speaker, and I owe everyone who voted for them a debt of gratitude. It’s a debt I intend to repay by being the best servant leader I can be. The Speaker’s gavel is a solemn responsibility, especially in a time like this when the course of history will be set by our actions over the next year. I relied on my faith in God each day before I was Speaker, and I’ll continue to do so each day after. **Scripture is very clear: God is the one who raises those up in authority.** _**I believe that each one of us in Congress has a huge responsibility, to use the gifts that God has given us to serve the people of this great country, for one simple reason; they deserve it.**_ I’m determined to save our country from the powers which seek to destroy it, but I cannot do that alone.
---
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM-OnyAUhZ_mutPAxT_jwkVbY1dNupnZGoSL0ooYhEx8-wbz62zP-cJ3uNKduzX3AN13QNysvgARxDdATFF8yPf3X-Eu8f5d_mw-cM0l_gDEeJ_0Rb4eqchJu-e0Gws91Ci5UQUNvO173rdNI4ptIDSKet31nZSsb5A4Ga1qIvn2xtmChR2QoeCcNbxhvKkrVWvTGs17zUy94AI1e0SVCURxs8dfClra_a6Ud8U-bDGe1zNsApwuUilQ9WmPQDoTgNPm00Xl6s9ykTHutAafDl2adOjcrouZtT9m72YKs_tTOprDNT-zGHYgJul8OiKIsWGAbciKYI8VxBhDIsA2RTdfPgVFIMYzhlfkSNvkQIzL_0RJd0q7HiDGR5T_nUWvOlLIuIlaFGHQ56fdd3u1HdRsfW6gvPsXAAD__5e_j0o)
---
I’m humbly asking patriots to unite together in our common cause of protecting and preserving the Constitution for generations to come and reigniting the promise of America for every citizen of this great country. **[Right now, I’m focused on getting Republicans back to work on the promises we made to voters, but I also desperately need to boost my fundraising so we can not only maintain, but grow our conservative majority.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM-OnyAUhZ_mutPAxT_jwkVbY1dNupnZGoSL0ooYhEx8-wbz62zP-cJ3uNKduzX3AN13QNysvgARxDdATFF8yPf3X-Eu8f5d_mw-cM0l_gDEeJ_0Rb4eqchJu-e0Gws91Ci5UQUNvO173rdNI4ptIDSKet31nZSsb5A4Ga1qIvn2xtmChR2QoeCcNbxhvKkrVWvTGs17zUy94AI1e0SVCURxs8dfClra_a6Ud8U-bDGe1zNsApwuUilQ9WmPQDoTgNPm00Xl6s9ykTHutAafDl2adOjcrouZtT9m72YKs_tTOprDNT-zGHYgJul8OiKIsWGAbciKYI8VxBhDIsA2RTdfPgVFIMYzhlfkSNvkQIzL_0RJd0q7HiDGR5T_nUWvOlLIuIlaFGHQ56fdd3u1HdRsfW6gvPsXAAD__5e_j0o) **
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM-OnyAUhZ_mutPAxT_jwkVbY1dNupnZGoSL0ooYhEx8-wbz62zP-cJ3uNKduzX3AN13QNysvgARxDdATFF8yPf3X-Eu8f5d_mw-cM0l_gDEeJ_0Rb4eqchJu-e0Gws91Ci5UQUNvO173rdNI4ptIDSKet31nZSsb5A4Ga1qIvn2xtmChR2QoeCcNbxhvKkrVWvTGs17zUy94AI1e0SVCURxs8dfClra_a6Ud8U-bDGe1zNsApwuUilQ9WmPQDoTgNPm00Xl6s9ykTHutAafDl2adOjcrouZtT9m72YKs_tTOprDNT-zGHYgJul8OiKIsWGAbciKYI8VxBhDIsA2RTdfPgVFIMYzhlfkSNvkQIzL_0RJd0q7HiDGR5T_nUWvOlLIuIlaFGHQ56fdd3u1HdRsfW6gvPsXAAD__5e_j0o)
---
There are dozens of highly competitive battleground seats that we must win in 2024, or Hakeem Jeffries will take the Speaker's Gavel and immediately go back to business as usual on January 4th, 2025. **Saving our country from the Radical Left is not a small task, and it will require an overwhelming effort from grassroots conservatives from every county in every state.** [**If you’re able, I’d be humbled to have your support.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM-OnyAUhZ_mutPAxT_jwkVbY1dNupnZGoSL0ooYhEx8-wbz62zP-cJ3uNKduzX3AN13QNysvgARxDdATFF8yPf3X-Eu8f5d_mw-cM0l_gDEeJ_0Rb4eqchJu-e0Gws91Ci5UQUNvO173rdNI4ptIDSKet31nZSsb5A4Ga1qIvn2xtmChR2QoeCcNbxhvKkrVWvTGs17zUy94AI1e0SVCURxs8dfClra_a6Ud8U-bDGe1zNsApwuUilQ9WmPQDoTgNPm00Xl6s9ykTHutAafDl2adOjcrouZtT9m72YKs_tTOprDNT-zGHYgJul8OiKIsWGAbciKYI8VxBhDIsA2RTdfPgVFIMYzhlfkSNvkQIzL_0RJd0q7HiDGR5T_nUWvOlLIuIlaFGHQ56fdd3u1HdRsfW6gvPsXAAD__5e_j0o) _In Liberty,_ Speaker Mike Johnson
| **Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee.** **[https://gopbattlegroundfund.com/](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jr1uhDAQhJ_G7g7Zi21E4SI_ulSR0tz1Zr0LVsyPwCji7SNQlHbm0zcTxiUnPrxoXgXAkOImAET9IgD2Uj_D4_G5Hjc4vm4f9gn9WcKbACjHQv_kn6SiMaR8ps27jN5A0IySvHZtq1tnbS0H7wiN7RRa1J02zAoR2VKjuEZHDDJ5UFBrray2SltToYnsOOo2KjYddMKoa6jilagMafqmNYaUjwrnUWY_lLJs17G7gHs_L10oJVO_zvsUeZ_iyQm4y9XH5SflnDbXCKP6S4rz-BsAAP__gwBUZQ)**

In Liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee. | |

body:
We're one year out from Election Day, and while that may seem like an eternity, the days will go by quicker than you think . We're not wasting a single moment here because too much is on the line.

Imagine this:

- Despite poll after poll showing Bob Menendez losing in the general election to a GOP opponent, after spending millions of dollars from his campaign warchest, Bob Menendez ekes out a win in the Democratic primary and heads towards the November general election.
- After watching the primary election play out and seeing Menendez take the nomination, Mitch McConnell and his PAC send millions of dollars into Jersey and use everything they have to flip this seat.
- With a tight 51-49 Senate Majority going into Election Day, every race is now called except for New Jersey, and it's looking like Jersey's Senate election will determine which party controls the Senate.
- In the end, Menendez loses by a few points to a McConnell hand-picked MAGA opponent, and Democrats lose the Senate.

But then, you jolt out of bed today and wake up realizing it was all a bad dream, and you remember that we're one year away from Election Day and we can change the course of the bad dream by working hard today and helping Andy Kim win this race.

The only way we'll win, though, is through grassroots power and early investments in things like voter outreach, and that's why we're asking you to join us today.

body:
ZERO room for error
| | |

Friend, the 2024 election is just a year away.**And our Senate majority could come down to what happens right here in New York:**
Last year, NY Republicans had their best election cycle in DECADES. They drove one of the only red waves across the country, flipping enough House seats to help retake the majority. They've already committed to spending MILLIONS to win even bigger victories in 2024. And now, they're directly targeting Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand.
Kirsten is facing attacks from all sides as she fights to flip these House seats back to blue and defend her must-win seat. The MAGA extremist who nearly won the governor's race last year has even hinted that he may run against her!
With our fragile Senate majority on the line, there's ZERO room for error. **But right now Kirsten is projected to fall short of her $50,000 Save the Senate goal! subject: We’re going to send Josh Hawley running (again!) next November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
He’s in a *statistical tie* with Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
#
Peter — Josh Hawley is the fraud who raised his fist in support of rioters outside the Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door like a coward. **Since then, he’s made himself the most unpopular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election in 2024.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38861?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38861?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN)**
**Lucas Kunce is the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.** He’s on a mission to fundamentally change who has power in our country — and his message has already put this race in a statistical tie with Josh Hawley.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38861?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN)

National Republicans and corporate mega-donors know Lucas is a serious threat to their grip on Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. So now, they’re doing whatever it takes to slow our movement down — like launching a new GOP Super PAC with more than $1 million to spend on their desperate attacks about Lucas.
**If we’re going to send Hawley running and flip this seat, we can’t afford to lose any of our record-breaking momentum.** We have to keep exposing Hawley as the fraud he is and getting Lucas’ message in front of voters all across the state. And since Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, we’re relying on your help to make it happen.
**[So Peter: will you chip in $10 or whatever you think is best toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce right now? We have a real chance to defeat Josh Hawley in 2024, and your investment in our campaign today could tip the scales in this neck-and-neck race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38861?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38862?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38861?refcode=em20231105-4124&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4124%2E614464%2EVF6RBN)

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, If you read one email today, make it this one. My name is Maria Elvira Salzar. I’m a five-time Emmy Award winning reporter who took on Fidel Castro toe to toe on live television. My parents immigrated to America from Cuba to escape the horrific communist Castro regime. We didn’t always have a lot growing up, but my parents ALWAYS taught me how important it was to never take our freedom for granted. Our story is the same as many families in America - through hard work and faith, we were able to achieve the American Dream. Because I am such a fierce defender of liberty, Joe Biden and the far Left are determined to defeat me next year. I’ll be blunt: if we lose this district, we could lose the whole House. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Aiming to raise $20,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Election Day is exactly one year away
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=772%2E135344%2EGeqbZr)

Friend --
If you've been thinking about making your first online contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for U.S. Senate, today is exactly the right day to do it.
**Today marks exactly one year until Election Day, and our campaign has set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 today in order to show that we are ready to flip this seat.**
You may have already contributed to Elissa – thank you! – but here is why we’re pushing now, a year out, for support:
When you contribute early, you're helping our campaign make strategic planning decisions for the months ahead. That includes things like reserving TV advertising and digital advertising, ordering branded materials such as yard signs, stickers, and campaign literature, and making staffing and hiring decisions to put us in the strongest position possible to defend this seat.
Since starting this campaign, we have visited 25 counties, met thousands of voters, and attended hundreds of events. We’ve been doing the work to introduce Elissa to voters across the state and hear about the issues that really matter to them. But we have a lot more work to do over the next year – and now that we have two serious Republican candidates in the race, with potentially more entering, it’s more important than ever that we continue sharing our positive, affirmative message with people.
Elissa doesn't accept any money from corporate PACs, it is the response that we receive to emails like this one that help fund this campaign. [**If you're looking to make the greatest impact possible for our campaign, we hope you'll consider adding a donation today to put our campaign in the strongest possible position for the year ahead.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231105-1-30&t=2&akid=772%2E135344%2EGeqbZr)

clean_body: Election Day is exactly one year away Friend -- If you've been thinking about making your first online contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for U.S. Senate, today is exactly the right day to do it. Today marks exactly one year until Election Day, and our campaign has set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 today in order to show that we are ready to flip this seat. You may have already contributed to Elissa – thank you! – but here is why we’re pushing now, a year out, for support: When you contribute early, you're helping our campaign make strategic planning decisions for the months ahead. That includes things like reserving TV advertising and digital advertising, ordering branded materials such as yard signs, stickers, and campaign literature, and making staffing and hiring decisions to put us in the strongest position possible to defend this seat. Since starting this campaign, we have visited 25 counties, met thousands of voters, and attended hundreds of events. We’ve been doing the work to introduce Elissa to voters across the state and hear about the issues that really matter to them. But we have a lot more work to do over the next year – and now that we have two serious Republican candidates in the race, with potentially more entering, it’s more important than ever that we continue sharing our positive, affirmative message with people. Elissa doesn't accept any money from corporate PACs, it is the response that we receive to emails like this one that help fund this campaign. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks for all you do to help keep Michigan blue. Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We are one year out from Election Day!
We know how important it is that we do everything we can between now and then to hold on to this seat, take back the House, and get our country on a better path forward.
We’ve got 366 days—2024 is a leap year!—to build our campaign, get our message out to voters, and turn them out to the polls for our race and other important races happening across Texas. That means knocking on doors, distributing yard signs and voter literature, making phone calls, sending postcards, running ads, and so much more.
All of that takes money, so today, we’re asking you to contribute $3.66—or $36.60, $366, or whatever amount makes the most sense for you—for the 366 days left to go. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231105?refcode=lpfe231105]

Thanks,
Team Lizzie

subject: re: AOC vs. AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As Israel continues to carry out collective punishment and relentlessly
bomb Gaza, AIPAC is attacking progressive Democrats like AOC, Rashida
Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, and Summer Lee for demanding a
ceasefire.

But AOC is fighting back and calling AIPAC out:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231105.o-rpB4&refcode=em20231105-31692&t=1001&akid=31692%2E1203867%2E3n0Bhv ]Tweet from AOC: AIPAC endorsed scores of Jan 6th insurrectionists. They
are no friend to American democracy. They are one of the more racist and
bigoted PACs in Congress as well, who disproportionately target members of
color. They are an extremist organization that destabilizes US democracy.

Here at Justice Democrats, we’ve been sounding the alarm around AIPAC and
its dangerous influence on politics and the fabric of our democracy since
we were founded.

For years, AIPAC has spent millions against our movement and our
candidates. We need to be prepared for them to spend big against us again.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231105.o-rpB4&refcode=em20231105-31692&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31692%2E1203867%2E3n0Bhv ]Will you contribute $3 right now help us fight back?

This right-wing group funded by GOP billionaires will attack any and every
candidate who stands up for the human rights of Palestinians, even
Democratic incumbents. They spent millions against progressives in past
elections and are now actively recruiting candidates to challenge the
Squad in 2024.

Not only that, but like AOC mentioned, AIPAC endorsed 109 Republicans who
supported the January 6 insurrection. They’re not looking out for
democracy, just their corporate and pro-Israel interests.

We won’t let AIPAC succeed in pushing our progressive champions out of
office next year, but to go up against them and their super PACs, we need
the help of grassroots supporters like you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231105.o-rpB4&refcode=em20231105-31692&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31692%2E1203867%2E3n0Bhv ]Please, if you can, pitch in $3 today to fuel Justice
Democrats’ work to re-elect the Squad and fight back against AIPAC’s war
chest →

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Will you add your name to personally endorse our campaign today?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I didn’t come to Congress to be silent. I came to Congress to be a voice for you.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)
Friends -
One thing you may know about my story is that I am a refugee.
When I was just a young child, my family was forced to escape civil war in Somalia and take sanctuary in a Kenyan refugee camp for four years.
We didn't always have food, or running water. But we did always hold out hope that one day, we would be able to get out of that camp and start a new life in the United States.
At the time, I never could have imagined that someday, I would run for office in a new country, nevermind become the first African-born member of Congress, or that tens of thousands of people would stand with me along the way.
When I got to Washington, my colleagues and the political establishment told me that I was destined to fail. They said a Somali, Muslim, Hijabi-wearing, Black progressive woman couldn’t enact change in an institution with rules not created for us.
They said that I would fail, and that two years later we'd run again and lose.
But we did not back down. We fought hard for our ideas. We forced climate action to the top of the agenda. We made justice our priority.
Then we ran again, and won. And once more after that, for good measure.
But the truth is, our work is very far from over. The insiders and special interests who never wanted me in Congress are going to come back with more money and resources than ever before to try to take me down in 2024.
**[So I am asking you to stand with me and our movement today. Will you add your name to personally endorse our re-election campaign today? Building this movement takes all of us.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em231105-personal-endorse/?source=em231105-1-t3&refcode2=685.791427.15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em231105-personal-endorse/?source=em231105-1-t3&refcode2=685.791427.15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**
When I was first elected to Congress in 2018, our ideas were called radical:
* 🏥 Medicare for All
* 🌅 A Green New Deal
* 📈 Raising the Minimum Wage
* 🎓 Canceling Student Loans
* ❌ Banning Assault Weapons

Together, our progressive movement made these ideas mainstream. We demanded an economy that works for the many, not the few. All of us — and especially young people — deserve a country that lives up to her promise of justice for all.
There’s no doubt that these ideas have put a constant target on me from Republicans and their corporate allies. The DC insiders and special interests that thrive on the status quo have come after me nonstop. Every two years, they recruit another challenger who will fall in line with their agenda, and their super PACs pump my district full of dark money to try to silence all of us.
They are already preparing to do it again in 2024. But I didn’t come to Congress to be silent. I came to Congress to be a voice for you. For working families. For little girls like me. And for those who have felt ignored or silenced for too long.
Today, I need you to add your voice to mine as we prepare for the fights ahead. What do you say?
**[Please use this link and add your name to personally endorse our re-election for Congress today. I need as many people as possible to stand with me in this campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em231105-personal-endorse/?source=em231105-1-t3&refcode2=685.791427.15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**
It may seem like a small and simple action, but it speaks volumes about our collective power. Thank you for signing on today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em231105-personal-endorse/?source=em231105-1-t3&refcode2=685.791427.15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)
---

**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em231105-personal-endorse/?source=em231105-1-t3&refcode2=685.791427.15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=685_791427_15Nwta&akid=685%2E791427%2E15Nwta)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231105_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20370%2E4449941%2EeWL244)**

---

-Fight For Reform

body:
1 year to save America or let it fall to tyranny.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT-NuYFg_Ac4cOiuNz2k2l4qtbdosIdkttggMIvy7SuibK-_9zR6Pw2GeeTh3on6RQDc2K8CQMhvAuCsXv68m_Pvs83tj-8-t0ar_UjhVQCk-0z_q88rBQXk8aC1zXwHrgHnMuoq07ZV25rGZLfOGFebuvW1IzkMpoUeBqyUdq0h2TidcQclyKoqdaW1krKQpZYE2BsJjaIWhSp3joWfIo7-Iy1bmAs3hWzsbinN62PSScBpJbctVOwcF_JH42D4STkGWthh_jFxTPmwRb8grxyvuZtC4JSIBJyiG0kjAHrloaK-VyDkaUvhEsjzFoS0T19zwHXaFkdCWscXfDKHYUa-RiHtl9NXMsVEMQlpq1IbEGAucWQvpH359TnsSd3f-wd8vERafLv_fMXm7W-2dH7eeRx5NbVQ5fWYcMj9CwAA__-n8Y3c)

Friend,
We are officially 1 year out from the most important election in history.
And if Democrats get away with weaponizing our legal system and removing my name from the ballot, then it will be the LAST ELECTION our nation ever has. Dictators do not willingly abdicate the throne.
2024 will not just be another election about which party controls Washington.
It will determine whether or not the PEOPLE of our country are still sovereign in America.
**_For that reason, I am asking YOU to take my special survey this month to ensure that YOUR priorities are the driving force of our campaign at this pivotal moment with 1 YEAR TO GO until the 2024 election._**
**[Please take my 1 YEAR OUT SURVEY with 1 year to go until the most important election in history.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX_NcAPB2DjhwKG73uwhVXuoqvYWDfYkmV1sEJhG_PuKKNnr955G79NQGHs5ry3sXgDxKn4GRFDfAPGoX_7-MMc_R5vb7-8-t6bWty3FV0BM68hf1ceVggNJv9GdzXyLbo_OZdxWpmmqpjF7k11bdt6oznhjSHfNGUvdqYYNl5XztT_vMmmxRFVVZV3VtVaqUGWtGKkzCveaGwJd3iQWfojU-480LWEs3BCyvr2mNM73SQfAw8xumbi4SZzYb42N0T_OKfAkjvKPQWLKz0v0E8ks8ZK7IQRJiRnwEF3PNSGS1x4r7jqNoA5LCqfAXpYAyj58zQbnYZkcg7JOTvRgjsJIcomg7NPpmQwxcUygbFXWBgHNKfbiQdlf7_z7c5zHNd7h_SXK0tv685X2b5_Z1PrxJn0vs9mBLi_bhE3ufwAAAP__TbKOkg)**

name: Team Rashida
subject: $100,000 in attack ads target Rashida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Attempts to bully and silence Rashida will not work because our movement for a ceasefire is bigger than one person, and it’s growing every single day. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvsBfu4uMqNRtx1y-zk7tZmIInDTZLRMkpWFiceWb9jWkpBCURBRgnRvxbN-xOenjNUJRolGiT_2xkJJHR-vPVk5aGs_-XRZFB4dTxltvy-HnMY_vCpny6xPYvrVfLhcVepo4ehveRJmZla6JYN54SyYRke3G8Frv5F4dgMWtzUBY/411/XLdutLLlRqaVm6IgjqAG6g/h0/xy12mi3LUOqpiAcDoRlCjZhFi68ZkoxXy1Hr7MKp0b4)
---
Friend, Even as our movement calling for a ceasefire grows across the country, so do attempts to silence Rashida. **Just this past week, a pro-apartheid AIPAC front group called Democratic Majority For Israel (DMFI) spent over $100,000 on disgusting, hate-filled attack ads targeting Rashida, the only Palestinian American member of Congress.** These attacks are funded by right-wing money and use Fox News footage to fear-monger and tear our communities apart. **Rashida is leading the call in Congress for a ceasefire, speaking up to save lives no matter one’s faith or ethnicity.** With one year until Election Day, these attacks will only increase. [**We need to have Rashida’s back right now to ensure she has the resources to withstand these attacks. This is a big problem for democracy.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828295/436543263/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0YWRhNjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mWvBq5IBZbCxTuWq-z3b1QLFfOZMzwzAuWK00Fts3vQ=&emci=a7fc53f1-8c7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=834ada61-f47b-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Hi Peter,
It’s the team of journalists here at _Dogwood_ , a COURIER newsroom based in Virginia.
We’re just **two days out** from one of the most consequential elections of 2023: The Virginia state legislative elections!
[**We’ve been working hard to make sure voters have accurate information about this high-stakes election and the candidates running for office. If you’d like to help us keep providing reliable journalism in battleground states like Virginia, will you pitch in $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828310/436543277/-542558345?refcode=em20231105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0YWRhNjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mWvBq5IBZbCxTuWq-z3b1QLFfOZMzwzAuWK00Fts3vQ=)
The outcome of our elections in Virginia on November 7 will have enormous implications — especially on reproductive access. Governor Glenn Youngkin has promised to ban abortion if Republicans take full control of the General Assembly.
But although the stakes are high, too many communities across the country (including right here in Virginia) don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage on the issues that matter.
That leaves many voters unaware that there’s a local election happening — or even without the good coverage needed to help them make an informed decision on the ballot. **That’s a big problem for democracy. **
That’s why COURIER is so important.
Our Virginia-based team at Dogwood is busy reporting a range of eye-popping stories detailing what’s at stake, sharing critical voting information, and calling out the VA GOP’s lies and misinformation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828316/436543291/-542558345?refcode=em20231105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0YWRhNjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mWvBq5IBZbCxTuWq-z3b1QLFfOZMzwzAuWK00Fts3vQ=)
**But here’s the deal: We have just TWO days left to get our stories in front of as many voters as possible across the Commonwealth.** And because our journalism is and will always be free to our readers, we’re counting on supporters like you to help us get the word out.
[**Will you rush a donation of $5 to power our work in this final stretch? Your donation will help us amplify our accurate, fact-based reporting over the next 48 hours. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828322/436543297/-542558345?refcode=em20231105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0YWRhNjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mWvBq5IBZbCxTuWq-z3b1QLFfOZMzwzAuWK00Fts3vQ=)
**[Chip in ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828327/436543303/-542558345?refcode=em20231105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODM0YWRhNjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mWvBq5IBZbCxTuWq-z3b1QLFfOZMzwzAuWK00Fts3vQ=)**
Thank you!
Dogwood Newsroom via COURIER

name: Kate Ramstad, Finance Director
subject: Join us on Election Night!
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]
Friend,

I hope you’re doing well!

Thank you for all the support you’ve shown #TeamGabe throughout these past 7 months!

I just wanted to make sure that you got an invitation to join our Election Night Watch Party taking place on Tuesday! #TeamGabe will be at The Guild in Pawtucket starting at 8 pm on Election Night. I hope you’ll join us!

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Election%20Night%20Invite.png]

Location: The Guild, 461 Main St. in Pawtucket
Date: Tuesday, November 7th, 2023
Time: 8PM - 12AM

Please RSVP to kate@gabeamo.com or 401-545-0788.

Thank you for your support. I hope to see you soon.
With gratitude,
Kate

name: James Carville
subject: Scared as hell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828397/436543433/-248329306?refcode=em-11.05.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjRhZGE2MS1mNDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FirXdzPHOkIvOR7SJD4jl0gmn0mfbYmOVLNvNkk3sIo=)

Listen up y’all — Carville here.

I’m popping up in your inbox on behalf of my friends at DASS because, frankly, **I’m scared as all hell about the future of our democracy.**

Listen, I’ve seen A LOT over my years in politics, but NOTHING compares to how CRAZY the GOP has become.

Donald Trump, the moron who incited an insurrection against our Capitol on Jan. 6, is the 2024 FRONTRUNNER to be President - AGAIN! And now, House Republicans just elected the guy who led the lawsuit to overturn the 2020 election as SPEAKER!

Election-denying Republicans at EVERY level of government are wholeheartedly embracing the Big Lie and conspiracy theories about our elections.

**These folks don’t care about democracy, folks. They care about THEIR preferred candidate winning, even if they didn’t get the votes. That’s just NUTS.**

Luckily, my friends here at DASS are working to elect Democratic Secretaries of State, the folks who are in charge of running our elections, and will stop these extremists trying to undermine our democracy.

[We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines, friend. Will you rush $3 right now to help DASS elect Democratic Secretaries of State and ensure our elections remain in safe hands? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72828398/436543435/-248329306?refcode=em-11.05.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjRhZGE2MS1mNDdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FirXdzPHOkIvOR7SJD4jl0gmn0mfbYmOVLNvNkk3sIo=)

name: Lose Cruz PAC
subject: One year from today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
We can’t stand the idea of this guy representing us in the Senate any more than you can.
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=134%2E623276%2EV6zKAp)
We can’t stand the idea of this guy representing us in the Senate any more than you can:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231105?refcode=em20231105&amount=5&refcode2=134_623276_V6zKAp&akid=134%2E623276%2EV6zKAp)
**The good news is that one year from today we’ll get to vote Ted out of office once and for all!**
[**If you’d like to help us build the statewide movement we’ll need to ditch Ted Cruz next November, pitch in $5 or anything you can today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231105?refcode=em20231105&amount=5&refcode2=134_623276_V6zKAp&akid=134%2E623276%2EV6zKAp)
We have a TON of work to do in the next year. We’re planning a huge ad campaign to keep voters informed about all the terrible things Ted’s been doing in the Senate, and we’ll be working to mobilize as many voters as possible come election time.
**But Texas is one of the largest and most expensive states to run a statewide campaign in, and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure we have the resources to put our plans into action.**
There’s too much at stake to let Ted have another six years “representing” us in the Senate.
[**So if you can, pitch in $5 or any amount that works for you right now to help us vote Ted Cruz OUT next November!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231105?refcode=em20231105&amount=5&refcode2=134_623276_V6zKAp&akid=134%2E623276%2EV6zKAp)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231105?amount=5&refcode=em20231105&refcode2=134_623276_V6zKAp&akid=134%2E623276%2EV6zKAp)**
Thanks,
Lose Cruz PAC

subject: My Moral Compass - what drives this campaign?

body:
It's the opposite of my opponent David Schweikert

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72829467/436547154/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ0YWM1ZjEtZjQ3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UttpABEiksymHJzNp1pR2SZ3PFqpxauEO8XFHke1pjo=)

| Peter,

Throughout my career, I’ve dedicated myself to public service and helping others. My moral compass points toward the **goodness in people, kindness, selflessness and empathy**. Right now our country has a choice - we can elect people who believe in these values or we can subject ourselves to more **hatred, selfishness, anger, fear, resentment and retribution.**

[_**I’m running for Congress because our nation needs to walk toward the lightness and not the dark. 365 days, friend.
That's how far we are from Election Day. _Just one year._
_**One year**_ to talk to every single swing voter across Florida. **_One year_** to build relationships with the communities who will decide this election. **_One year_** to show voters the truth about Rick Scott. **_One year_** to pull ahead in the polls. **_One year_** to fight back against Rick Scott's attack ads. _**And just one year**_**to gather the resources we'll need to accomplish all of that.**
Thank you, truly, for everything that you've already done to support my campaign. We've made incredible progress, but our work is just getting started. **[If you're all in to flip Florida blue, please chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can before midnight. We can defeat MAGA extremist Rick Scott and save our Senate majority, but only with the help of grassroots supporters like you:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72829468/436547155/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFlZjA5MTAtZjU3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yT4dSlNheT9XsHL7DDm7XFla0AdusOkg7Wg5EzEhmU=)**

Listen, I know Florida is ready to flip blue next year. I feel it in my bones and I see it in the excitement building behind this campaign. Everywhere I go, Floridians can’t wait to send Rick Scott home. I am so, so grateful for every single person who has joined this movement. **Because of your support, we're in an incredible position:**
Election experts have ranked Rick Scott as one of the most vulnerable senators in the country. He only won this seat by 0.12% (just 10,033 votes!), and he's spent the past six years pushing an agenda that goes against everything Floridians stand for. Today, Rick Scott is barely holding onto this seat, and I know our campaign has a winning message. But unfortunately, it's not that simple.
This race is going to come down to cold hard cash — plain and simple. If we let Rick Scott drown out our message with a barrage of lies and attack ads funded by his massive fortune, _we will not win._
**[Early investments from grassroots Democrats will determine the outcome of this election. That's why I am personally asking: Can you rush a donation before midnight tonight to help make sure we don't lose this race (and our Senate majority) because Rick Scott outspent us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72829475/436547177/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFlZjA5MTAtZjU3Yi1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-yT4dSlNheT9XsHL7DDm7XFla0AdusOkg7Wg5EzEhmU=)**

He only won this seat by 0.12% (just 10,033 votes!), and he's spent the past six years pushing an agenda that goes against everything Floridians stand for. Today, Rick Scott is barely holding onto this seat, and I know our campaign has a winning message. But unfortunately, it's not that simple. This race is going to come down to cold hard cash — plain and simple. If we let Rick Scott drown out our message with a barrage of lies and attack ads funded by his massive fortune, we will not win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I don't want to wake up on Nov. 6, 2024, wishing that I had done more. I don't think you want to either. So I'm going to give this campaign my all every single day for the next year — and I hope I can count on you to do the same. With endless gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

A one-year pledge today puts us one step closer to changing how government and politicians work for you. From the very beginning of this campaign, I have promised the **TRUTH.** Here is how we deliver it:

* I'm going to revolutionize the way our government is run. _The people who we elect to run the government are NOT the ones who actually run the government._ It's the managerial class in the administrative state. You cannot reform these agencies. The only answer is to **SHUT THEM DOWN** , and I am the only presidential candidate who has a plan on how to actually do it.
* We have got to change the conversation. Stop talking about Biden and start talking about what we stand for as Republicans. Spouting off poll-tested platitudes about Biden makes us sound like partisan hacks. And that's exactly why it's going to take an outsider from a new generation to get the job done.
* I don't want a national divorce, and other candidates are pushing us toward the brink of that division. I'm running to lead a national revival. If we can achieve that, then nobody in the world – not a nation, not a corporation, not a virus – will defeat us.

[**Fellow American, I don’t expect it to be easy. The things in life worth doing never are – but I know our movement is stronger with you on our side. Can I count on your pledge today?**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=61fbdf0d055f438691502e9487a201cf&_e=CcOWTlesycnJlcy3uvdmX1OWE3ij8Fkv3Y3YQLc8XoaLyBaH-8QWICiQEY_HmzPzqcQAjyU13OTWpA6jaJ-s5xMXgFQs2IvxhQKC6n6UcIqIju-B8uODcVr5ahjSEvr6kbeGrw_4BRwJFXBGG_yfu18ukJX76wEIaYaBAROBDBDUoaL4UAB_ZMC1rOpx6KD8clkwgZ6CucmFGc0r8AcT_HHdoVRBEXzfDKti7hf_DTTDGtfNsRrmEtFAv-TZhcAy_TrwDI4LDUBpyJjszP5u8b93TC5O7Z6R1LfRZVyll0q_UrJvwJGUeZX7Eze2mQZ5GsODOil6GoSddrJH2VP92CiBcir6wsALfO7v3DZqZzG1MoRjLqc80m4kTp-NGXDL)

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=61fbdf0d055f438691502e9487a201cf&_e=CcOWTlesycnJlcy3uvdmX1OWE3ij8Fkv3Y3YQLc8XoaLyBaH-8QWICiQEY_HmzPzqcQAjyU13OTWpA6jaJ-s5xMXgFQs2IvxhQKC6n6UcIqIju-B8uODcVr5ahjSEvr6kbeGrw_4BRwJFXBGG_yfu18ukJX76wEIaYaBAROBDBDUoaL4UAB_ZMC1rOpx6KD8clkwgZ6CucmFGc0r8AcT_HHdoVRBEXzfDKti7hf_DTRtgWpyB1ZFTMMK26_oVsmKtDq10w1myJdsdByoPQcu-XN3REctDY7zVV84joSgKnbOHaJuh111SgX0j-cskil2Em2DaM7GS0w31OVZLITAcl563zL5jSJkvECeeArLSHd8Fm0HuvVy-3vZAG3Vijsi)

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: 5 reasons to donate $5
disclaimer_text: paid for by the gun lobby
body:
#

Hi team,
It’s November 5th, and here are 5 reasons why your $5 contribution is so important to GIFFORDS PAC:
1. The United States is on track to have a record number of mass shootings this year. This is not normal, and it doesn’t have to be this way. We can change this.

2. Mike Johnson was just elected Speaker of the House. He’s a prime example of a politician who has been bought and paid for by the gun lobby. It’s up to us to take back the House next year and make sure we’re doing everything we can to replace gun lobby extremists with gun safety champions.

3. Our gun safety Senate majority hangs by a thread. If we don’t elect more gun safety champions to the Senate next year and expand our slim majority, all the progress we’ve made in our movement to end gun violence could be in jeopardy.

4. Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children in America. We must do more to keep our children safe from school shootings, domestic violence, accidental shootings, and community violence alike.

5. Our fundraising significantly slowed down in the middle of the year, and now we only have a couple months left to catch up and reach our 2023 goals. Our opponents in the gun lobby will be watching and waiting to spot any shortcomings in our fundraising performance. We can’t fall short and show any signs of weakness.

The choice is yours, but we hope that these five reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
[**If you’re able, please make a contribution of $5 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue our work to end gun violence in our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=1&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/20617?c0=giffords-em-nov23.oAds2I&t=2&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ygxFD3&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=3&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-nov23.yh47H-&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=4&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-nov23.a4zGU7&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=5&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-nov23.d42LVW&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=6&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-nov23.ka8v8M&refcode=em231105-1-60&t=7&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6829%2E3935704%2EIP4wUk) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Our fundraising significantly slowed down in the middle of the year, and now we only have a couple months left to catch up and reach our 2023 goals. Our opponents in the gun lobby will be watching and waiting to spot any shortcomings in our fundraising performance. We can’t fall short and show any signs of weakness. The choice is yours, but we hope that these five reasons demonstrate the importance of your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at GIFFORDS PAC Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A year from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
It’s clear that the Republican party has chosen a path of dangerous extremism.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=133%2E4032634%2EvAZUT5)
---
A year from today will be Election Day 2024. No matter who the GOP nominates for President — twice impeached, indicted Donald Trump, or one of his enablers — it’s clear that the Republican party has chosen a path of dangerous extremism. That path leads to a country that has fewer freedoms, fewer people being helped, and fewer voices in our democracy. A country that has more corruption, more extremist laws, and more struggle for working families. If MAGA Republicans win, they’ll further restrict the right to an abortion nationwide, the freedom to vote, and protections for trans people. They’ll threaten Social Security and Medicare, reward the rich and powerful, and embolden an extremist base across the country. **We cannot — and will not — go down that path with them. A year from today, we can know that we’ve done everything we possibly could to keep the White House. But only if we take action _today_. ** [**So will you please split a donation between the Biden-Harris campaign and my re-election campaign? With your support, we can go into this next year with as much momentum as possible to keep the White House, elect Democrats in critical races across the country, and strengthen our movement for big, structural change.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/968?t=8&akid=133%2E4032634%2EvAZUT5) During the 2020 election, voters showed up in record-shattering numbers — even in the middle of a pandemic — to make their voices heard. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won more votes than any candidate in history. A few weeks later, on one of the darkest days of our democracy, a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by the president of the United States — attacked the Capitol and tried to overturn the results. This is the type of anti-democratic extremism that we’re still up against. But in the 2022 midterms, Democrats were able to expand our majority in the Senate, and election deniers lost every statewide race to oversee elections in every presidential battleground — shoring up the freedom of the American people to choose their own leaders in 2024. But that didn’t happen by chance. It’s because we grew a strong grassroots movement across the country to reject authoritarian extremism. To defend our democracy. To protect our freedoms. We can win this next election — and continue to make real change — if we link arms and get organized, person to person, starting now. As a candidate for re-election to the U.S. Senate from Massachusetts, I’d be honored to appear on the same ballot as President Biden and Vice President Harris next year. And I’m going to do everything I can to see them pull off another big win. [**If you’re able to, please split a donation of $28 or anything you can today to support Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and my re-election campaign. We’re going to need to build all the early strength we can to win this.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/968?amount=28&t=9&akid=133%2E4032634%2EvAZUT5) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

---

body:
| **We officially have only one year left until Election Day.**

Here’s what that means in KS-03:

_We have just one year to ensure our anti-LGBTQ+, anti-choice new House Speaker doesn’t get a House majority again._

_We have just one year to make sure our opponents who have all come out against abortion freedoms don’t reach the halls of power._

_We have just one year to defend the freedoms we value in the Third District._

**_[There’s a lot at stake in the next 365 days. That’s why I need your help to kickstart our One Year to Election Day fund. Here’s the deal: National Republicans are already putting a huge chunk of their resources into spreading disinformation about my record and it’s only going to escalate before Election Day.

Their mission has been publicly shared. It’s to take over districts like KS-03 to expand their House majority.**We can’t let that happen.**

Everyday in Congress, I’m working tirelessly to defend our freedoms—to pass a new Farm Bill, strengthen our economy and to fight back against extremist politicians who want to attack our freedoms.

Come Election Day we want to make sure we did everything possible to win this race. **_[Will you chip in $20 to help my team ensure a victory against extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72831359/436553040/1012256553?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20231105_FR_1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_OYO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGExZDIxNi1mOTdiLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kt6a7u4xdolFXhqR_LFTOtnK4j2eJ3bGMCW6eR_KPdU=)_**

name: John Fetterman (sent from my iPhone)
subject: Hey it’s John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek, it’s John here!
We’re getting to work in the Senate on the stuff that matters most to PA + working families everywhere: better wages, better healthcare, + an economy that works for everybody.
That’s why I’ll keep this weekend ask short + sweet: i’m humbly asking for your support so we can keep up the work. I only got here in the 1st place with the support of this team 🙏🙏 and I know w/your help we will be able to continue.
**[If you’re able to, can you chip in a donation of any amount today? It will mean so much to me + the whole Fetterman team. Heres the link:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1-8655&refcode2=8655_434096_MLj-dM&akid=8655%2E434096%2EMLj-dM)**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1-8655)**
THANK YOU!
❤️❤️❤️John
Sent from my iPhone

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

We know we can only make progress on the issues we care about if Democrats take back the House. That’s why I am emailing you right now. name: Team Pramila
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can’t power this campaign without you.
#
Peter,
Our team moved mountains to reach our October end of month goal — and we did it!
We have three things to say: **thank you, thank you, thank you.**
With your support, dedication, and faith in this movement, we were able to ensure that our campaign can continue working at full power in November.
Your support, no matter the amount, allows us to keep pace with our plans and ensure that our fight continues 24/7 - 365 days a year.
Peter, we can’t power this campaign without you. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Do you have a second?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With exactly 4 months until the primary election, my team and I have been ramping up our efforts to shield our campaign from anti-democratic, MAGA extremists attacks.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4398%2E5257348%2EEu35Ko)
Derek,
Last night, we turned the clocks back one hour as Daylight Saving Time came to an end, giving us one extra hour of sleep.
Although some of the fiercest debates I’ve heard have been about Daylight Savings, I’m more concerned about the state of our democracy.
In recent years, our democracy has faced some _very_ serious challenges.
MAGA Republicans deposed the Speaker of the House and left the U.S. House of Representatives to complete chaos and dysfunction for more than three weeks.
Trump is maintaining a dominant 50-point lead in GOP primary polls despite his multiple criminal offenses.
MAGA extremism is testing our democracy like never before, and we have another big fight ahead of us in this next year.
We’ve faced more dire straits before — the challenges of the Trump years and the fight to defeat him in 2020 — and there’s only one thing we can do: Leave absolutely no doubt that we will fight MAGA extremism, win this Senate race, and save our democracy.
With exactly **_4 months_** until the primary election, my team and I have been ramping up our efforts not only to shield our campaign from far-right attacks but even more importantly to share our positive message — on making the economy work for everyone, making housing affordable, and saving our planet — with California’s 22 million registered voters.
Because I don’t accept corporate PAC money, and because we are running against over thirty candidates in this U.S. Senate race, it is no exaggeration to say that my ability to win this race depends on your support to tackle this dangerous moment for our democracy.
So please, Derek, with exactly 4 months until the California Primary Election, **[we can’t afford to fall back on our fundraising goals. Please contribute $4 to help me defend our democracy and stand against MAGA extremists.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3236?c0=nov2023_abs_em.QPW8gh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4398%2E5257348%2EEu35Ko)**

Fellow Conservative, I’m reaching out to you today because, as one of my top supporters, I’m sure you know what’s at stake in 2024. As soon as I announced my reelection campaign, _**national Democrats made me their #1 target**_ – and they’re willing to pour tens of millions of out-of-state dollars into this race to _**FLIP TEXAS BLUE**_. _**[Please use this secure link to chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, or more to help me stop a far-left takeover of our state next year >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)**_ Two Democrats, Colin Allred and Roland Gutierrez, have already announced their candidacies to take me on in the general election – and they’re BOTH fighting for themselves, NOT Texas. ⚠️ Colin Allred pretends to be a moderate, but he can’t run from his pro-abortion, pro-Hamas, open-borders record. ⚠️ Roland Gutierrez openly fights for arch-liberal policies, embracing many of the most extreme positions of the radical left. Either one of these candidates would be a DISASTER for Texas, and I need your help to make sure they’re defeated. **[Stand with me today with a generous contribution to fuel our fight to SAVE Texas in 2024.](http://trk.tedcruz.) ** The leftist Democrats can count on big checks from New York City and Silicon Valley. But I’m _relying on patriots like you to keep our state red_ and help take back the U.S. Senate. Thanks in advance for rushing in your best gift today! For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

clean_body: A DECISIVE MOMENT FOR OUR NATION.| | | | | Patriot, Exactly 1 year from today, our country will participate in the most critical election we will ever have. This is not an ordinary election. This is an election to determine if America is still a Republic where you have the power and the right to vote for the leaders, the future, and the country YOU want... ...Or, if we have become no different from those Banana Republics where the dictator holds an “election” and magically receives 99.9% of the vote. If Crooked Joe and the Democrats realize that they can weaponize the legal system to completely avoid a real election, then they will not stop there. This will go on forever and ever – and America will NEVER have a genuine election again. For the past 247 years, there’s ONE thing that has stopped America from falling to tyranny – and that’s YOUR VOTE. And on November 5, 2024 – exactly 1 year from today – you get to prove that America is still a Free Republic by casting your vote to save our country and Make America Great Again! To commemorate this very important milestone in the 2024 election, I’ve set an ambitious goal of 100,000 donations by midnight. It’s not the size of your contribution that matters, but the message it sends when Crooked Joe and the Deep State hear that 100,000 Americans stood up on this very important day to SAVE AMERICA. And just think about it – when our nation is joyously celebrating our triumph over tyranny on November 5, 2024, these 100,000 donors will have time stamped proof that they took a stand exactly one year back to deliver our win and Make America Great Again! Of course, if you’re doing poorly right now due to the very incompetent crook in the White House, don’t even think about donating. America will come roaring back very soon, don’t you worry! | | Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Mark Mullet
subject: What will WA look like 1 year from now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Today, I’m asking you to pause and think about what you want the future of Washington State to look like exactly one year from today.

Do you want to be on the same trajectory with an extension of our current leadership, with the cost of living climbing higher and higher while you and your family feel less and less safe in your neighborhoods?

Or do you want to be back on track with a Governor who will put affordability first and tackle our public safety crisis?

[Election Day 2024 is exactly one year from today, and what we do now will determine which path we take. subject: Governor Youngkin’s Closing Message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SPIRIT OF VIRGINIA
body:
Hear It Here First

| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_KVWMTEt1F5WlBka3RT1NOPl2M4G5oI6jqjfryOPzJWL9mRVj2cVW61PaC9nF_ksmPEeBWSAumC7u3mQUwF5LhLrbQF-PB1yh8yd93dVD5V12pzLdTZHMWpZCRyZf6fgwn1osfXiG1X4GvQkhobAzJ5Q3UlZArNqb54ichCUGuaNL5Qo1CANppxtcIce2IsDAHT_Sx32ARZc1Z0ehC2nPwYlVQ1MXnCmxk-M2jREc-rZeTr9778SGNLWRNd796H9ZhRGffIx3C3yRTUCCN2hG7lEVowYnqedfUBID7WS09443IEDVhU1eXf7oN3DF3S3Y9CnLfNrPLYzlot8hTTKKFiD67PSKCF5k0jNexXac-2U)
---
Friend,

Two years ago, we started a movement in Virginia.

It wasn't about politics. It was about getting things done. And under commonsense conservative leadership, we've delivered.

We've empowered parents and provided tutoring to combat learning loss. We've made historic investments in law enforcement and mental health services.

We enacted $5 billion in tax relief and added 230,000 new jobs. And there's so much more that we can do, but only if we have the right leaders in the General Assembly who will work with Governor Youngkin to move Virginia forward.

That's why Governor Youngkin is asking Virginians to elect a team of Republicans to back him up on November 7. Hear it from Governor Youngkin directly:

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_KVWMTEt1F5WlBka3RT1NOPl2M4G5oI6jqjfryOPzJWL9mRVj2cVW61PaC9nF_ksmPEeBWSAumC7u3mQUwF5LhLrbQF-PB1yh8yd93dVD5V12pzLdTZHMWpZCRyZf6fgwn1osfXiG1X4GvQkhobAzJ5Q3UlZArNqb54ichCUGuaNL5Qo1CANppxtcIce2IsDAHT_Sx32ARZc1Z0ehC2nPwatJ8tOr6eHMjJbOK_De81gEucyQBCMDsUqlTnn0mHyYUK80skZmdyKHtDXsOWio0mAEE2Mn3kqNu136ATLRItnkChj8rnqWJ3RA39S4VcBue5lzgenNXt4ZTtcSUEzOta1v0WrOFt544H_0eQtQdVy)
| [ **CLICK HERE TO WATCH** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_KVWMTEt1F5WlBka3RT1NOPl2M4G5oI6jqjfryOPzJWL9mRVj2cVW61PaC9nF_ksmPEeBWSAumC7u3mQUwF5LhLrbQF-PB1yh8yd93dVD5V12pzLdTZHMWpZCRyZf6fgwn1osfXiG1X4GvQkhobAzJ5Q3UlZArNqb54ichCUGuaNL5Qo1CANppxtcIce2IsDAHT_Sx32ARZc1Z0ehC2nPwaU06ZkviFp76iQR4h1Mk_5qdOUpZLwgh4N018RQRHLZIa8FeOmSF4gTQM_29o657k-5Z64WyJm9_2nISt5xQpz_497NLoSvKfALpeb769yaiLObl74iiOOV76jlAOdA3IQAi5G7yIS-2vY6uOdvGwn)
---

We know Governor Youngkin's agenda is popular - he has the highest approval rating for a Virginia governor in more than a decade, according to the [Washington Post.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_BqNRXo7DIJMpf39z07sQ7Fr3vPw051T4-SNNVDeUbnoXwaBxhsOSGYo1lhMC-lHsyXn9pa1pbFa4s4viXHn0PHAPkoXJ6WqUQqub6UhC9pBBqs2jPtLsXHQJDrP5F2tHYopFkv2O-8JG8951iCzYUSBsn2GvtRgt3xjEyKTlNMZanMj3GbGksABuTnF1BQcXEP5SpGicbzP5p1td92A0XhUXZ_ADR0cGKKFuOdELTdy_bm92AhKBJJsN6Vmr1rcvkDaYLKvzMgZaC5n2rStmHfN0rtrB81_K8bOMbeqQ2Y6)

And we know that this message will motivate Virginians to vote Republican next week: If you want to advance Governor Youngkin's commonsense agenda, then elect leaders to the General Assembly who will work with him rather than against him to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.

But we need your help to get this message in front of as many voters as possible BEFORE ELECTION DAY.

[ **HELP TEAM YOUNGKIN** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_KVWMTEt1F5WlBka3RT1NOPl2M4G5oI6jqjfryOPzJWL9mRVj2cVW61PaC9nF_ksmPEeBWSAumC7u3mQUwF5LhLrbQF-PB1yh8yd93dVD5V12pzLdTZHMWpZCRyZf6fgwn1osfXiG1X4GvQkhobAzJ5Q3UlZArNqb54ichCUGuaNL5Qo1CANppxtcIce2IsDAHT_Sx32ARZc1Z0ehC2nPwZW3bEHEN6xCuA7p72o2ytyCfJvo02HjphbJhbTnsoeu5AoL0UkZayr2Ntrp-zpeJ2YywlhTSVb_nCHiQs0rM7QgvyVxiIbPzrayeng4VXLhPpUKNRcaF_tjs7KNKxuL6kvTnCUuL1g755MDqlwxni9)

[ **HOLD THE HOUSE AND FLIP THE SENATE** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f2d23321d7074ce9a0badb8412c3b026&_e=3HDfYyS6upMoT0tu6RHw_KVWMTEt1F5WlBka3RT1NOPl2M4G5oI6jqjfryOPzJWL9mRVj2cVW61PaC9nF_ksmPEeBWSAumC7u3mQUwF5LhLrbQF-PB1yh8yd93dVD5V12pzLdTZHMWpZCRyZf6fgwn1osfXiG1X4GvQkhobAzJ5Q3UlZArNqb54ichCUGuaNL5Qo1CANppxtcIce2IsDAHT_Sx32ARZc1Z0ehC2nPwae7QsD9vDh4n3rULeyOfuOvWS-YfvrlARz6tptI3yhqywKwPnoDX20WMPWzCZBShm_zrj31HrF1G-CsiFA_zfVkzSnZMiswv9yXQqNRm2EZnnCCJGB3uPZP9Cephs5PFEtBFIKgmho8kT9juf0RNgb)
---

The far-left is going all-in to win this election. They've sent Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and every other major national Democrat into Virginia to stop Glenn Youngkin. They have poured millions of dollars into these elections to fund extreme candidates and blanket the airwaves with lies and fear.

That's why we need resources to confront their lies with this message of hope and results from Governor Youngkin. Please, donate anything you can today so we have what we need to compete all the way until Election Day.
