clean_body: Hear It Here First | Friend, Two years ago, we started a movement in Virginia. It wasn't about politics. It was about getting things done. And under commonsense conservative leadership, we've delivered. We've empowered parents and provided tutoring to combat learning loss. We've made historic investments in law enforcement and mental health services. We enacted $5 billion in tax relief and added 230,000 new jobs. And there's so much more that we can do, but only if we have the right leaders in the General Assembly who will work with Governor Youngkin to move Virginia forward. That's why Governor Youngkin is asking Virginians to elect a team of Republicans to back him up on November 7. Hear it from Governor Youngkin directly: | We know Governor Youngkin's agenda is popular - he has the highest approval rating for a Virginia governor in more than a decade, according to the And we know that this message will motivate Virginians to vote Republican next week: If you want to advance Governor Youngkin's commonsense agenda, then elect leaders to the General Assembly who will work with him rather than against him to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. But we need your help to get this message in front of as many voters as possible BEFORE ELECTION DAY. The far-left is going all-in to win this election. They've sent Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and every other major national Democrat into Virginia to stop Glenn Youngkin. They have poured millions of dollars into these elections to fund extreme candidates and blanket the airwaves with lies and fear. That's why we need resources to confront their lies with this message of hope and results from Governor Youngkin. Please, donate anything you can today so we have what we need to compete all the way until Election Day. Thank you for your continued support, Team Youngkin Contributions to Spirit of Virginia are not deductible for tax purposes as charitable contributions. | Promises Made, Promises Kept. Text GLENN to 39626 to receive regular updates from Team Youngkin. | PAID FOR BY SPIRIT OF VIRGINIA Not authorized by any other candidate. Our mailing address is: Spirit of Virginia PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

name: Bob Casey
subject: The toughest race of my career
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
There’s too much at stake in 2024 to play it safe.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)
We're officially one year out from Election Day, Peter, and there's too much at stake in 2024 to stand by right now.
**[That's why my team is setting a 72-hour goal to raise $30,000. Before I go any further, I want to ask: Will you give $5 or whatever you can to kick us off?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1&refcode2=1066_552475_zPw_Gv&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)**
**[Rush a donation »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1&refcode2=1066_552475_zPw_Gv&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)**
Winning this race is going to be tough, but my team and I have been working hard to build the strongest campaign possible. I've traveled our Commonwealth, from Erie County to Bucks County, to talk with Pennsylvanians about what I'm doing to lower costs for our families, build a stronger economy that works for everyone, and make sure our seniors have the benefits they've earned.
Our work is just beginning. Over the next 12 months, all eyes will be on this battleground state and our race to see if we have the campaign infrastructure to stop Mitch McConnell and national Republicans from taking back the Senate.
We have a lot of work to do over the next year, but I'm confident that if we put in the work, we can protect this seat and our Senate majority.
**[That's why early support is so crucial, and why I'm asking: Can you make your first online contribution today to help us hit our goal and ensure we have the resources to compete?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1&refcode2=1066_552475_zPw_Gv&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-1?refcode=em20231105-1&refcode2=1066_552475_zPw_Gv&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)**
Together, we can outwork and out-organize the special interests, but it all starts with supporters like you stepping up when you can.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1066%2E552475%2EzPw_Gv)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

The race here in OR-06 is really heating up. But with only one year left, we’re running out of time to ensure we can defeat our MAGA challenger and send Andrea back to Congress.

That’s why we’re coming to you: [**Will you pitch in $1 (yes, really $1) to fuel the final year of our campaign? $1 may not seem like a lot, but when everyone chips in, the money adds up in a meaningful way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72849209/436574661/809151987?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGExOTkxYi0wNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FF6C0Jqu5JujyphwchA3Hvy0UlmxqtrOCaKCqwtfAFw=)
| _[$1 for 1 year left>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72849210/436574662/809151987?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_shq_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGExOTkxYi0wNzdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FF6C0Jqu5JujyphwchA3Hvy0UlmxqtrOCaKCqwtfAFw=)_

Your $1 donation will allow our campaign to...

... Afford TV and digital ads.
... Take on misleading Republican attacks.
... Print out yard signs and campaign literature.
... Grow our on-the-ground operation and hire additional staff.
... Purchase water bottles and snacks for our volunteers.
... and so much more.

name: Virginia House Democrats
subject: 3 reasons to make a contribution today
body:
Friend –
The high-stakes Virginia election is coming up fast – only 2 days away. So we wanted to quickly share three reasons why you should donate today – and how every dollar makes a difference in this fight.
Reason #1: State legislative races are historically overlooked and underfunded, despite the fact that your state legislators have the MOST impact on your daily life.
Reason #2: National Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to help Youngkin elect his right-wing allies in the House of Delegates. In fact, Ron DeSantis’s former donor cut Youngkin a $1 million check and Youngkin recently held a major donors retreat to woo millionaires to influence the outcome of this election.
Reason #3: When this chamber was last up for election, Republicans won control by 733 votes in the three tightest districts. As a result, Virginia House Republicans pushed legislation to ban abortion, cut taxes for Virginia’s wealthiest, take money from our public schools, and roll back common-sense efforts to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
Now, we have a chance to take back the House of Delegates and deliver bold solutions to the challenges facing Virginians. But we can’t do it alone. Our candidates rely on the support of dedicated Democrats like you to help them hire staff, organize community and fundraising events, and get voters off the sidelines and into this fight for a better Virginia.
If you’re with us, friend, can you split $25 or more between the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and Jay Jones to help us win on November 7th? Every dollar will give our incredible candidates the push they need to continue this work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jayjones-housedems?refcode=jj20231105]
Only a handful of seats will determine control of the House of Delegates this year – the stakes are sky-high, but with you on our side, we can take back the House in just 2 days.
Thank you,
Team Virginia House Democrats
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jayjones-housedems?refcode=jj20231105 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jayjones-housedems?refcode=jj20231105]

Friends of Jay Jones
PO Box 2892
Norfolk, VA 23501
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=QIpJkbkNJ27jr4t%2FcO2dQz%2FVzoBCYFZAu9nebVZd4SkkhIYCpHlB3gDc1dVGp4TfR%2BR7Z9vG4YeqGxDq7QPzqIb6EI3rC%2Bj9NZVx6kNL6ABaxcJqWCM1dE%2FQSYZsdosQEsDZJ8x2EBc4O0XTGaFFjr%2FCApAJ4EvaSkJ9xPsl8oIIASzB%2Bh7sp8Ep2C6hS5zT9%2Fn%2BbYPKVjMFt%2B1KU%2BDjZxDXBJSEorpjEf7p6lMpUW3pVd6Iu2%2F%2B80MBJ5yPskbm9IlpXmNQA%2BeeNu6hPcrO0R4xZ71G7djI%2BoO2DlKJ5FjT5v6b%2BeK%2FjgiauQLPagoD2b%2BmFiOoKVhRQ4oWG%2FeqPoJcqY7Aa%2B74wu7uZtXMUUi0qSY7lHqVhUVVlHweGkHwEKL6Dkl2u7lw7RMPfVNF1NthwVv4Dorn3HWtU3WV%2B3fRWwc9bhaOpk5X9C%2BzA%2BIv .

name: James Carville
subject: GAME OVER:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56492?t=6&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7) James Carville here, folks, and I’m personally reaching out tonight because I’M F&$%ING TERRIFIED.

[**I need to ask you to split an urgent donation between Jon Tester’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project NOW and stop that no-good Mitch McConnell from buying Montana’s Senate seat.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56492?t=7&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)

Mitch and his super PAC buddies have raised BONKERS amounts of money in the past year to stop Jon by any means necessary. And if they’re successful, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye. **BOOM: national abortion ban, lower wages, your health care gutted.**

Jon needs your help like, yesterday. Hell, even if you already gave yesterday, he needs you to give again.

Because here’s the deal about this MASSIVE fundraising deadline, folks— _we ain’t there yet._ **And guess what?! ALL donations will help protect the Dem majority. Isn’t that worthwhile?**

[**We need an extra push to get us across that finish line, and I know we can do it together. Split an urgent contribution of $10 (or more if you’re feeling spicy!) between Jon’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help reelect Jon and double your impact:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56492?t=8&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56493?t=9&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56494?t=10&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56495?t=11&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56496?t=12&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56497?t=13&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
Here’s the deal. If we lose Montana, it’s GAME OVER. Mitch McConnell and his far-right cronies would snatch back Senate control and wreck our country with their extremist agenda. That’s why he’s so focused on beating Jon, and why Sunday’s deadline means EVERYTHING for the campaign.

**Jon Tester is Democrats' only chance to hold this seat and protect our Senate majority. But ONLY with your support.**

[**So click that donate button, put the pedal to the metal, and let’s win this thing for our future, our families, and our country.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56492?t=14&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
Thanks, y’all.

—James Carville
[DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56492?t=15&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11663%2E878179%2Eu7kSe7)
---

subject: The Williams Weekly: Election Day November 7th!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRANDON FOR CONGRESS NY22** ](https://d2z3Y104

### Folks,
###
I wanted to give you an update about this past week in DC and what I was up to this past weekend supporting our local candidates. Election Day is right around the corner and I have an urgent call to action. Make sure you have a plan and that you get out and vote! Election Day is November 7th.
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
On Monday, I called attention to the [rise of anti-Semitism](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3pCW2lnT6782zffxW9btbbF3Q1HtyW31Jzgp5JWJgtW2M6Jxx4N4BmZW6-rG802lWh83W6dpXsM108R5fW2DPg6S8Xcq0PW2WNc8J76FmP_W8pXqbh7RGcb_W53mKhF2hcQSbW8bJ0Wg1t1VJYW713qyH1Jn9HWW7Jw5Fl7dlyNbVL9q0D1hpJd8W43Vx1c4SMG7RW7QWty64LTb3HW5MQhXc19CD8jW218SJk4FyX1YW5ZpFQl9g9FlKW1sdhpL6BBGWjW2kBQxK8kTVSFW7dFmXG1PfCWbW2GCdjS1s7WrkW8H7Ym359dn8-f8mp8kF04) and the correlation between Hamas <-> Progressives <-> and Universities. I also made a call to action for voters across CNY and the Mohawk Valley to get out and [Vote Early](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3l3F5Dgfs-GZ5FW5WC4YW77npg3W4G5YS58K0-zbW8WFywv7hwWC-W4HVv2H15m2VkW8WPQTz26VKQgW3MHKTg9gL0mfW6Lf3FX6gvHM7W4Qqwk_7PQMZWW3BmcM51CPV2MW1JQPhw6WTrvJW5FpTFt2QXg2HW1DM83q5cCkrMW6HtS4f7YKzfJW3YBbYp4yVtLRW8KYrmJ8q3ylvW2mPn8s8jtBWMW3kbql88FXTPyW649_J599wM5hW4DfRV65nJVQ7W7hXsHq7ZjWK2W91G9B866xPqSW3KG5lY94v-9PW56s9rT1rQJWqf1DXmSg04). On Tuesday, I began notifying everyone of constituent service updates, rounding out the month with quick stats to show how my office is doing with supporting local families in need. We began with announcing more than [130 passports](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3l4W96Sf527rXZwcW5yl2-81s3p3mW3K4BP452x6YjW25GhHq5mjwDSW6zmpkB4dWNgbW63b4fk3xwSx_W5_dl297NFfGWW4VyzqP1Rrxs5Vg7GbP3-dZX1W7Rn5mq6X-Cm6N2KtXPd7G2ncW1mpMw62xDDB7V5m1Pw7P3X0dN287hT4XPgwLN9bKM4BQ3k_2W1lMbn61Z3FkSW4T9pDN24fzBgVZQsGJ27PNgwVLvhDy6sj3qTW7CMXW01b_-hRVGt0CD3RjY5tW25nrg11HBhgBW88xN2h4Gp6k2N1B9y7bXC-9Bf6_5sdj04) were successfully obtained for NY-22 constituents and that more than [45 Social Security](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3mdW7mWWtY4QZPmSW27B__N4Jjs-pW7JxP6Y2tp9YsW6tN1ww2T0L5zN5rdtZv5RFf-W4--14M4Jx8-FW5zcWpX4nnlCxW2cc8P94wRzprW8nz68k4PqzJyW5Jmctm59TzN0W6DmpT53BQDwfW8HX1pl71L8jhVNYpK71b6ywMW4HBlf42dKMCTW8Tkg0R78YR4NW4qlJh27SnXS7W80wmwL94L7J2W7n0SRC1vkF09W46xTBW1cQYdLW1xzjYW3Z7rHVW3ZgXNF8fX6NcW5jGJxG1z0GmlW53CRBQ4gbJkBN1G9BXlKgHVVf7T2Cl404) cases closed favorably. On Wednesday, I was proud to announce that TTM Technologies in Syracuse proposed an investment of [$130 million](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3q7W180HdY4ZmjVdW1M1kM41Wr3CJW2b43Rj7czG7cW8B4gNl7W8XQDW6WqX121WQhr5W4tXf2H4zjhpsW93_hQ11MVcn-W1TSHjL5l1YgpW83Rvl66rNJ5PW7Y14WC6CsvNSW4lvmKb6156MWVlKnP52CWz0sW6nmcNb4131N3W7NV7rF24kF5fW6fZVGy1L_HTVW76PxQk8rWQYRW8G07Q77v9ydGW6qtZ8g7VNjN8W10c9wJ36tbxWW2-1_hT2hPr89N4yvRV48t8GGW5g7HWN1Yg9P_W8wMhdC6gKlx4F2C54lQVNDJf7rLnXF04) to expand their operations locally, again signaling that CNY is the new "Silicon Empire." And I closed out our constituent services update to make note that my office favorably closed [84 veteran benefit](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3mHW709FMl1NyBxzW7p9WM753J9vDW1Jmbwc4smDmNVMjk9D6FZx8JVyKnM-9k3kcnW91_TRG7xM92-Vk76VL8gLl4hW2fT3Dk4R2c57W6pnYDZ62w5sqW7xTsGX4DKkJdW6q74QZ5qrxGtN3KZyHwkqtXhW4STFWY45fmtmW7Sgv_l88X_R6W4RKfhr7VsdHTW9k-4qH3FLjT1W5j7xw77BYcQ2N7rxPRz63st1W1Rn6dR1CrfCsW28ywyn10p34FVLxtsC4zwzNQW2R3gjK49Rg3GW3rtTDn8zhyCtW4s2zwV3zKHG5dnTQvM04) cases, more than [65 IRS cases](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3ntW5x2TsS3RmnydW5SBSdM81-tC-W2MdQjC4KwFd_W6Xv_j54r7j4GW6Wc2rc1hNTcfN7vzjlQB2qFyW5Jqbmr9jw14RW4xLW6k54q3xXW7_Nd5X28X_49W3RTXcb3gNqw8W2N6V2K1sGPtJW6CRkt95HdXh8W1Xvnf_69vJ_KW1dBdHN7vQw_GW5JvdBl8851MXW1LD8NW36kSflN7QFmqRK2Bz8W1N8Xrp3vDLgvW8qCzF_2Lgq0_W62bGG62S-lzJW3G598S2lPG5wW3g15X_1X47yFN732Y7F9v6zyW1FmL6N2y5T20f6HGnG604), and brought back nearly [$3.2 million to NY-22](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3nTW443NW05f5-3MW3nG3Pc9f1cVcW7cX9Hb2dlDFBW4C9KyZ7-JjLPW2yNZy178J-y_N1JmfTFB21pVW8spgFj7VmwG4W6qSjV86y8LljW6-dvVr29Qk3LW2HV3vJ2S8WmnW7QsYdx89DkhCW7JWj5r7bF738VLPKZW1brRNPW8yb8h46dVQNyW1jp5j_5gB49YW7CW9NB6B5PLJW4dpwc-85Bp0YN85nvbmZNC8hW5tY3lB24WLgnW6wzZ2f8vVMGCW8XwTdQ52Ck_VW4RvlY81tHMCQW2qJ5Hm7pSlvwVsTR204YzP2Gf44_PCC04). On Thursday, I voted to [provide aid to Israel](https://d2z3Y104.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/I8+113/d2z3Y104/MVMZl44C4jtN4z5VkQQdQGdW50jS-p55whT8N3mxJ6K3qmFRW7lCdLW6lZ3q6W4FnTcP41ngj-W7Bzsff9jMNBNV9Q7117HwfDzV8CDNL1ZN0jFW63ymhN1HxHh9W2Mqd4m5RsY58W5H9Yrz9cWn-kW75zcyN27f1_lN4QTwzq7ZQsQW61MNTS1kp6PWW4DqVbB8kJG3nN78vbwnV8wnKW2Dr5sY6qfGnFW6JRn_12g1dVNW2D9bSW8QD_DZW6vhxPF1wX2myN6vjld1W86bLN90qC51wbf0CW2j8zwR2TVtWwW73SCb58-C-DLW5_9Y-L1p1gPVW5BLPP22TTG6pW89zbxz82jr9-W7DqM1M8z6T20f81WP0804), continuing my commitment of standing with our critical ally. Marc Molinaro and Rep. clean_body: Make a plan, tell a friend, and get out and vote! We have incredible candidates all over CNY and the Mohawk Valley that need your support! | Folks, I wanted to give you an update about this past week in DC and what I was up to this past weekend supporting our local candidates. Election Day is right around the corner and I have an urgent call to action. Make sure you have a plan and that you get out and vote! Election Day is November 7th. | | | ---|---|--- On Monday, I called attention to the and the correlation between Hamas <-> Progressives <-> and Universities. I also made a call to action for voters across CNY and the Mohawk Valley to get out and . On Tuesday, I began notifying everyone of constituent service updates, rounding out the month with quick stats to show how my office is doing with supporting local families in need. We began with announcing more than were successfully obtained for NY-22 constituents and that more than cases closed favorably. On Wednesday, I was proud to announce that TTM Technologies in Syracuse proposed an investment of to expand their operations locally, again signaling that CNY is the new "Silicon Empire." And I closed out our constituent services update to make note that my office favorably closed cases, more than , and brought back nearly . On Thursday, I voted to , continuing my commitment of standing with our critical ally. And I urged our local voters to get out and On Friday, I signed onto a letter with Rep. Marc Molinaro and Rep. Ralph Norman that we sent to DHS, calling into question posts made by one of their government workers that was online and urging DHS open a formal investigation into this individual. And this weekend, I was out on the ground in our communities supporting local candidates running for office. See more on this below: | | | ---|---|--- Election Day is November 7th. Make a plan, tell a friend, and get out and vote! Door-to-door in Solvay On Saturday, I was out knocking doors for our local candidates in Solvay! Proud to go door-to-door with candidates from the Town of Geddes Republicans, Susan LaFex for Town Supervisor, Jon Lorber for Town Board, and Theresa Ciacco-Wheatley for Village Board. See my post, . Knocking in Eastwood Today, I was out in Eastwood knocking doors for Josh Davis, running for Onondaga County Legislature. Make a plan and vote! See my post, . Oneida City Doors Finishing off the weekend knocking doors in the City of Oneida with Rick Rossi for Mayor, Anna Hood for City Chamberlain, and Andrea Rose Hitchings for Oneida Council. We have a great slate of candidates and they need your support! Make sure to get out and vote on November 7th! See my post, . | | | ---|---|--- Check out some quick mentions: | | | ---|---|--- | | Brandon for Congress NY 22, 628 N Main Street, North Syracuse, NY 13212, USA, 315-220-0121

Can you believe it, Peter? **We are officially one year out until Election Day! I know it feels like the election is far away, but it will come fast.** As a grassroots campaign, our success depends on everyday Michiganders giving their time, money, and effort to support our race. I wouldn't have it any other way. And in case you forgot, my opponent is a wealthy incumbent with a war chest bigger than the size of our district. So, every small-dollar donation adds up in a big way. [I’m counting on you to keep our momentum going all the way. Will you become a monthly grassroots donor to help my team lay the groundwork for victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72849919/436577393/-1758524140?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231105_fr_OneYear_cand_kw_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjhlMWIzZjMtMDk3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kr4CY2o5EEpTuEiEGddf1OLt__pzCPUQNbf8KNk8uTo=) | **[Become a grassroots donor →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72849920/436577394/-1758524140?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231105_fr_OneYear_cand_kw_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjhlMWIzZjMtMDk3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Kr4CY2o5EEpTuEiEGddf1OLt__pzCPUQNbf8KNk8uTo=)**

When it comes to competitive races like ours, early support is everything. From now until next November, I know we’ll be able to withstand anything that comes our way.
Thanks for investing in a stronger, better future for Michigan's First District.
Gratefully and Tuebor,
Callie Barr
_(P.S. It’s also the end of daylight savings time, so don’t forget to set your clocks an hour back!)_

As a grassroots campaign, our success depends on everyday Michiganders giving their time, money, and effort to support our race. I wouldn't have it any other way. And in case you forgot, my opponent is a wealthy incumbent with a war chest bigger than the size of our district. So, every small-dollar donation adds up in a big way. = | = When it comes to competitive races like ours, early support is everything. From now until next November, I know we’ll be able to withstand anything that comes our way. Thanks for investing in a stronger, better future for Michigan's First District. Gratefully and Tuebor, Callie Barr (P.S. It’s also the end of daylight savings time, so don’t forget to set your clocks an hour back!) | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. body:

Friend,
We're just one year away from the 2024 election. We only have 365 days until polls close, and that’s really not much time. Control of the Minnesota House of Representatives is on the line, friend. Our House DFL Majority has been passing legislation to grow the middle class while extreme MAGA Republicans continue to show that they’re too extreme and reckless to lead. We need to protect our House DFL majority so we can keep working to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
That’s where you come in, friend. Right now, we are starting to hire more campaign staff and that takes money. We don’t have corporate interests lining our pockets, so we rely on our grassroots supporters. Can I count on you to help protect our House DFL majority by making a donation today? body:

Peter Willis,

On Tuesday, voters in Ohio and Virginia will go to the ballot box and decide whether or not women will have abortion rights.

In both states, supporters of reproductive freedom are being bombarded by extremist anti-choice groups with well-funded and deceptive misinformation designed to confuse voters.

Virginia is the last bastion for reproductive rights in the South, and in Ohio, voters need to vote the opposite way on the question than they did in August in order to save abortion rights — so getting out the vote is more important than ever!

That’s why Our Revolution is doing everything in our power to turn out the vote in these critical final days ahead of Tuesday. Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us raise the $15,319 we need to fund our outreach fully? name: Working Families Party
subject: A Turning Point for Labor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This is proof that collective action works — and that when working people come together across our differences, anything is possible. | | | Peter, With all the bad news in the world right now, you may have missed an incredible victory for workers across the country last week:
**After six weeks of targeted walkouts at the big three automakers — Ford, GM, and Stellantis — the United Auto Workers reached an historic tentative deal!** The UAW won because they combined a bold and innovative strike strategy around engaging, mobilizing and trusting members with inspiring leadership from new President Shawn Fain, who cast the autoworkers’ struggle as part of a larger battle against runaway corporate power in the U.S.**** Last year, the Big Three automakers made $250 billion in profits1, meanwhile UAW workers have not even seen a cost-of-living adjustment since 2009. As Fain said, “Record profits means record contracts.”2 **And the contract won by UAW is certainly record-breaking.** While the agreement still needs to be voted on by UAW members, in this deal, 146,000 workers at the three companies have won:3
* A 25% wage increase including an 11% bump in the first year plus restoration of cost-of-living adjustments worth as much as an additional 7-9% over the life of the agreement,
* Elimination of the two-tiered wage system that had turned thousands of temps and recently hired workers into second class citizens; some of these workers will see wage increases of 150% or more over the next four years,
* Increased contributions to retirement accounts,
* Language that brings non-union Big 3 battery manufacturing workers into the union and up to the pay and standards won by Big 3 workers,
* And, perhaps most remarkably, the right to strike over plant closures — giving workers unprecedented say over corporate investment decisions.

**This is not just a victory for workers at UAW, but a victory for workers everywhere.** It is proof that collective action works — and that when working people come together in unions, bridging our differences, anything is possible. And we know there are more fights in front of us. Actors and performers, represented by SAG-AFTRA, have been on strike since July. They are demanding better pay and working conditions as well as protecting their jobs from the threat of artificial intelligence, but big streaming companies and studios who rake in billions every year, refuse to budge. We continue to stand in solidarity with workers everywhere who demand a better future for their families and communities. clean_body: This is proof that collective action works — and that when working people come together across our differences, anything is possible. | | | Peter, With all the bad news in the world right now, you may have missed an incredible victory for workers across the country last week: After six weeks of targeted walkouts at the big three automakers — Ford, GM, and Stellantis — the United Auto Workers reached an historic tentative deal! The UAW won because they combined a bold and innovative strike strategy around engaging, mobilizing and trusting members with inspiring leadership from new President Shawn Fain, who cast the autoworkers’ struggle as part of a larger battle against runaway corporate power in the U.S.** Last year, the Big Three automakers made $250 billion in profits1, meanwhile UAW workers have not even seen a cost-of-living adjustment since 2009. As Fain said, “Record profits means record contracts.”2 And the contract won by UAW is certainly record-breaking. While the agreement still needs to be voted on by UAW members, in this deal, 146,000 workers at the three companies have won:3 A 25% wage increase including an 11% bump in the first year plus restoration of cost-of-living adjustments worth as much as an additional 7-9% over the life of the agreement, Elimination of the two-tiered wage system that had turned thousands of temps and recently hired workers into second class citizens; some of these workers will see wage increases of 150% or more over the next four years, Increased contributions to retirement accounts, Language that brings non-union Big 3 battery manufacturing workers into the union and up to the pay and standards won by Big 3 workers, And, perhaps most remarkably, the right to strike over plant closures — giving workers unprecedented say over corporate investment decisions. This is not just a victory for workers at UAW, but a victory for workers everywhere. It is proof that collective action works — and that when working people come together in unions, bridging our differences, anything is possible. And we know there are more fights in front of us. Actors and performers, represented by SAG-AFTRA, have been on strike since July. They are demanding better pay and working conditions as well as protecting their jobs from the threat of artificial intelligence, but big streaming companies and studios who rake in billions every year, refuse to budge. We continue to stand in solidarity with workers everywhere who demand a better future for their families and communities. With love and solidarity, All of us at the Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , UAW, August 2, 2023 2\. , Economic Policy Institute, September 12, 2023 3\. , Axios, October 30, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c4ce5ee9e50460a6e31a58c5cb87d6c29c9655047f2a3b588a206241b5b66ca9a16cadb4d10fef2d3204073901e9e3fa213a807a99261d76781895040a8119ec

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: My thoughts, one year out from our Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Let me make my case:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72850584/436579817/-849459103?refcode=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY4NDc4NS0wZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmEjGJqATfdDdVZr1v49ieaTRTo3Eok_T0Z66LJypdA=&emci=535a8c0b-8e7a-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483)
---
**On September 5th, 2023, I launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72850585/436579818/209297649?refcode=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY4NDc4NS0wZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmEjGJqATfdDdVZr1v49ieaTRTo3Eok_T0Z66LJypdA=) **One year from today, on November 5th, 2024, we’ll get to see if our hard work pays off.** | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72850586/436579819/209297649?amount=5&refcode=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY4NDc4NS0wZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmEjGJqATfdDdVZr1v49ieaTRTo3Eok_T0Z66LJypdA=)
---
We have hard work ahead over the next year — there’s no denying it.
Republicans have had a hold on our state for too long. We have to build the kind of campaign Tennesseans have _never_ seen to defeat them.
We’re building a coalition that transcends party alignment, economic background, or geography.
**Far-right politicians like Marsha Blackburn don’t listen to voters like us (she won’t even come listen to her constituents in person at a town hall). They don’t ask us what our communities need. That’s because _they don’t care._**
Instead, Republican electeds from our state vote in line with their special-interest donors and their party bosses who don’t know a damn thing about Tennessee.
We don’t need more culture wars. We need wages that pay the bills, paid parental leave, better health care, more resources for our public schools, and common-sense gun laws to keep our communities safe. That’s what I’ll work to secure in the Senate.
And I’ll _always_ be ready to hear folks out and listen to how I can better represent their interests.
This is the case I have to make to Tennessee voters over the next year, and I’m counting on your help to do it.
**_[This race is winnable if we join together. Pitch in what you can to stand tall with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72850587/436579820/209297649?refcode=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY4NDc4NS0wZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmEjGJqATfdDdVZr1v49ieaTRTo3Eok_T0Z66LJypdA=)_**
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72850588/436579821/209297649?refcode=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0f684785-0d7c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjY4NDc4NS0wZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmEjGJqATfdDdVZr1v49ieaTRTo3Eok_T0Z66LJypdA=)
---
With you all the way,
Gloria Johnson

clean_body: Let me make my case: | On September 5th, 2023, I launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate. = One year from today, on November 5th, 2024, we’ll get to see if our hard work pays off. | = We have hard work ahead over the next year — there’s no denying it. Republicans have had a hold on our state for too long. We have to build the kind of campaign Tennesseans have never seen to defeat them. We’re building a coalition that transcends party alignment, economic background, or geography. Far-right politicians like Marsha Blackburn don’t listen to voters like us (she won’t even come listen to her constituents in person at a town hall). They don’t ask us what our communities need. That’s because they don’t care. Instead, Republican electeds from our state vote in line with their special-interest donors and their party bosses who don’t know a damn thing about Tennessee. We don’t need more culture wars. We need wages that pay the bills, paid parental leave, better health care, more resources for our public schools, and common-sense gun laws to keep our communities safe. That’s what I’ll work to secure in the Senate. And I’ll always be ready to hear folks out and listen to how I can better represent their interests. This is the case I have to make to Tennessee voters over the next year, and I’m counting on your help to do it. = = With you all the way, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. White House fence and began chanting “Allahu Akbar” in Washington,
D.C., on Saturday. The protesters, many of whom were donning
Palestinian flags and keffiyehs, yelled “Allahu Akbar” at least five
times in unison, as seen in footage captured by the Daily Caller News

name: Susan Wild
subject: one year out

We’re officially ONE year out from the 2024 Election: November 5, 2024.

| Peter,

**We’re officially ONE year out from the 2024 Election: November 5, 2024.**

We’re one year out from one of the most competitive House races in the country.

**Last year, my race was decided by just 2% points, and this year, our district has already been named a “toss-up” by national experts.**

Not to mention, the NRCC has already named my seat as a top target to flip from blue to red.

I’ve never backed down from a tough fight, and this time won’t be any different, but if I’m going to hold onto this seat, then I need all the help I can get.

body:
We want you at the forefront of our strategy in 2024. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851745/436583992/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,we are _exactly one year out_ from Election Day 2024, and I need your input on EMILYs List's priorities for the year ahead.

**[Will you take our 1-year-out priorities survey?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851746/436583993/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851747/436583994/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
Peter, it's hard to believe, but **we are just one year away from Election Day 2024.**

As conservative-majority courts and anti-choice Republicans continue to threaten reproductive freedom nationwide, we are hard at work doing what we do best: electing Democratic pro-choice women who can BEAT Republicans and PROTECT the right to choose everywhere. And we want you to be a part of it!

[**While EMILYs List prepares for the year ahead, will you take a minute to fill out our 1-year-out survey and let us know what your priorities are for the 2024 election cycle?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851748/436583995/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
[TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851749/436583996/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---
This year's pro-choice victories have only been possible because of your support, and as a member of our community, your input is highly valued in this critical moment.

[**We want you at the forefront of our strategy in 2024, Peter, so please, will you take a moment to weigh in on our strategy for the next year?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72851750/436583997/1366645354?sourceid=1052266&refcode2=WTENEK11&refcode=20231105_1YearSurvey_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjlmZWU2Mi0xMDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HAspygzKAcuMW4VjLp1Oh8nHmkJIgWtuZhLU5pB2kM=&emci=82c35d5c-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6b9fee62-107c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

Thank you,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Interim President, EMILYs List

subject: re: New York Times polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We know from experience that more than a year out from the election, polls are not predictive. I can tell you what is though. | | |
---
Peter, if you’ll indulge me for a second, I would love to take a quick walk down memory lane. The year is 2011. It’s one-year out from Election Day, and the New York Times has just put out polling showing President Obama trailing significantly in battleground states. You may even remember the headline: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXwdIONpH5PV-meThzMA8_cr7LirFMy5C3UkvqBYTDKDNB7FQN3AdVZKy4bajvesXHBGA5os7g-hNxIMcg_COKNxIaIx9JOPKqHEISb5wbTNNpTC1aNA3uzvQ6wrLQlfVURrAiJnwG3yP0bxwWjYRulsJ1PQ8y9Zq6snQsbICQiWwR1pRlPBbuV6wArspQObS4asKfvRbhBqcgGU6ZvTuHqX_YTa-aL4DJfFWTKdWwuZrp-F7y2RO--vqanjnNfKlG4pzWkv7gX0ThRs1oDyRVoDL2b9EC_16Xrz5GopTX_0Hw/411/pdXNIgW_RCyWdeGSTNMS8A/h0/WJkj9wRwHd8qB06wD1B-bO33ww3UY8McdmhBStWgsXY) Flash forward to November 6, 2012. I think you may remember the day: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXwdIONpH5PV-meThzMA8_cr7LirFMy5C3UkvqBYTDKDNB7FQN3AdVZKy4bajvesXHAifzJA7jNMoDFGR3w8Mi1DAdRR_x-3IQPSe8-AFNKtTz1m9_7V9aeKzcc3kvb6RgJ-VlcwDo-8IKqyxQYyVZruPBElTDI3gP2j_RY2zGnC3cnO_9AgjiJD17gDT9isxylQIYeqqvtusiGngrQRNuLqe7A1F9hhjK1cuN1dzURjmrPDU1e48-FQZr-O_2ISOyUK2P67hquu5Q_WG-DWd1rEXJkfD3LBZyi47Nsfdq31EQ/411/pdXNIgW_RCyWdeGSTNMS8A/h1/D3xXEZr65JEHV0gxPmsmzckIcNwR6K_9Wj1cGq3ECtA) Now, present day: The New York Times just put out polling about President Biden. _But we know from experience that more than a year out from the election, polls are not predictive._ __The truth is: Winning reelection is going to be hard. We have our work cut out for us. The last election was won by less than 50,000 votes. You better believe it’ll be that close again. Now, you could spend your Sunday worrying about polls, or you could spend your Sunday doing something that will win us the election. **I’m asking this team to put our heads down, ignore the noise, and focus on reelecting President Biden and Vice President Harris. What do you say, Peter?** [Will you make your first $25 donation right now to help reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXwdIONpH5PV-meThzMA8_cr7LirFMy5C3UkvqBYTDKDNB7FQN3AdVZKy4bajvesXHA2EQH2-IQ8ciDGfYEOWpKrfrsRAA-_s-kAx2PuPAEg8AssHlPwCSQQOHnV8lNrAaDcD0sA5ziv2-RCS25FxaAQd-PARg4xu5dzf4CzD3MvrAXuipmEbKrrNJ7mLcjC7My_E9-lOMzmWbQE5JWNdEZe9DCwus_P2U-Z78LjRYpu-uW8kI81BrmJeBMco4_Uhv1LTACaBEG3C8-uaFwsdvtkENY2XEzCznTFl2Ak6xiOlw/411/pdXNIgW_RCyWdeGSTNMS8A/h2/vRGy3Q0uw9Fg-T-7s_QouL_PXkGY4TIs8zf_hQ_agsA) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

There will always be doubters and naysayers, Peter. Folks counted President Biden out in 2019. They said he and Vice President Harris were doomed in 2020. And they even thought Democrats were done for in 2022.

**But, guess what? This team has consistently proved politicos and pundits wrong -- and with your help, we’ll do it again next year. Reelecting President Biden and Vice President Harris is well within our power.**
[So, I have to ask: Will you pitch in $25 today to invest in getting our campaign’s message out far and wide and getting organizers on the ground who can talk directly with voters?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXwdIONpH5PV-meThzMA8_cr7LirFMy5C3UkvqBYTDKDNB7FQN3AdVZKy4bajvesXHAjpy_7kX8SOIG20p9Ky7ewJgm2OUz6R9RWm0yeK5V928MpLDMvlDDTpISJ6Qfc6peFHL5cuGyN5SqGLJCEM8zbqgsUnWvLI0aqYux3ZjbHWJtwXu6VgLZLxJqDvUo-EafLGGGU0O246VNGeCIwWs8WcZ8JMXhZQ1UdKabBsPyprxbxZ8IM_SSJEtApRb9qlvHsp17XCFD69iBaWxIGZar_u3ByRKMD9gbd7BvPntIXLg/411/pdXNIgW_RCyWdeGSTNMS8A/h9/T3jU2jN5n-l4SD6DRuaB5O15Ml9mooqNf5NNArp2xp0)
We need you with us.
Julie

clean_body: We know from experience that more than a year out from the election, polls are not predictive. I can tell you what is though. | | | Peter, if you’ll indulge me for a second, I would love to take a quick walk down memory lane. The year is 2011. It’s one-year out from Election Day, and the New York Times has just put out polling showing President Obama trailing significantly in battleground states. You may even remember the headline: Flash forward to November 6, 2012. I think you may remember the day: Now, present day: The New York Times just put out polling about President Biden. But we know from experience that more than a year out from the election, polls are not predictive. The truth is: Winning reelection is going to be hard. We have our work cut out for us. The last election was won by less than 50,000 votes. You better believe it’ll be that close again. Now, you could spend your Sunday worrying about polls, or you could spend your Sunday doing something that will win us the election. I’m asking this team to put our heads down, ignore the noise, and focus on reelecting President Biden and Vice President Harris. What do you say, Peter? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | There will always be doubters and naysayers, Peter. Folks counted President Biden out in 2019. They said he and Vice President Harris were doomed in 2020. And they even thought Democrats were done for in 2022. But, guess what? This team has consistently proved politicos and pundits wrong -- and with your help, we’ll do it again next year. Reelecting President Biden and Vice President Harris is well within our power. We need you with us. Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager, Biden-Harris 2024

name: Kevin Olasanoye
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72852660/436587563/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNmY2Y0OC0xNjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpznd8GqT7kf_Hsrl5AvZ6LGVTmcfMOX24-i-uUg0r8=&emci=f15aaa01-167c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=653fcf48-167c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hello Peter,

If you hadn’t seen, the 2024 presidential election is exactly one year away from tomorrow.

That may seem like a lot of time, but the reality is, we’re running behind on our schedule. This time next year, we’ll be in the middle of our final Get Out the Vote push, and our grassroots volunteers will be blanketing the state, knocking on doors and getting voters out to the polls to cast their votes.

But right now, we don’t have the infrastructure to support those volunteers. We need to hire organizers across the state, open offices in cities and towns everywhere, and update our voter database to ensure we have up to date information about who is registered to vote and what polling location we’ll be telling them to head to.

I understand that not everyone can pitch in by making phone calls or knocking doors, but we rely on grassroots support at all levels.

[**_So I’m coming to you with a humble request: pitch in. If you can, click here to donate our average online donation of just $22 to help fund our field work across the next 365 days.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72852661/436587564/710125701?refcode=20231105.1_KO_11F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNmY2Y0OC0xNjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpznd8GqT7kf_Hsrl5AvZ6LGVTmcfMOX24-i-uUg0r8=)**_

If you can pitch in more, we need it, but we rely on small dollar donations to support our work.

Thank you for your continued support, and together, we will keep Georgia blue one year from tomorrow.

– Kevin

Kevin Olasanoye
Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia
---
|
---

| Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org
---

Atlanta, GA 30312

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

But now, the MAGA-controlled House is using their time to abuse congressional power in the name of baseless claims and partisan politics. Now you may be thinking, didn’t New York House Republicans move to expel Rep. George Santos? | | Hey Peter, It's hard to believe that just over nine months ago, we launched this campaign to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington. **But that couldn't be further from the truth.** The reality is we need support more than ever to power through these last days.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: A year from today, everything will be put on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
The Election Day countdown is on.
#
Peter, the Election Day countdown is on.

In 2020 and 2022, Democrats defied expectations and overpowered the GOP by securing the Senate majority.

We’ve made incredible progress, Peter. We listened and delivered, passing pivotal legislation around issues that **actually matter to working people**. Our Democratic Senate majority passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ last year, confirmed a historic 148 federal judges and counting, and stood up for issues like abortion, voting rights, and growing the middle class.

All of our progress will be put to the test one year from today. The GOP is well-funded and determined. They’re willing to throw everything at the wall to flip the Senate red, so we need all hands on deck to stop them from wreaking havoc on our rights.

We need your help to protect our Senate majority in 2024. **[Will you stand with me to defend our Senate majority by donating any amount you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72854453/436593790/-744030037?refcode=dd_em_231105_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQ5Nzc0YS0xZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMmgPw7Tcfibxnlb1BvLc7WvWlp1bvddWMNMy5WlXmU=)**

We cannot roll back all of the progress we’ve made. Our environment, working families, and civil rights deserve better than Mitch McConnell’s GOP.

Together, we can rise to the challenge and ensure this progress continues. **[Invest in the future of our nation by contributing $5 today. Every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72854454/436593791/-744030037?refcode=dd_em_231105_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjQ5Nzc0YS0xZTdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hMmgPw7Tcfibxnlb1BvLc7WvWlp1bvddWMNMy5WlXmU=)**

My best,

Dick Durbin

Peter, did you know that over 25,000 people have lost their lives to gun violence in the U.S. this year alone?

**I refuse to back down from this fight, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence.**

So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action?

name: Matthew Lucci
subject: Campaign Documentary
body:
Hi!

I usually write an email to let you know what I've been doing as part of our campaign for Congress. This week is a little different.

I've decided to show you. Team put together a short documentary of our 12-day TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK TOUR, and it's available online [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B96i7saXJhs).

Please watch the video, and share it with a friend, so that we can bring the stories and needs of #TX25 to the front of the national conversation. Conservative change starts in our community, and I'm so thankful that you're a part of it.

God Bless!

\--

**\--**
**Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25**
[LucciForTexas@gmail.com](mailto:LucciForTexas@gmail.com)
(682) 220-9925
**[www.LucciForTexas.com](http://www.luccifortexas.com/)**
****

Peter, Roland Gutierrez is a Texas guy.
He grew up in San Antonio and has spent his life serving his community.
As a Texas State Senator, he represents over 300 miles of the Texas border region — including Uvalde.
After a gunman killed 21 children and teachers at Robb Elementary School, Roland led the fight to ban assault weapons in Texas.
Now, as a candidate for the United States Senate, he’s working to unseat Ted Cruz — one of the most far-right, pro-gun extremists in the country.
And the latest polls show that Roland has what it takes to get the job done:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Peter, we know Ted won’t go down without a fight.
Because while Roland is a Texas guy, Ted is a D.C. guy .
He has special interest groups, dark money backers, and major mega-donors cutting him massive checks.
They know he’s their best hope of maintaining the status quo and preventing the kind of progress that Roland is fighting for.
That’s why we need to stand together — now more than ever.
So please, will you step up with $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to show Ted Cruz and his big money backers that we’re winning this race for the people of Texas? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Peter,

I’m shooting off a quick note to this team because Election Day is just two days away, and we have so much on the line.

From protecting Virginia from a Republican trifecta, adding abortion protections to Ohio’s state Constitution, to kicking anti-abortion extremist and Dobbs architect AG Lynn Fitch out of office — we’ve got a lot of priorities this year.

Accomplishing all of them will only be possible with your support, so I’m asking: Will you rush an urgent donation today to support HER Time’s work before Election Day?

Katie

clean_body: HER Time PAC [] Peter, I’m shooting off a quick note to this team because Election Day is just two days away, and we have so much on the line. From protecting Virginia from a Republican trifecta, adding abortion protections to Ohio’s state Constitution, to kicking anti-abortion extremist and Dobbs architect AG Lynn Fitch out of office — we’ve got a lot of priorities this year. Accomplishing all of them will only be possible with your support, so I’m asking: Will you rush an urgent donation today to support HER Time’s work before Election Day? [] Thanks for your support, Katie Sent from my iPhone HER Time PAC HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States her-time.com [] | team@her-time.com [team@her-time.com] Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: =?utf-8?B?QWxseXNvbiBNdcOxaXogRGFtaWtvbGFz?=
subject: Election Day is a year away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Folks, today marks one year until folks across CA-40 will go to the polls and decide who they want to represent our district.

And I have to tell you: I woke up this morning feeling more optimistic about our chances of flipping this seat than EVER before.

I'll tell you why I'm feeling this way, but I need to ask you: Can you chip in any amount to help power our campaign through next November? Election Day will be here in no time and we need your support to gear up for it!

CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q4?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.05_B2_OneYearFromElection_FriendsAndFamilyList]

Since October 1st, our average grassroots contribution has ticked up to $26. This is significant folks, because as we bring more people into our movement, the support we receive allows us to invest more into reaching out to voters.

And when I talk to voters on the phone or in person, I’m reminded that so many people in this community want real change and a representative who's eager to listen and address their concerns.

Our community is yearning for new leadership in Congress, friends.

And one of the best parts about flipping this seat is that we could also be the race that takes back the Majority in the House and passes legislation that uplifts our middle class.

So will you chip in $26 and help our campaign for Congress make the year ahead of us count? It's going to take ALL of us putting in a little effort to flip this seat.

CHIP IN $26 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q4?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.05_B2_OneYearFromElection_FriendsAndFamilyList&amount=26]

CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q4?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.05_B2_OneYearFromElection_FriendsAndFamilyList]

Onward,

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

name: Annie Andrews
subject: November already?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Friends,

Can you believe it’s already November? That means we are just a little over a year out from the 2024 elections, and less than two months until the holiday season has come and gone. **__[It also means that Giving Tuesday is right around the corner!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_sIGJ58IufxUv0ddpCrP78tr-m2Y56-bsveToBVT7KXvXDzb1i1DYNSG5ly2jTo1pQA4ZSPdclGilXYy70Esvoc5kYkPkNH7QrnCB_2Mn32cBWByo3-1OZ217r4SCc6as0W1r8aQ4ouEn_7swjgtTD4mRGy60rscIJ0Q4VLjzlC8SGYcErTymAjl6qZjeLfkBxdYCupnuMmGSkB4Fm2dq4hOOJErFjGG2pqjCRLiaQbAyunNoXGZrkrExu17B7lXGXC5bsffRIyw0ALvr8WqqmIjnB6F5VmDuM94MdCiFHx-w/411/wbCFV_tUT5Kc_K71t7Dl2A/h0/3-hqrnZwGLKgBMdZ0Wv9KnsoQPFOiSWMxxS2CkvbbbY)__**

We are incredibly grateful for your support as we continue to grow Their Future PAC. It’s been a busy few months and we wanted to share a few highlights.

While our kids shouldn’t have to wait another day for a Kids First Majority in the House, these elections will be here before we know it. This work is hard but there are some definite bright spots to highlight!

Last week, Senators Warnock, Fetterman and Heinrich teamed up to introduce the **_Healthy Meals Help Kids Learn Act._** In the fight to reduce childhood poverty, ensuring every child has access to meals is paramount, and we’re so grateful for partners like this in the Senate!

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_sIGJ58IufxUv0ddpCrP78tr-m2Y56-bsveToBVT7KXvXDzb1i1DYNSG5ly2jTo1pRRz-xw9ElleNKxMhGYMQjkhsikNaFTCXg9XeCqZG1k46qtIduprY1lIzmNfK5OZ5fV4LJ1GB19K-6r4d-IQp5GknPXN4-tz8S0igZZgUeQHzEBjI63Jt6gc3Kki8iUqwTWN2IaEW6L5vvdTdFXBNqc78RVkuJ9oY6eLQvD6cwg-7AidYTBap6h0bblsrdE1GOJufe_7uWLbwLLes3fyG4YaYl2YMiwN8HqoWRSrM5fsQ/411/wbCFV_tUT5Kc_K71t7Dl2A/h1/ZicQ5XYCAlSaOSMggOf6qEH4VTYV7d7U1FExOYk7ptI)
Thank you to Senator Tammy Duckworth and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley who introduced the Support Through Loss Act in both chambers, in order to help ensure that those experiencing the loss of a pregnancy are fully supported with access to resources, workforce supports, and patient centered care. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLhHW7q1hRwqGWb7MRYQjIpN2xRzJY-mwqFBr4-IIz9t9pMFLBwt8TWHV-Ib8efuPm437c25wI2D-VfNNvaGXT_IygFp-Cum9n-yBYUnZjN-b-oRVtS6UvTYFqvpzZOLOqrUQJ-eZtzC9jnE5dw55wulTovLno5IS1aIqlnRwnI02WVSYohnmfbhn--_s6J5VhTnnotJ-47W2LV6lIPztu7ygIEFdf1e0iX91CB8EMkVr4SeUMfu-AfXw1Qspg8yWwYMYKRfDKUGXiNTnGurB5J_7uhZQ9yiyIRt82o-jAfBnrpLmxJTCaArfNyom_oe7g/411/wbCFV_tUT5Kc_K71t7Dl2A/h2/rTkPa5NnvtLddytqE3aGnfAg0ksUokVRgBaBJgcxXpY)
What do Reps Yadira Caraveo & Kim Schrier have in common? _They are the only two pediatricians in Congress._ Add former grade school teacher Congressman Greg Landsman to the mix, and you have three members of Congress that we think truly embody our mission and work. **We were thrilled to make them the first three 2024 Their Future. Our Vote endorsees.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_sIGJ58IufxUv0ddpCrP78tr-m2Y56-bsveToBVT7KXvXDzb1i1DYNSG5ly2jTo1pTjtD9E-encqMojJvANp9xByq-RgNNMfJcmOfakqyfrwVrlAyecAMcIjpzDDqkfAfcRcZcW4hjIEjt1F4QUN565EE3HaxJ1liXVMWnEQITVmEEecB9eXjLKdGzW6nQ7Ah53xjn2h8_oluIMtscntdfKFMslQvAwOnWoj6OCKQ6CriunB0tz2XmFJWrH33SDzSzKQMnzhGkyz8W9e1knDKForq9JaqOMgN484ysD_gOH_w/411/wbCFV_tUT5Kc_K71t7Dl2A/h3/Wq7iv03Ol3JBgcK63HWZ-DTmAq2pPiIJKCM8gAjEkVo)

Congrats to Reps Caraveo, Schrier, and Landsman! We can’t wait to re-elect you next year. Stay tuned for more endorsements!

ICYMI: We recently rolled out our brand new **Kids First Agenda as we work towards our mission to educate leaders and lawmakers on policies that will create a brighter, healthier, and more equitable future for our children.**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_sIGJ58IufxUv0ddpCrP78tr-m2Y56-bsveToBVT7KXvXDzb1i1DYNSG5ly2jTo1pTOIMs6UT1ML2xa52BBt-gSf25Blt5eSs21XIsKhMI443xW_hWRTVXFcOOnZtRIe4h1xSYcglqC9o6-aQfauIQQUOojhc7rOYm8PNZrrZwQd7Nwml-TmE40h8amHuHo2wf-qDu8GCiERo3KmH955VLgCzfE-7Nnyi-EQfOun93Kglad0FagIyklOuTfCIKMwn7i2IsdUgdH8zNA32EWxCtUmzjtxKSNTSxmdotTGY4fHw/411/wbCFV_tUT5Kc_K71t7Dl2A/h4/kVoXmCYFIVuawgLc-euOa87NZKYtZpFDcW70lgcPZa4)
You’ll hear a lot more about this. As we’ve said before, **we have over 73 million reasons to invest in the future, and every single one of them deserves our attention, our compassion, our voice, and our vote.**

One exciting (and exhausting!) part of running Their Future PAC is that Renee and I are always on the go! Last month, we traveled to DC for a busy week of meetings, strategy sessions, and an American Academy of Pediatrics networking event.

I am always happy to meet with medical students and residents, and was especially grateful for the opportunity to share my journey in advocacy AND politics with future pediatricians in Washington, DC.

clean_body: | | | Friends, Can you believe it’s already November? That means we are just a little over a year out from the 2024 elections, and less than two months until the holiday season has come and gone. We are incredibly grateful for your support as we continue to grow Their Future PAC. It’s been a busy few months and we wanted to share a few highlights. While our kids shouldn’t have to wait another day for a Kids First Majority in the House, these elections will be here before we know it. This work is hard but there are some definite bright spots to highlight! Last week, Senators Warnock, Fetterman and Heinrich teamed up to introduce the Healthy Meals Help Kids Learn Act. In the fight to reduce childhood poverty, ensuring every child has access to meals is paramount, and we’re so grateful for partners like this in the Senate! Thank you to Senator Tammy Duckworth and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley who introduced the Support Through Loss Act in both chambers, in order to help ensure that those experiencing the loss of a pregnancy are fully supported with access to resources, workforce supports, and patient centered care. What do Reps Yadira Caraveo & Kim Schrier have in common? They are the only two pediatricians in Congress. Add former grade school teacher Congressman Greg Landsman to the mix, and you have three members of Congress that we think truly embody our mission and work. We were thrilled to make them the first three 2024 Their Future. Our Vote endorsees. Congrats to Reps Caraveo, Schrier, and Landsman! We can’t wait to re-elect you next year. Stay tuned for more endorsements! ICYMI: We recently rolled out our brand new Kids First Agenda as we work towards our mission to educate leaders and lawmakers on policies that will create a brighter, healthier, and more equitable future for our children. You’ll hear a lot more about this. As we’ve said before, we have over 73 million reasons to invest in the future, and every single one of them deserves our attention, our compassion, our voice, and our vote. One exciting (and exhausting!) part of running Their Future PAC is that Renee and I are always on the go! Last month, we traveled to DC for a busy week of meetings, strategy sessions, and an American Academy of Pediatrics networking event. I am always happy to meet with medical students and residents, and was especially grateful for the opportunity to share my journey in advocacy AND politics with future pediatricians in Washington, DC. It was also the annual American Academy of Pediatrics conference in DC, and an incredible time to meet up with former colleagues, partners in advocacy, and friends. Their Future. Our Vote. hosted a reception and we were thrilled to welcome Reps Caraveo, Schrier, and Swalwell. Like all of you, we were devastated by the shooting in Lewiston, Maine and we refuse to feel helpless. We are calling on Congress to finally ban assault weapons. We launched a new ad in the wake of the Lewiston shooting urging Congress to act. Watch below. Thank you for your support. We couldn’t do this without you. — Annie P.S. If you are able, please consider Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are: → Climate action → Quality education → Affordable healthcare → Sensible gun legislation → Ending child hunger and poverty We’re powered by grassroots donations from people like you, so ** | | Paid for by Their Future PAC | | Sent via .
