name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d87db8dcff0457d8a5bbd42f802fddd&_e=V5cXlwZ96FYOM72S3-VJXP6HxLovN1zIHqXAG_bplA2CnV24R00r0UpHZrZ9w2lg6HaBuN9lZRxr5dGs-Fk8E2TWcgryTuxlkNf3H8w1WzeHu_UX0WpnmWvXYuzD-ryV0gNnfAWRTPMLl6MBzwD8IUHqEX6Vh-cEdzyZ7W8ytleUFUJ3RgeQM7WDDRVS9qqgL4Wkb_f66Zs16IlO3PaNi0Kb3K6svlUcizQstz125iDei-d8BDb7aW325QU4ftJ3TAVs3JVkHC0Q3yZwZ52ytbn1-2IP7AyPx8RPDHUJYjd0gzRAu5hizXS8lXlOs0sng_d98cZ5-Dy1JxLVGqXkyn9LO5ypa8tEKEs1ohwWU2A%3D)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d87db8dcff0457d8a5bbd42f802fddd&_e=V5cXlwZ96FYOM72S3-VJXP6HxLovN1zIHqXAG_bplA2CnV24R00r0UpHZrZ9w2lg6HaBuN9lZRxr5dGs-Fk8E2TWcgryTuxlkNf3H8w1WzeHu_UX0WpnmWvXYuzD-ryV0gNnfAWRTPMLl6MBzwD8IUHqEX6Vh-cEdzyZ7W8ytleUFUJ3RgeQM7WDDRVS9qqgL4Wkb_f66Zs16IlO3PaNixYRs_uZzEUErxO79-CFGTGwN-yGAb86n6CSRir3pRq2-mxYQr1OaMMUHEf755puYjeEoWfyGkj1l1lUhd53tIuh9LwLRvqvnyRNRwd-ato4Iot_qiKMIoDCb0rhf5dL-oRkTqxdhHJPj7NhH9Jhaxc%3D)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d87db8dcff0457d8a5bbd42f802fddd&_e=V5cXlwZ96FYOM72S3-VJXP6HxLovN1zIHqXAG_bplA2CnV24R00r0UpHZrZ9w2lg6HaBuN9lZRxr5dGs-Fk8E2TWcgryTuxlkNf3H8w1WzeHu_UX0WpnmWvXYuzD-ryV0gNnfAWRTPMLl6MBzwD8IUHqEX6Vh-cEdzyZ7W8ytleUFUJ3RgeQM7WDDRVS9qqgL4Wkb_f66Zs16IlO3PaNi9aNslcr8zoMW83KPGvLNAzK1ppmZbznbydXjpDD4rCZj9-ais9TyYbzx628ybwh5hVXbYmpchoxWgaIecEAkB79YMCAcbw4cP47_r7uMj2tyzd4Snl2TcJmpISV1JQDkuKJ0NRmQr16s5XifRL9tAk%3D)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d87db8dcff0457d8a5bbd42f802fddd&_e=V5cXlwZ96FYOM72S3-VJXP6HxLovN1zIHqXAG_bplA2CnV24R00r0UpHZrZ9w2lg6HaBuN9lZRxr5dGs-Fk8E2TWcgryTuxlkNf3H8w1WzeHu_UX0WpnmWvXYuzD-ryV0gNnfAWRTPMLl6MBzwD8IUHqEX6Vh-cEdzyZ7W8ytleUFUJ3RgeQM7WDDRVS9qqgL4Wkb_f66Zs16IlO3PaNi9Pwu3bE7MjNK2W5VPGqKOgHraawzaax5qFV3nqQ5EgV2zwtHYfjW28F7Jdrzu4I9RXf86keBrNWT4nyJMWoxboBSctDKewsn9Qk5rOULQRcTCoLFngUxfisuejR4rOUuR6D9Tem7gdtzyX6OnYPCRc%3D)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d87db8dcff0457d8a5bbd42f802fddd&_e=V5cXlwZ96FYOM72S3-VJXP6HxLovN1zIHqXAG_bplA2CnV24R00r0UpHZrZ9w2lg6HaBuN9lZRxr5dGs-Fk8E2TWcgryTuxlkNf3H8w1WzeHu_UX0WpnmWvXYuzD-ryV0gNnfAWRTPMLl6MBzwD8IUHqEX6Vh-cEdzyZ7W8ytleUFUJ3RgeQM7WDDRVS9qqgL4Wkb_f66Zs16IlO3PaNi7vF-8d_fkGWTqY10ocPx-DrBQ4LNhTlu4ayStcpryFxPejzr3ddXcwNcP8UvFsvVtPU16WIzBz_W0qLNMjif9aAJIMk3D2oWN5Y1JYFdr0TXqlZl3QoXGX9dI5Butzm_IiCjybUZBL82N-3SRz_sn4%3D)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

Friend, I'm reaching out to get up to date feedback from House Republicans' top supporters.

name: Friends of the Earth Action
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Stop toxic neonic pesticides from harming bees, people, and the planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099178?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the EPA __NOT_ to approve_ toxic neonic pesticides for another 15 years! [_Take action now >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099179?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Bee populations are dying out rapidly, and something MUST be done immediately to save our precious pollinators. Over the last two decades alone, we’ve lost _**87% of the Rusty-Patched Bumblebee, 89% of the American Bumblebee, and 93% of the Western Bumblebee.**_ There’s no doubt about it — if bees go EXTINCT, our world and way of life would be drastically different. Bees and other pollinators are responsible for **1 in every 3** bites of food that we eat, and without them, we could _**lose 75%**_ of the most nutritious foods we rely on. Scientists are pointing to neonics as a leading cause of the decline in bee populations. These toxic insecticides are the most widely used in the world, and they are extremely deadly to bees. Neonics kill bees by attacking their nervous systems, which can harm their ability to navigate, forage, fight off disease, and even reproduce! _**We need to act quickly if we’re going to SAVE BEES from being wiped out by toxic neonics so that these essential pollinators can continue to support our food supply, our ecosystems, and our planet.** _ [_**Will you sign our petition urging the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to put pollinators, people, and the planet above the pesticide industry’s profits? Add your name to tell the EPA to BAN bee-killing neonics NOW! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099180?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099181?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Friend, we aren’t being dramatic when we talk about the significant losses our food supply would suffer if bees were to go extinct.** **__Almonds would literally NOT EXIST if it weren’t for bees!__** And without bees, many other crops we love — like certain fruits, veggies, and coffee — would all be in shorter supply, making them harder to obtain and more expensive. _**For those already trying to make ends meet, this change could be devastating.**_
_To make matters even worse, studies have linked**human health risks** to neonics — including heart and brain malformations, memory loss, tremors, and hormone disruption!_
Despite strategic efforts by pesticide industry giants like Bayer-Monsanto to downplay the dangers of neonics, the science is out. The EU has already banned the worst neonics, _**but here in the states, the EPA has yet to take action.**_ **In fact, the agency might actually _APPROVE_ these harmful pesticides for _another 15 years!_**
We cannot let _**people, pollinators, and the planet**_ suffer for _fifteen more years_ from widespread use of toxic neonics. Unless we speak up NOW, there could be no turning back and fixing the irreparable damage to our environment. **_We’re urgently calling on 4,006 more activists like you to speak up by the deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT: [Can we count on you to take action today and DEMAND that the EPA bans toxic neonics immediately? Sign now before it’s too late! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099182?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)_[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099182?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2099183?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting pollinators, people, and the planet,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Peter --

This time next year, voters across the country will be headed to the polls to vote in the 2024 presidential election.
That means we have **one year** __ to build the strongest possible campaign to reelect Joe and Kamala. This is our chance to keep building on the progress we’ve made.
Here’s what that progress looks like:
* Thanks to Joe and Kamala’s leadership, we’ve created nearly 14 million jobs and the unemployment rate has reached near record lows.
* Working with Democrats in Congress, Team Biden-Harris has passed historic legislation, as we’ve made major investments in our country’s infrastructure and passed the first significant federal gun safety legislation in decades.
* Together, we’ve lowered everyday costs for Americans all over the country.

**[If you’re proud of the work we’ve done together so far, and ready to keep going, we hope you’ll add your name today to personally endorse Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDucVC0IO0nqe5ow2GSspgXvGyzZcuSzl6E_XSm1QY34V4J7saqb1djcqOjjyA1fuyQ-EJ8EoADoSLotmb0C30MZPeddxvjiNeM0BgT6epBv65XeAurlOLjCdw8LSlj3kYhsiKYG2hJaKbjkAPEv7Mtu05nlu0KJBb7syVotsFy1xPpjXUU-jEaxCDEJR0awZfvOiaPuQnntxCeVRPpctboKkq4o0Va-bMfhSc_Xj8qfKbKMpo9_U23wPbADSn2aRPLUqZimQ9sUrRzpZNJe2KPEh2VJXN4lSg6T4PjHiFRXEXgKJjtajKwvCSIDAFOfg5ywO4Ccf7ZGIrMyWC7RKCEgQ/411/P7WVSa6sS6yM4Bp55fqXyQ/h1/w58uiNJOKcXw2HwqwImDUC9UtO9BK6zU0959T0sTA6c)**

This is our chance to keep building on the progress we’ve made. | | | Election Day 2024 is exactly one year away. Can you sign on now to personally endorse Joe and Kamala? ** | Peter -- This time next year, voters across the country will be headed to the polls to vote in the 2024 presidential election. That means we have one year to build the strongest possible campaign to reelect Joe and Kamala. This is our chance to keep building on the progress we’ve made. Here’s what that progress looks like: Thanks to Joe and Kamala’s leadership, we’ve created nearly 14 million jobs and the unemployment rate has reached near record lows. Working with Democrats in Congress, Team Biden-Harris has passed historic legislation, as we’ve made major investments in our country’s infrastructure and passed the first significant federal gun safety legislation in decades. Together, we’ve lowered everyday costs for Americans all over the country. | | This is a true grassroots campaign, Peter. That means this campaign is about you \-- your priorities and your vision for our country’s future. And that’s why your personal endorsement means so much to us. Thanks for everything, Team Biden-Harris

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: A year from now, Katie might not be on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need to have a first or second place finish in March’s primary in order to advance to the general.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32648%2E3422442%2E9T1F38)
Derek,
We’re exactly 4 months out from the primary election on March 5— _and one year away from the general election_.
**It’s not a guarantee that Katie will even be on the ballot one year from now.** First, we need to have a first or second place finish in March’s primary in order to advance to the general.
**In order to do that, we need to reach millions of undecided voters as soon as possible, and running TV ads in California is extremely expensive.[We fell a bit short on our October fundraising, so we’ve set a $25,000 fundraising goal for this weekend. Can you chip in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231105-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_OYO_20231105_V1_F&refcode2=32648_3422442_9T1F38&akid=32648%2E3422442%2E9T1F38)**

Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t take a single dime of corporate PAC, federal lobbyist, Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEO money. We truly count on folks like you.
[**Can you help us reach the undecided voters who will determine this election?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231105-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_OYO_20231105_V1_F&refcode2=32648_3422442_9T1F38&akid=32648%2E3422442%2E9T1F38)

— Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_OYO_20231105_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32648_3422442_9T1F38&akid=32648%2E3422442%2E9T1F38)**

Peter, this is a longer email about the legislative accomplishments I’m most proud of as a freshman Frontliner in Congress. I’d appreciate it if you read the whole thing, but if you’re short on time, **[it would mean the world if you considered pitching in $8 or whatever makes sense to support my reelection campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856071/436599901/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGRjZWE2OC0yYjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UX7zjjUA3pL3PVofpr4Wcgk0gxNC5INTCLkPGMecy-Q=)**

After three weeks of MAGA Republicans stalling work in Washington for their Speaker Fight, I’m happy to report that House members are back to legislating and advocating for our constituents.

I was elected to Congress, knowing that I ran to represent families like mine - and those that make up the vast majority of families in Colorado’s 8th District - I’ve been doing my best to fight for those families.

Democrats are in the minority, so in my first term, I’ve worked across the aisle to make an impact. Right now, I’m working to reauthorize and strengthen the 2023 Farm Bill. I’m proud of legislation I have cosponsored to support veterans and promote more research into pharmaceutical and illicit drugs.

But I won’t stop here, Peter. I know that I can make even more of an impact with a Democratic House unified around helping working families. To win, I need your help to ensure my campaign has the resources it needs to survive Republican attacks coming my way, hold this critical seat, and help Democrats flip the House to push for the progress we deserve.

**[So,Peter, I’m personally asking you: Will you support my fight and help fund my reelection campaign? I don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money, so anything you can give will go a long way>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856072/436599902/537837852?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_yc_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGRjZWE2OC0yYjdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UX7zjjUA3pL3PVofpr4Wcgk0gxNC5INTCLkPGMecy-Q=)**

And now I’m asking for your support.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856259/436600640/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_es_oos-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE2ZDgxZS0yZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbFko4d8ic_VcWMTqVvVorcwtz6h7Kae2y0nh9XbbcA=) Hi Peter,

In case you missed it: Last weekend I was on Pod Save America, and I wanted to take a moment to share with you what I said. But first I have to ask: [**With only 2 days to go until Election Day, it’s critical that we keep our voter outreach program running strong. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights to ensure we have the resources we need to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856260/436600641/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_es_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE2ZDgxZS0yZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbFko4d8ic_VcWMTqVvVorcwtz6h7Kae2y0nh9XbbcA=)

When I sat down with Pod Save America to talk about Issue 1, I had one simple message: **We can’t afford to lose.**

**Not only will Issue 1 codify in our state’s constitution the right for women to access abortion services in Ohio. It will ensure that there’s a constitutional right for birth control, for fertility treatment, and for miscarriage care** – all of the things that a person of reproductive age wants access to, and all of the things we must do to ensure our state is a safe place for people to expand their families and raise their children.

**_There’s too much at stake to leave anything to chance._ That’s why I’m coming to you now.**

[**Peter, it’s crunch time. We need a surge of grassroots donations to ensure we can reach every single voter between today and Tuesday. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856261/436600642/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_es_oos-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE2ZDgxZS0yZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbFko4d8ic_VcWMTqVvVorcwtz6h7Kae2y0nh9XbbcA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856262/436600643/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_es_oos-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE2ZDgxZS0yZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbFko4d8ic_VcWMTqVvVorcwtz6h7Kae2y0nh9XbbcA=) | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72856263/436600644/1523672385?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.05_b1_es_oos-nd&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE2ZDgxZS0yZDdjLWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbFko4d8ic_VcWMTqVvVorcwtz6h7Kae2y0nh9XbbcA=)

name: BobCasey.com
subject: The question everyone will be asking us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
The countdown has started.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)
Peter, the countdown has started.
One year from today, the polls will close, results will come in, and we'll know the answer to one big question: **_Did we re-elect Bob Casey?_**
Everything we do over the next 12 months will be toward that one goal. It won't be easy, so Bob is building a team that can mobilize supporters across the Commonwealth and keep Mitch McConnell and the GOP from flipping PA red.
**But next year on November 5th, the last thing we want to think is “we could have done more.”**
**[If you're ready to make a difference in this campaign, rush a contribution to help us hit our 72-hour goal »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-2?refcode=em20231105-2&refcode2=1067_552475_A3Zs7U&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-2?refcode=em20231105-2&refcode2=1067_552475_A3Zs7U&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)**
Like Bob has said, winning this race is going to be tough. David McCormick has the resources to self-fund his campaign, and that's on top of the millions that Mitch McConnell and dark money GOP donors will pour into Pennsylvania.
If we come together, we can protect this Senate seat. If we build a big enough team, we'll know we did everything we could to re-elect Bob. If enough grassroots supporters power our movement between now and Election Day 2024, the answer to **_“Did we re-elect Bob Casey?”_** will be **_“YES.”_**
**[We can't afford to give this anything less than our all — and that starts with reaching this 72-hour goal. Help us raise $30,000 to fight back by chipping in right away »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231105-2?refcode=em20231105-2&refcode2=1067_552475_A3Zs7U&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)**
Thanks for supporting this team.
-- Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1067%2E552475%2EA3Zs7U)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: November 5th

body:
| Election Day is 1 year away.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1471%2E35263%2EuU1ZlC)
**November 5th, 2024** — exactly one year from today — Wisconsin voters will head to the polls, mail in their ballots and make their voices heard in elections that will determine which party controls the Senate and White House. That means we have **12 months** to defend this toss-up Senate seat from power-hungry Republicans with virtually unlimited campaign war chests. **365 days** to get our message out to Wisconsin voters so we can clinch the Senate majority for Democrats. The stakes of this race couldn’t be higher — and it will only become more competitive as GOP megamillionaire opponents enter the race. Election Day will be here before you know it, which is why I’m asking you to make an investment today to win Wisconsin and defend the Senate. **[Will you make a donation to help keep Wisconsin blue? I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me defend this toss-up Senate seat — and our Democratic majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1471%2E35263%2EuU1ZlC)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1471%2E35263%2EuU1ZlC)

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7193fbc58a44472b8f697c20ec7cdf30&_e=VXC0BI1n9NsR-yvE0Od2oUhZ33m9AIZpNHXD-vGtKyX_5oUcFyZ1iE7iAlG1uk6lKoVmxTKPT48HFA_4TPYNo-cz1ES7L6thhkgRAJ6qubbs-dvZCFcLF-v0bDNPcyEb5LPSvSEETbyXMHE1w_KPtif_fPxo1xEeJ6Ox4w5-4LHozK8zv7pC1Rz-SNQmnQl2Jpr1uILc3EBQ0G7c7Jz2vvObDhN3vI4kantKgprnE2UC6r_BLf-yThRJprcezmbMlYexeQT4JdTuYtoqyJJHZi4Zwar38WMfTNYn04jkB7xuUwesrCU4zXfN1XPi43g6WPdfiHm8IHZ4iUQR6Kr8NVSs63_Q5eHKLADgQcBq25LYGOkpmZujTbKfy8ObZgXL)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7193fbc58a44472b8f697c20ec7cdf30&_e=VXC0BI1n9NsR-yvE0Od2oUhZ33m9AIZpNHXD-vGtKyX_5oUcFyZ1iE7iAlG1uk6lKoVmxTKPT48HFA_4TPYNo-cz1ES7L6thhkgRAJ6qubbs-dvZCFcLF-v0bDNPcyEb5LPSvSEETbyXMHE1w_KPtif_fPxo1xEeJ6Ox4w5-4LHozK8zv7pC1Rz-SNQmnQl2Jpr1uILc3EBQ0G7c7Jz2vvObDhN3vI4kantKgprnE2X2HntQBxtnDLYpGkNJJebdhWUgnjUFbH88frgtR47uysGtclrazoKMaQEnkyTbVpvvwUxtP1lO7Gtlp17uyojt1Bbz8ASvDA1vGbGy87hR0Vv-Wr9M_7CTkeAVx2lHe9DbT04RqmnUGmwaaviazrzR)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7193fbc58a44472b8f697c20ec7cdf30&_e=VXC0BI1n9NsR-yvE0Od2oUhZ33m9AIZpNHXD-vGtKyX_5oUcFyZ1iE7iAlG1uk6lKoVmxTKPT48HFA_4TPYNo-cz1ES7L6thhkgRAJ6qubbs-dvZCFcLF-v0bDNPcyEb5LPSvSEETbyXMHE1w_KPtif_fPxo1xEeJ6Ox4w5-4LHozK8zv7pC1Rz-SNQmnQl2Jpr1uILc3EBQ0G7c7Jz2vvObDhN3vI4kantKgprnE2W7qEWXaq_YEnaKkoBfu6RpC8-0C3_6b_VjUam3iYmgvWblkp7RdNW0hE1qMiVNlpENYkS9kKtXtzC2A6b5wEiZZFHKubB_yUnwhncxIhEqYdJwzQKMBjNtJ4p5C2ImziHulrxpjk-DZhTC4cOlrtEl)

Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don't realize that I've been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Tina Smith
subject: One year away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It’s going to take all of us using our voices and our grassroots power to mobilize voters. |
#
Hi there — It’s hard to believe, but **the election is just ONE YEAR away!** That means we have just one year to reach voters across Minnesota and the United States to remind them of the stakes of this election. To remind voters who will fight for them and other working families, not the interests of wealthy mega-corporations already receiving huge tax breaks. To remind voters that only one party is fighting for child care benefits, paid family leave, and more affordable health care. To remind voters that while Republicans, led by their corrupt former president, are working to dismantle our democracy, Democrats are trying to restore and rebuild trust in our democratic institutions. This is what we need to do to maintain control of the Democratic Senate majority. **It’s going to take all of us using our voices and our grassroots power to mobilize voters.** **[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $5 a month, to help maintain our work reaching out to voters here in Minnesota and around the country. $5 or $10 a month will go a long way in sustaining our grassroots organizing work. clean_body: It’s going to take all of us using our voices and our grassroots power to mobilize voters. | Hi there — It’s hard to believe, but the election is just ONE YEAR away! That means we have just one year to reach voters across Minnesota and the United States to remind them of the stakes of this election. To remind voters who will fight for them and other working families, not the interests of wealthy mega-corporations already receiving huge tax breaks. To remind voters that only one party is fighting for child care benefits, paid family leave, and more affordable health care. To remind voters that while Republicans, led by their corrupt former president, are working to dismantle our democracy, Democrats are trying to restore and rebuild trust in our democratic institutions. This is what we need to do to maintain control of the Democratic Senate majority. It’s going to take all of us using our voices and our grassroots power to mobilize voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly recurring donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks so much for your ongoing support. Together, in the next year, we’re going to make a huge difference and keep the right people in power! — Tina = Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| | | **2024 ELECTION IS NOVEMBER 5, 2024

COUNTDOWN: 1 YEAR AWAY**

We’re exactly one year away from the 2024 Election. Even though it might seem far away, the important work starts now.

**We’re on a mission to elect more gun violence prevention champions than ever before up and down the ballot.**

We have so many important races, including the fight to hold onto the White House.

President Biden has made more progress on gun violence prevention legislation than any other president in the last 30 years.

We need to ensure that gun violence prevention activists in VA are committing to vote next year. We’re working to get at least [381] responses from VA, so don’t wait to respond.

[_**Will you sign our commit to vote pledge before 10:00 AM tomorrow morning?? We’re counting on you!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72857018/436603391/726417194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjI1Yjc2ZGUtMzQ3Yy1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kfbNbPD8mhWbq6jxAGMkUWOsb3uv602K8Oo2kE9LIEU=&emci=ea5b76de-347c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=f25b76de-347c-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

name: Liz Walters
subject: Election week is finally here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Let's get this thing done.
| This won't take long, team.

You know what’s at stake on Tuesday. You know what passing Issue 1 would mean for Ohio. You know that Republicans are going to use every last second they have to try to silence your voice. And you know that my team and I have been doing everything we possibly can to turn out the vote in support of Issue 1 – and we’ll continue doing so until the polls close Tuesday evening.

And this time around, that same consultant is working for the RINO candidate who is _hoping_ Crooked Joe convicts me as an innocent man.

You may recall what happened in Iowa in 2016 when one of our opponents’ team spread a vicious and false rumor that a presidential candidate had dropped out at the last minute as a way to steal his delegates. And this time around, that same consultant is working for the RINO candidate who is hoping Crooked Joe convicts me as an innocent man. That’s why we cannot write off the primary just yet. We need to be prepared for ANYTHING that comes our way – even at the final hour. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
| President Biden ran in 2020 to restore the soul of the nation
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)
Derek —
**We are officially one year from Election Day 2024.**
President Biden ran in 2020 to restore the soul of the nation.
And that is exactly what he and Vice President Kamala Harris have tried to do.
We’ve passed big, bold legislation to protect our climate, rebuild our infrastructure, invest in jobs and manufacturing, expand health care for veterans, keep guns out of the hands of abusers, and bring our economy out of the pandemic and build it back bigger and stronger.
**No president in half a century has done more in their first term in office than Joe Biden.**
**[If you’re ready to help win this Senate race in California and defend the White House for four more years from MAGA extremists, then I’m personally asking you to split a contribution of $3 to our campaign and President Biden’s today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.BMsNM3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation Joe Biden and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.XYFrnq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)

---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.XYFrnq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=8&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)

| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.XYFrnq&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.BMsNM3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)
---
Rather than Trump’s influence over the Republican Party diminishing in the wake of the January 6 insurrection at the Capitol, it has only grown.
There are more election deniers in Congress now than there were on January 6, and if we fall short of securing Democratic majorities in the House and Senate _and_ fail to protect the White House, then we could be facing four years of complete gridlock — or worse.
I’m running to protect our democracy, save our planet, and make the economy work for everyone, in California and across the country.
**But we can’t defend the White House and win this Senate race without strong grassroots support.**
**[Make an urgent donation of $3 split between my campaign and the Biden-Harris team to help us gear up for the big fights in the year ahead.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_biden.BMsNM3&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20231105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=11&akid=4399%2E5257348%2Eai3bKg)**
Thank you for making our progress possible.
— Adam
